spare.zh: 父亲常常在空闲时间读侦探小说。

welfare.en: France is running a welfare state it can no longer afford.
welfare.zh: 法國是一個福利國家，但它卻不再能夠負擔得起了。

decent.en: Tom is a decent sort of guy.

prevail.en: Justice will prevail in the end.

solid.en: Water is liquid. When it freezes, it becomes solid.
solid.zh: 水是液体。冻起来就成了固体。

ban.en: We should ban advertising aimed towards children.
ban.zh: 我们应该禁止针对儿童的广告。

ashamed.en: I'm very ashamed of myself about what I've done.
ashamed.zh: 我對自己的作為很內疚。

solve.en: In my opinion, it would be difficult to solve this problem.
solve.zh: 在我看来，这个问题很难解决。

bride.en: The bride seems to be very pretty.

engagement.en: He announced his engagement to her.

household.en: She was busy with household work.

delay.en: In case the shipment is delayed, we have special delay insurance.
delay.zh: 万一船运迟了，我们有特别的迟到保险。

private.en: My father is always poking his nose into my private life.
private.zh: 我的父亲总是干涉我的私生活。

definition.en: My camera can shoot high-definition video.
definition.zh: 我的录像机可以拍高清视频。

influential.en: He is very influential in the world of medicine.
influential.zh: 他在医学界有很大的影响力。

recommend.en: I don't recommend eating in that restaurant. The food is awful.
recommend.zh: 我不推荐在那家餐馆吃饭。食物糟糕透了。

organ.en: Do you know how to play the organ?

contest.en: My father participated in a cooking contest and came in first.
contest.zh: 我爸爸参加了料理竞赛并得了第一名。

deadline.en: You must get the job done before the deadline.
deadline.zh: 你必须在到期前完成这项工作。

figure.en: I wish I could figure out how to delete my Facebook account.
figure.zh: 我希望我能知道如何刪除我的Facebook帳號。

imply.en: I didn't mean to imply otherwise.

gym.en: We played basketball in the gym.

chef.en: Our chef is very busy today.

sensible.en: It was sensible of you to follow her advice.
sensible.zh: 你聽從她的忠告是明智的。

outline.en: Line art emphasizes form and outline, over color, shading, and texture.
outline.zh: 線條藝術強調形式和輪廓，而不是顏色、陰影和紋理。

react.en: If someone irritates you, it is best not to react immediately.
react.zh: 如果有人激怒你，你最好不要立刻做出反应。

committee.en: The senator was censured by the congressional ethics committee.
committee.zh: 议员受到了议会道德委员会的谴责。

locate.en: I can't locate the source of the problem.
locate.zh: 我无法找到问题的根源。

tighten.en: Small businesses will have to tighten their belts to survive.
tighten.zh: 中小企业要勒紧裤带才能存活。

physics.en: He had a book on physics published.
physics.zh: 他有一本關於物理學的書被出版了。

complicated.en: Computers are capable of doing extremely complicated work.
complicated.zh: 电脑可以做极为复杂的工作。

conform.en: We must conform to the rules.

curious.en: "What's going on in the cave? I'm curious." "I have no idea."
curious.zh: “洞里发生了什么？我很好奇。”“我一点也不知道。”

grain.en: There isn't a grain of truth in what he says.

rate.en: The unemployment rate in Japan was 3.4 percent in September of 2015.
rate.zh: 在2015年9月日本的失业率为3.4％。

equality.en: Equality is guaranteed by the Constitution.

selfish.en: It is true that she is pretty, but she is selfish.
selfish.zh: 她确实很漂亮，但她很自私。

survival.en: I gave up all hope of survival.
survival.zh: 我放棄了所有生存的希望。

favor.en: I want you guys to do me a favor.
favor.zh: 我想要大家伙帮我个忙。

conflict.en: The conflict between blacks and whites in the city became worse.
conflict.zh: 在这个城市，白人和黑人间的争端愈演愈烈。

garage.en: Tom has no idea what to do with all the junk in his garage.
garage.zh: 汤姆不知道拿他车库的那些废物怎么办。

plant.en: This kind of plant grows only in the tropical regions.
plant.zh: 這類植物只生長在熱帶地區。

operation.en: My father has been in good shape since his operation.
operation.zh: 自从手术后，我父亲一直处于良好的状态。

handle.en: I don't know how to handle children.
handle.zh: 我不知道如何對待孩子。

passion.en: The poet expressed his burning passion for the woman he loved.
passion.zh: 詩人對他愛的女人表達了他火熱的激情。

exaggerate.en: It seems to me that she has a tendency to exaggerate.
exaggerate.zh: 在我看來，她有一種誇張的傾向。

loan.en: I told Tom I'd be willing to loan him some money.
loan.zh: 我告诉汤姆我愿意借给他一些钱。

vocabulary.en: You need a large vocabulary to read that book.
vocabulary.zh: 你讀那本書需要大量詞彙。

amusing.en: She read an amusing story to the children.
amusing.zh: 她给孩子们读了个有趣的故事。

generate.en: An electric current can generate magnetism.

schedule.en: Do you know the concert schedule of London Symphony Orchestra?
schedule.zh: 你知道伦敦交响乐团的演奏会行程吗？

menu.en: I'm sure you'll love what we have on the menu tonight.
menu.zh: 我肯定你会喜欢我们今晚的菜肴。

reward.en: He is entitled to receive the reward.

equivalent.en: A trip to America was equivalent to a two-year salary for her.
equivalent.zh: 去美国旅行一次相当于她两年的工资。

resign.en: You should do the honorable thing and resign.

revise.en: In the light of what you told us, I think we should revise our plan.
revise.zh: 根据你所说的话，我认为我们应该重新审视我们的计划。

humanity.en: Slavery is a crime against humanity.
humanity.zh: 奴役制是一种危害人类罪。

dump.en: Is Tom going to dump Mary?

resist.zh: 我抵抗不了甜食的诱惑。

legal.en: The legal system in America is the world's finest.
legal.zh: 美國的司法制度是世界上最好的。

picky.en: I'm not picky. I'll eat anything.

steal.en: Can you teach me how to steal?

explosion.en: Yesterday, an explosion occurred at the fireworks factory.
explosion.zh: 昨晚，烟花厂发生了爆炸。

ignore.en: It wouldn't be wise to ignore Tom completely.
ignore.zh: 完全忽视汤姆不会是明智的。

complete.en: As far as I'm concerned, she's a complete stranger.
complete.zh: 她对我来说是一个完全陌生的人。

switch.en: Switch on the light. I can't see anything.
switch.zh: 把灯打开。我什么都看不见了。

couple.en: A couple of flights were delayed on account of the earthquake.
couple.zh: 一些航班由於地震被延誤了。

honesty.en: Honesty is the primary reason for his success.
honesty.zh: 誠實是他成功的主要原因。

screen.en: Tom became popular among teenagers as soon as he made his debut on the screen.
screen.zh: 汤姆第一次上电视后就广受青少年的欢迎。

divine.en: To err is human, to forgive divine.

promising.zh: 他是一位有前途的学生。

vary.en: Social customs vary from country to country.

permanent.en: A permanent job is better than a temporary one.

manufacture.en: The date of manufacture is shown on the lid.

professional.en: I've always wanted to be a professional basketball player.
professional.zh: 我一直想成为一名职业篮球运动员。

exchange.en: A girl gave me an orange in exchange for a piece of cake.
exchange.zh: 有个女生用一个橙子跟我换了一块蛋糕。

detective.en: Father would often read detective stories in his spare time.
detective.zh: 父亲常常在空闲时间读侦探小说。

evident.en: As is evident from the data, smoking is not decreasing among the young.
evident.zh: 数据表明年轻人抽烟的现象没有减少。

retreat.en: I was uncertain whether to advance or to retreat.
retreat.zh: 我不确定该前进还是后退。

identity.en: We know the identity of Tom's killer.
identity.zh: 我們知道湯姆的殺手是誰。

statistics.en: Facts are stubborn things, but statistics are pliable.
statistics.zh: 事实是倔强的，但统计是柔顺的。

insult.en: Tom didn't mean to insult anybody.

long.en: Tom wrote Mary a long letter, but he didn't send it to her.
long.zh: 汤姆给玛丽写了封长信，可是没有寄给她。

extension.en: This extension cord is too short.

engine.en: Keep the engine running. I'll be right back.
engine.zh: 讓引擎持續運轉，我去去就來。

genuine.en: This might not be a genuine diamond.

cheat.en: It is wrong to cheat at cards.

security.en: Germany adopted a social security system in the 1880's.
security.zh: 德国在1880年代采取了一种社会保障制度。

painful.en: There's nothing more painful than losing one's child.
painful.zh: 沒有比失去孩子更傷心的事。

steep.en: The path zigzagged up the steep slope.
steep.zh: 這條小路沿著陡峭的斜坡蜿蜒而上。

persuade.en: I had a hard time trying to persuade him to cancel the trip.
persuade.zh: 说服他中止旅行真是件苦差事。

signature.en: I attached my signature to the document.

advance.en: The rugged terrain made the troops' advance difficult.
advance.zh: 地面高低不平，給部隊前進帶來了困難。

charity.en: Tom donates half his salary to his favorite charity.
charity.zh: 汤姆捐一半他的薪水给他最喜欢的慈善机构。

indispensable.zh: 水是生命所不可缺少的。

accompany.en: She will accompany me on the piano.

invest.en: The government should invest more money in agriculture.
invest.zh: 政府应该加大对农业的投资。

approximately.zh: 約有三十箇年輕人到了。

ease.en: I am very ill at ease with strangers.
ease.zh: 我面对陌生人很不自在。

excellent.en: He was an excellent scientist, and what is more, was a great poet.
excellent.zh: 他是一位優秀的科學家，更是一位偉大的詩人。

investigate.en: He announced that he would come at once and investigate the matter.
investigate.zh: 他宣布他將立刻來調查此事。

judgement.en: We can rely on his judgement.
judgement.zh: 我們可以信賴他的判斷。

suffer.en: I can't bear to see animals suffer.
suffer.zh: 我无法忍受看着动物受苦。

visible.en: Tom rolled up his trouser legs, making his bright red socks visible.
visible.zh: 湯姆捲起褲管，露出鮮紅的襪子。

swift.en: Life is short and time is swift.

battle.en: This is the place where the battle of Hastings took place.
battle.zh: 這裡是黑斯廷斯戰役發生的地方。

constantly.en: He is constantly finding fault with other people.

familiar.en: All of you are familiar with the truth of the story.
familiar.zh: 你們所有的人都熟悉這個故事的真相。

terribly.en: If I've misjudged you, I'm terribly sorry.
terribly.zh: 如果我对你产生误解，我实在抱歉。

justice.en: Justice will prevail in the end.

district.en: The typhoon struck the Kanto district.

lobby.en: Meet me at the lobby of the Imperial Hotel at 6:30 p.m.
lobby.zh: 下午六点半到帝国酒店的大堂找我。

interview.en: You'll have to play it by ear at the interview.
interview.zh: 在面試的時候你必須見機行事。

laundry.en: I don't like to use liquid laundry detergent.

poison.en: The tip of the spear was dipped in a deadly poison.
poison.zh: 矛尖浸在一種致命的毒藥裡。

bakery.en: The girl who works at the bakery is cute.
bakery.zh: 在面包房工作的姑娘很可爱。

tent.en: It took us half an hour to set up the tent.
tent.zh: 搭帳篷花了我們半小時。

wedding.en: They wanted a wedding picture in front of the Eiffel Tower.
wedding.zh: 他們想在艾菲爾鐵塔前面拍張結婚照。

fair.en: It's not fair to attribute your failure to your parents.
fair.zh: 把你的失败归咎于你的父母是不对的。

riot.en: There was only one warden on duty when the riot started.
riot.zh: 暴動開始時只有一位監獄長值班。

conspicuous.en: The scar on his forehead is conspicuous.
conspicuous.zh: 他額頭上的疤痕很醒目。

block.en: He quickly made friends with the new boy on the block.
block.zh: 他很快便与小区里新来的男孩交上了朋友。

endure.en: Can she endure a long trip?

stir.en: I don't want to stir up old memories.
stir.zh: 我不愿意勾起久远的回忆。

rocket.en: The rocket was launched into space.

attribute.en: It's not fair to attribute your failure to your parents.
attribute.zh: 把你的失败归咎于你的父母是不对的。

sentence.en: Will you please explain the meaning of this sentence to me?
sentence.zh: 您能为我解释这句句子的意思吗？

divide.en: Let's divide this money between you and me.

justify.en: The end does not always justify the means.
justify.zh: 為了正當目的並非總是可以不擇手段.

proposal.en: I can't think of any other way of getting him to accept our proposal.
proposal.zh: 我看不出有其他方法能让他接受我们的提议。

punctual.en: Compared with her sister, she isn't very punctual.
punctual.zh: 與她的妹妹相比，她不是很準時。

harmony.en: We must learn to live in harmony with nature.
harmony.zh: 我们必须学会与自然和谐共处。

view.en: As we went around the corner, the lake came into view.
view.zh: 当我们走到转角处，湖就映入了眼帘。

financial.en: Russia is facing great financial difficulties.
financial.zh: 俄罗斯面临着严重的财政困难。

bankrupt.en: The company's going to go bankrupt really soon.

admire.en: Visitors to Switzerland admire the Alps.
admire.zh: 遊客到瑞士欣賞阿爾卑斯山。

representative.en: If you would like to speak to a customer service representative, please press three.
representative.zh: 如果想與客服代表通話，請按三。

blame.en: None of us thought he was to blame for the accident.
blame.zh: 我們都不認為他是事故的罪魁禍首。

pointless.en: Life without love is just totally pointless.
pointless.zh: 没有爱情的生活毫无意义。

mutual.en: True friendship is based on mutual trust.
mutual.zh: 真正的友谊建立在彼此信任的基础上。

temptation.en: You shouldn't give in to temptation.
temptation.zh: 你不應該屈服在誘惑之下。

passive.en: Watching TV is a passive activity.
passive.zh: 看電視是一種被動的活動。

treasure.en: I'll never tell anyone where I've hidden the treasure.
treasure.zh: 我不會把藏寶的地方告訴任何人。

shock.en: She got over the shock of her father's death.
shock.zh: 她從她父親過世的震驚中恢復了。

fancy.en: Tom and Mary stayed at a fancy hotel.
fancy.zh: 汤姆和玛丽入住了一家高档酒店。

cancel.en: I had a hard time trying to persuade him to cancel the trip.
cancel.zh: 说服他中止旅行真是件苦差事。

programmer.en: I want to be a computer programmer.

advice.en: If he had taken his doctor's advice, he might still be alive.
advice.zh: 如果他听了他医生的建议，他可能还活着。

courageous.en: Tom is very courageous, isn't he?

respectful.en: Be respectful to your superiors, if you have any.
respectful.zh: 如果你有上司的话，学会尊敬他（她）。

makeup.en: Tom doesn't like women who wear too much makeup.
makeup.zh: 汤姆不喜欢妆化太浓的女人。

reservation.zh: 湯姆把酒店訂單取消了。

apply.en: What Tom said doesn't apply in this situation.

generation.en: My parents' generation went through the war.
generation.zh: 我父母那一代经历过战争。

chat.en: Sorry, Tom, I don't have time to chat.
chat.zh: 湯姆，抱歉，我沒時間閒聊。

ancient.en: Rome has a lot of ancient buildings.

evil.en: As long as good people do nothing, evil will triumph.
evil.zh: 只要好人袖手旁观，恶人就会得胜。

indifferent.en: Lots of people in Japan are indifferent to politics.
indifferent.zh: 很多日本人對政治冷淡。

effect.en: Some scientists believe that the greenhouse effect is imaginary.
effect.zh: 有的科學家認為溫室效應是虛構的。

appointment.en: Make another appointment at the front desk.

assemble.en: This bookcase is easy to assemble.
assemble.zh: 這個書架組裝起來很簡單。

debt.en: All you have to do is ask him to pay the debt.
debt.zh: 你只需要喊他还债就行。

insecure.en: She felt insecure about her future.
insecure.zh: 她對她的未來感到沒有安全感。

mislead.en: I didn't want to mislead anyone.

response.en: I'm sorry for the late response.

essay.en: I'm looking for a native speaker who could help me correct this essay.
essay.zh: 我正在尋找可以幫我修改這篇論文的母語人士。

dessert.en: I'm trying to save room for dessert.

regularly.en: Are you taking any medicine regularly?
regularly.zh: 你經常服用任何藥物嗎？

discover.en: Call me if you discover anything.
discover.zh: 如果你發現什麼，請打給我。

ignorant.en: I am quite ignorant of their plan.
ignorant.zh: 他们的计划我一无所知。

decorate.en: Many people decorate their homes for Christmas.
decorate.zh: 許多人都會在聖誕節期間裝飾自己的家。

annual.en: I don't know my father's annual income.
annual.zh: 我不知到我爸的年收入是多少。

due.en: Due to the worsening weather, the departure was delayed.
due.zh: 由于天气变差，出发延迟了。

situation.en: We were faced with an unusual situation because of the accident.
situation.zh: 那场事故让我们陷入了不寻常的局势。

archive.en: I created an archive of my emails.
archive.zh: 我给自己的邮件做了一份档案。

mechanic.zh: 這名技師組裝了這台引擎。

distinguish.en: I think to clearly distinguish opinion from fact is important.
distinguish.zh: 我认为辨别清楚意见和事实很重要。

vote.en: In the U.S., most people can vote when they reach eighteen years of age.
vote.zh: 在美國，大多數人能在十八歲以後投票。

construction.en: A new school building is under construction.
construction.zh: 一座新的教学楼正在建设。

melt.en: The snow will melt when the sun comes out.
melt.zh: 太阳一出来，雪就会融化。

discourage.en: I didn't mean to discourage you.

combination.en: Jazz fusion is a combination of rock and jazz.
combination.zh: 融合爵士是搖滾樂與爵士樂的融合。

grave.en: She carried that habit to her grave.
grave.zh: 她到死都改不了那個習慣。

reduce.en: I have to reduce my expenses this month.

wise.en: A wise leader knows when to listen to others.
wise.zh: 聰明的領袖知道什麼時候要聽取他人意見。

background.en: There is a castle in the background of the picture.
background.zh: 图片的背景是一座城堡。

symbol.en: I don't know what this symbol stands for.
symbol.zh: 我不知道這個符號代表什麼意思。

quality.en: I'd gladly pay more for something if it's of high quality.
quality.zh: 如果它是高品質的東西我會很樂意多付一點錢。

ring.en: As soon as she heard the bell ring, she answered the telephone.
ring.zh: 她一聽到鈴響，就接了電話。

planet.en: Mercury is the smallest planet in our solar system.
planet.zh: 水星是我們的太陽系中最小的行星。

conventional.en: Plastics have taken the place of many conventional materials.
conventional.zh: 塑料代替了许多传统的原料。

guilt.en: Sociopaths rarely display remorse or feelings of guilt for their crimes.
guilt.zh: 反社会者极少为他们的罪行显露懊悔或有罪恶的感觉。

conclusion.en: Tom came to the conclusion that no matter what he did, Mary wouldn't like it.
conclusion.zh: 汤姆得出无论他做什么，玛丽都不会喜欢的结论。

absent.en: Nobody noticed that she was absent until the meeting ended.
absent.zh: 直到会议结束之前都没人注意到她不在。

antique.en: Can you tell me where the nearest antique shop is?
antique.zh: 你能告诉我最近的古玩店在哪里吗？

trace.zh: 他没有留下痕迹就消失了。

fine.en: They fine you in Singapore if you throw trash in the streets.
fine.zh: 在新加坡的街道上扔垃圾会被罚款。

rude.en: He should apologize for being rude to the guests.
rude.zh: 他应该为自己对客人的粗鲁无礼而道歉。

embarrass.en: I didn't mean to embarrass you.

mineral.en: I like to drink natural mineral water.
mineral.zh: 我喜歡喝天然的礦泉水。

conservative.en: On the whole, the Japanese are conservative.
conservative.zh: 总体上说，日本人很保守。

tank.en: The fuel tank in the car is full.

territory.en: The armed forces occupied the entire territory.

refuse.en: I do not know whether to accept or to refuse.
refuse.zh: 我不知道是否該同意或拒絕。

brave.en: His brave deed earned him respect.
brave.zh: 他的英勇行為使他贏得了尊重。

hat.en: Take your hat off when you enter a house of worship.
hat.zh: 當你進入禮拜堂時，把你的帽子脫下來。

beach.en: The beach is an ideal place for children to play.
beach.zh: 海滩是一个供孩子们玩乐的理想场所。

authority.en: He gave me authority to fire them.
authority.zh: 他授權給我解僱了他們。

roast.en: How about some more roast beef?
roast.zh: 再多一些烤牛肉怎麼樣?

put.en: She folded up the towels and put them away in the cupboard.
put.zh: 她把毛巾折叠好再放入柜子里。

december.en: The Japanese attacked Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941.
december.zh: 日本人在一九四一年十二月七日襲擊珍珠港。

president.en: I'll never forget shaking the President's hand last year.
president.zh: 我决不会忘记去年与总统握手的情景。

lately.en: I've been coming to work one train earlier lately.
lately.zh: 我已經搭了最近比較早一點的火車來上班。

down.en: All of a sudden, the enemy bombs came down on us like rain.
down.zh: 突然，敵人的炸彈像雨點一樣落向我們。

lake.en: Some of the bluest water in the world is found in Crater Lake.
lake.zh: 一些世界上最藍的水在火山湖。

nor.en: Neither Tom nor Mary has found anything valuable.
nor.zh: 汤姆和玛丽都没有发现什么有价值的东西。

bench.en: Tom and I sat on a bench in the park and talked while we fed pigeons.
bench.zh: 我和汤姆在公园的长椅上坐着，一边聊天一边喂着鸽子。

mirror.en: How many times a day do you look at yourself in the mirror?

draw.en: Let's draw lots to decide who goes first.

quiet.en: When listening to a lecture, you should be quiet.
quiet.zh: 听讲座时，你应该保持安静。

water.en: Some of the bluest water in the world is found in Crater Lake.
water.zh: 一些世界上最藍的水在火山湖。

nervous.en: I never make a speech without being nervous.
nervous.zh: 我没有一次演讲的时候是不紧张的。

fight.en: You can't fight a good fight with such a defeatist attitude.
fight.zh: 抱著失敗主義的態度你無法打一場漂亮的仗。

missing.en: Tom thinks I'm missing this great opportunity.
missing.zh: 湯姆覺得我要錯過這大好機會了。

lift.en: She tried to lift the box, but found it impossible to do.
lift.zh: 她試了試舉起箱子，但舉不起來。

refrigerator.en: There's a bottle of white wine in the refrigerator.
refrigerator.zh: 冰箱裡有一瓶白葡萄酒。

dirty.en: Don't touch this with your dirty hands.

rent.en: Tom can barely afford to pay rent let alone buy a PC.
rent.zh: 湯姆連房租都快付不起，更別說買一台電腦了。

abroad.en: His large income enables him to travel abroad every year.
abroad.zh: 他的收入很高，所以每年都能出國旅行。

offend.en: I didn't mean to offend anyone.

belong.en: Iceland used to belong to Denmark.

express.en: She was at a loss for words to express her feeling.
express.zh: 她已经无法用语言表达她的感觉了。

imagine.en: I imagine that you are wondering when your new PC will arrive.
imagine.zh: 我猜您一定想知道您的新電腦什麼時候到貨。

notebook.en: Tom wrote down something in his notebook.
notebook.zh: 湯姆在他的筆記本上寫了東西。

pilot.en: My dream is to become a pilot.
pilot.zh: 我的梦想是成为一名飞行员。

direct.en: Are there any direct flights between Boston and Sydney?
direct.zh: 请问波士顿和悉尼之间有直飞航班吗？

tour.en: How much is the tour per person?

get.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
get.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

ribbon.en: The girl wore a yellow ribbon in her hair.
ribbon.zh: 那女孩的头发上绑了一根黄丝带。

climb.en: He was the first man to climb Mt. Fuji in the winter.
climb.zh: 他是第一個在冬季攀登富士山的人。

differ.en: I'm afraid that I differ with you on this point.
differ.zh: 恐怕就这点上，我和你持不同意见。

public.en: I've been a public school teacher for the past thirteen years.
public.zh: 過去 13 年，我都是公立學校的老師。

immediately.en: If someone irritates you, it is best not to react immediately.
immediately.zh: 如果有人激怒你，你最好不要立刻做出反应。

cow.en: I don't like being the one who always has to milk the cow.
cow.zh: 我不喜欢做那个总是挤牛奶的人。

toast.en: I always have coffee and toast for breakfast.
toast.zh: 我的早餐總是咖啡和土司。

scenery.en: The tourists were fascinated with the exquisite scenery.
scenery.zh: 觀光客被獨特的景致所吸引。

fun.en: It's fun to learn slang words in foreign languages.
fun.zh: 学习外语里的俚语很有趣。

living.en: I think that our living together has influenced your habits.
living.zh: 我觉得我和你一起住影响了你生活的方式。

worth.en: That coat may have cost a lot of money, but it's worth it.
worth.zh: 那件大衣可能需要很多錢，但它值得。

enthusiasm.zh: 汤姆没有感受到玛丽的热情。

tip.en: His name was on the tip of my tongue, but I couldn't remember it.
tip.zh: 我都快要说出他的名字了，可就是记不起来。

execute.zh: 我们必须执行他的命令。

conceal.zh: 汤姆不能掩饰他的失望。

certain.en: I'm certain that Tom is the only one who won't do that.
certain.zh: 我确信汤姆是唯一不会那么做的人。

youth.en: Whenever I hear that song, I remember my youth.
youth.zh: 每次听到这首歌，都会让我回忆起自己年轻的时候。

fact.en: I think to clearly distinguish opinion from fact is important.
fact.zh: 我认为辨别清楚意见和事实很重要。

cool.en: I was quite thirsty and wanted to drink something cool.

governor.en: Everybody wished he had been elected governor.
governor.zh: 每個人都希望他當選州長。

program.en: If you do not have this program, you can download it now.
program.zh: 假如你没有这个程序，你现在就可以去下载。

illness.en: We take health for granted until illness intervenes.
illness.zh: 我們視健康為理所當然, 直到疾病侵襲。

population.en: The population of Japan is larger than that of New Zealand.
population.zh: 日本的人口比新西兰多。

order.en: A new team was formed in order to take part in the boat race.
order.zh: 为了参加划船比赛，一支新的队伍组成了。

learning.en: I know that you are learning French at school.
learning.zh: 我知道你在學校學法語。

everywhere.en: I've looked everywhere, but I can't find my book.
everywhere.zh: 我什麼地方都找過了, 但卻找不到我的書。

stage.en: Are there any famous musicians on the stage?
stage.zh: 舞台上有著名音乐家吗？

everyone.en: Everyone in the room checked their watches at the same time.
everyone.zh: 房间里的所有人都同时看了看自己的手表。

honey.en: How much honey do you want me to put in your tea?
honey.zh: 你想讓我在你的茶裡放多少蜂蜜？

calendar.en: She hung the calendar on the wall.

manual.en: Can you drive a manual transmission?

cabinet.en: The tablecloth is in the cabinet.

more.en: The best way to lose weight is to eat less and exercise more.
more.zh: 最好的減肥方法就是少吃多運動。

apple.en: There has been a good apple harvest this year.

never.en: I had never seen a windmill until I visited the Netherlands.
never.zh: 在我去荷兰之前，我从没见过风车。

laughter.en: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
laughter.zh: 没有笑声的一天肯定是最为虚度的一天。

impressive.en: You've both been very impressive today. I'm proud of you.
impressive.zh: 今天你们俩很让人印象深刻。我为你们感到骄傲。

fourteen.en: My father died of a subarachnoid hemorrhage when I was fourteen.
fourteen.zh: 我十四岁的时候，父亲死于蛛网膜下出血。

on.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
on.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

stack.en: Tom put a stack of letters on Mary's desk.
stack.zh: 湯姆把一疊信放在瑪麗桌上。

animal.en: Man is the only animal that can make use of fire.
animal.zh: 人是唯一会使用火的动物。

mend.en: He got his wife to mend his shirt.
mend.zh: 他让他的妻子补好衬衫。

dozen.en: Tom has been to this park with Mary at least a dozen times.
dozen.zh: 湯姆跟瑪麗來這公園至少十二次。

emphasis.en: He placed emphasis on the importance of education.
emphasis.zh: 他强调了教育的重要性。

shortage.en: The recent coffee shortage brought about many problems.
shortage.zh: 近来咖啡的短缺造成了许多问题。

contrary.en: Mary is not poor. On the contrary, she is quite rich.
contrary.zh: 玛丽不穷，相反，她相当富裕。

tunnel.en: This tunnel is twice as long as that one.
tunnel.zh: 這條隧道是那條的兩倍長。

hedge.en: The cat got through the hedge.

electrical.en: Keep away from the electrical equipment.

artificial.en: Artificial leather can't compare with the real thing.
artificial.zh: 人造皮革是比不上真皮的。

grateful.en: I'd be grateful to you if you could teach me to do that.
grateful.zh: 如果你能教我怎麼做，我會很感激。

personal.en: Tom doesn't care about protecting his personal information online.
personal.zh: 湯姆上網時並不在乎個人資訊的保護。

shift.en: Tom is working the night shift.

preceding.en: The third quarter GNP growth was 1% over the preceding quarter.
preceding.zh: 第三季國民生產總值較上一季成長了1％。

board.en: The board unanimously decided to appoint her as CEO.
board.zh: 董事会一致决定任命她为执行总裁。

jar.en: Tom picked up the jar and read the label.

child.en: When I was a child, I spent most of my time indoors reading.
child.zh: 当我是个孩子的时候，我会把大部分时间都用于室内阅读。

education.en: Parents are responsible for their children's education.
education.zh: 父母承担教育子女的责任。

downstairs.en: Someone is waiting for you downstairs.

hare.en: It is not easy to catch a hare with your bare hands.
hare.zh: 空手赤拳抓野兔並不容易。

brook.en: The murmur of the brook lulls me to sleep.

may.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
may.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

artistic.en: He was raised in an artistic family.

fee.en: I have no objection to paying a special fee if it is necessary.
fee.zh: 如果必要的话，我不反对付特别费用。

sincere.en: Any emotion, if it is sincere, is involuntary.
sincere.zh: 任何情绪，只要它是真诚的，就说明它是发自内心的自然流露。

worthy.en: His behavior is worthy of respect.

breakfast.en: I am in the habit of taking some exercise before breakfast.
breakfast.zh: 我在吃早餐前有運動的習慣。

notice.en: Tom didn't notice that Mary had a new hairstyle.
notice.zh: 湯姆沒注意到瑪莉換了新髮型。

money.en: I think I now have enough money to buy the car that I want.
money.zh: 我认为我现在有足够的钱买我想要的那辆车。

best.en: This is one of the best restaurants that I've ever eaten in.
best.zh: 这是我吃过的最好的餐馆之一。

meet.en: You must've been surprised to meet your teacher in such a place.
meet.zh: 在那种地方碰到你的老师，你应该很惊讶吧。

beginning.en: I hope that this is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
beginning.zh: 希望這是美好友誼的開始。

juice.en: My mother bought two bottles of orange juice.

meadow.en: Cows are eating grass in the meadow.

fish.en: The skin of a shark is much rougher than that of a tuna fish.
fish.zh: 鯊魚皮比金槍魚皮粗糙多了。

lose.en: The best way to lose weight is to eat less and exercise more.
lose.zh: 最好的減肥方法就是少吃多運動。

man.en: It was heartless of him to say such a thing to the sick man.
man.zh: 他对一个生病的男人说这种事真是没良心。

mere.en: You're no longer a mere child.
mere.zh: 你不再只是一个孩子了。

bell.en: As soon as the bell rang, the teacher came into the classroom.
bell.zh: 鐘聲一響起，老師就走進了教室。

mean.en: I may be unsociable, but it doesn't mean I don't talk to people.
mean.zh: 我或许不善于社交,但这并不意味我不和别人交谈。

surrender.en: If Tom doesn't surrender, shoot him.
surrender.zh: 如果湯姆不投降，就開槍

english.en: Every great writer seems to have been interested in English.
english.zh: 每一個偉大的作家似乎已經對英語感興趣。

gardener.en: The gardener turned out to be the murderer.
gardener.zh: 园丁后来发现就是凶手。

call.en: "Shall I have him call you when he gets back?" "Yes, please."
call.zh: “等他回来，我要让他给你打电话吗？”“是的，谢谢。”

pleasant.en: She had a pleasant dream last night.

adopt.en: If you can't have children, you could always adopt.
adopt.zh: 如果你不能有孩子，你总能领养。

master.en: It's quite difficult to master French in 2 or 3 years.

pipe.en: Water poured from the broken pipe.
pipe.zh: 水從破裂的水管傾瀉而出。

bike.en: Apart from on rainy days, I always ride my bike to work.
bike.zh: 除了雨天，我都是骑车去上班的。

canoe.en: We went down a river by canoe.
canoe.zh: 我們乘著獨木舟向河的下游而行。

double.en: Prices are double what they were ten years ago.

extreme.en: Your proposal is a bit extreme.

elevator.en: After asking for my key at the front desk, I took the elevator to my floor.
elevator.zh: 我到櫃檯拿了鑰匙，然後就乘電梯去了我房間的樓層。

kilogram.en: Rice is sold by the kilogram.
kilogram.zh: 米以公斤為單位來出售。

industrial.en: Many people work in industrial towns.
industrial.zh: 许多人在工业城市工作。

swear.en: I could swear there's something inside this box.
swear.zh: 我能发誓这箱子里有东西。

departure.en: With the weather getting worse, the departure was put off.
departure.zh: 由于天气变差，出发延迟了。

break.en: I slept a little during lunch break because I was so tired.
break.zh: 我在午休时间睡了一会儿，因为我太累了。

capital.en: A capital letter is used at the beginning of a sentence.
capital.zh: 一個句子以一個大寫字母開始。

progress.en: In recent years, science has made remarkable progress.
progress.zh: 这几年，科学取得了显著的进步。

exam.en: The date of the festival coincides with that of the exam.
exam.zh: 节日和考试碰巧在同一天。

possibly.en: Could you possibly suggest a way to solve the problem?
possibly.zh: 你能提出解决问题的方法吗？

roll.en: He was absent at roll call.

repair.en: I will only buy the car if they repair the brakes first.
repair.zh: 除非他们事先修好刹车，我才会买车子。

broken.en: They accused me of having broken my promise.
broken.zh: 他们指责我没有信守诺言。

lecture.en: It is not necessary for us to attend this lecture.
lecture.zh: 我們沒有必要出席這個講座。

recommendation.en: Tom got the job on the strength of your recommendation.
recommendation.zh: 多亏了你的推荐，汤姆得到了那份工作。

kid.en: When I heard that song, it reminded me of when I was a kid.
kid.zh: 我一聽到那首歌，就想起來我小的時候。

become.en: When we are told not to come, we become all the more eager to go.
become.zh: 让我们别来，我们就更想来了。

rid.en: I've had a headache for three days and I can't get rid of it.
rid.zh: 我已经头疼三天了，还没摆脱它。

land.en: He bought the land for the purpose of building a house on it.
land.zh: 他买土地目的是要造房子。

prison.en: In some countries, the punishment for treason can be life in prison.
prison.zh: 在一些國家，叛國罪的懲罰可以是終身監禁。

modest.en: After winning the Nobel prize, she remained as modest as ever.
modest.zh: 獲得諾貝爾獎後，她仍謙虛如昔。

leather.en: Artificial leather can't compare with the real thing.
leather.zh: 人造皮革是比不上真皮的。

length.en: The length of this ship is 30 meters.

grammatical.en: He made a few grammatical mistakes.

label.en: Tom picked up the jar and read the label.

professor.en: The professor spoke too fast for anyone to understand.
professor.zh: 那个教授讲得太快了，没有一个人听得懂。

nothing.en: As far as I know, there is nothing wrong with his plan.
nothing.zh: 據我所知，他的計畫沒有出差錯。

palm.en: I am interested in palm reading.
palm.zh: 我对掌上阅读很感兴趣。

limit.en: My patience is nearing its limit.

cold.en: My fingers are so numb with cold that I can't play the piano.
cold.zh: 我的手指冻僵了，以至于无法弹钢琴了。

forget.en: Don't forget to come and pick me up at the train station.

appear.en: The king will appear in person tomorrow evening.

price.en: Strawberries sell for a high price in the winter.

emotion.en: Any emotion, if it is sincere, is involuntary.
emotion.zh: 任何情绪，只要它是真诚的，就说明它是发自内心的自然流露。

worst.en: Leaving something unfinished is the worst thing you can do.
worst.zh: 半途而废是你所能做的最糟糕的事情。

terrible.en: Tom can write almost like a native speaker, but his pronunciation is terrible.
terrible.zh: Tom写作可以写的像本国人一样，可是他的发音很烂

dollar.en: This little baby tore up a 10 dollar bill.
dollar.zh: 這個小嬰孩撕掉了一張十美元的鈔票。

answer.en: Do you really need to ask the question to know the answer?
answer.zh: 你真的需要提问题来知道答案吗？

learn.en: Some babies learn to swim even before they are one year old.
learn.zh: 有些宝宝甚至在一岁之前就学习游泳了。

friendly.en: I'm going to stop trying to be friendly with you.

pale.en: He told me that I looked pale and asked me what the matter was.
pale.zh: 他跟我说我很苍白，并问我怎么了。

nuclear.en: All of us would like to get rid of nuclear weapons.
nuclear.zh: 我們所有的人都想除掉核子武器。

gentleman.en: The man I saw yesterday was a complete gentleman.
gentleman.zh: 我昨天見到的男人根本是紳士。

exactly.en: Tom didn't know exactly what it was that Mary wanted him to do.
exactly.zh: 汤姆不知道玛丽到底让他做什么。

hawk.en: One of the hawk's wings is broken.

disease.en: The number of people suffering from heart disease has increased.
disease.zh: 遭受心脏病困扰的人数增加了。

french.en: Tom translated a letter from French to English for his boss.
french.zh: 汤姆为他的老板把一封信从法语翻译成了英语。

basket.en: Tom put the large picnic basket on the passenger seat next to him.
basket.zh: 汤姆把那个大野餐篮子放在他旁边的乘客座位上。

interpreter.en: My uncle made me serve as interpreter.

mountain.en: What mountain do you think is the second highest in Japan?
mountain.zh: 你认为日本第二高峰是哪座山？

activity.en: Watching TV is a passive activity.
activity.zh: 看電視是一種被動的活動。

lung.en: That man died of lung cancer a week ago.
lung.zh: 那个男人在一周前死于肺癌。

throughout.en: Throughout the five years of painful cancer treatments, he managed to keep a stiff upper lip.
throughout.zh: 这五年痛苦的癌症治疗他终于坚持下来了。

spring.en: Do you know why spring rolls are called spring rolls?
spring.zh: 你知道春卷为什么叫春卷吗？

home.en: I would rather stay at home than go out in this hot weather.
home.zh: 在这种暑天里我宁愿呆在家也不出去。

grammar.en: In Esperanto there are only 16 grammar rules.
grammar.zh: 世界語只有16個語法規則。

army.en: I had been in the army for a month when the war ended.
army.zh: 戰爭結束的時候，我已經在軍隊裡待了一箇月。

clock.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
clock.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

ladder.en: Is this ladder strong enough to bear my weight?
ladder.zh: 这个梯子是否足够坚固以承受我的重量？

doubt.en: Tom didn't doubt that there would be a lot of people there.
doubt.zh: 汤姆确定那里会有很多人。

fork.en: We've come to a fork in the road.

course.en: A cooking course should be mandatory in schools.
course.zh: 烹饪课程应该作为学校的必修课。

envy.en: I envy the friendship Tom and Mary have.

native.en: This book is for students whose native language is not Japanese.
native.zh: 這本書是給母語不是日語的學生的。

purchase.en: You cannot purchase this medicine without a prescription.
purchase.zh: 那个药的话没有处方是买不到的。

explode.en: A spark caused the gunpowder to explode.

scissors.en: These scissors are suitable for left and right-handed people.
scissors.zh: 這把剪刀左右撇子都適用。

flag.en: The colors of the American flag are red, white and blue.
flag.zh: 美国国旗的颜色是红白蓝。

person.en: It seems as if I'm the only person here capable of doing it.
person.zh: 看来我是这里唯一有能力做这件事的人。

cliff.en: They'd have been killed if the car had gone over the cliff.
cliff.zh: 车子若是掉落悬崖他们早就没命了。

hair.en: Blondes earn 7% more than women with any other hair color.
hair.zh: 金髮女郎比其他顏色頭髮的女人多賺7％。

clever.en: He looks like a clever boy.
clever.zh: 他看起來像是個聰明的男孩。

chimney.en: Smoke is rising from the chimney.

orphan.en: He became an orphan when he was ten.

plane.en: According to TV news, there was a plane crash in India.
plane.zh: 根据电视新闻，一架飞机在印度坠毁了。

queen.en: Queen Elizabeth I passed away in 1603.
queen.zh: 女王伊麗莎白一世於1603年去世。

really.en: My younger brother really likes to take photos of mountains.
really.zh: 我弟弟很喜欢拍山的照片。

hook.en: Hang your coat on the hook.
hook.zh: 把你的外套掛在鉤子上。

meeting.en: Nobody noticed that she was absent until the meeting ended.
meeting.zh: 直到会议结束之前都没人注意到她不在。

property.en: He passed his property on to his son.
property.zh: 他把他的财产传给了他儿子。

correct.en: I'm looking for a native speaker who could help me correct this essay.
correct.zh: 我正在尋找可以幫我修改這篇論文的母語人士。

month.en: Is there any chance that you'll go to Australia next month?
month.zh: 你有機會下箇月去澳大利亞嗎？

destination.en: They made straight for their destination.

purse.en: It was not until I reached home that I missed my purse.
purse.zh: 那是在我到家以后，我才不见了我的钱包。

trust.en: I didn't trust Tom and he didn't trust me, either.
trust.zh: 我不信任汤姆而且汤姆也不信任我。

quick.en: The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy brown dog.
quick.zh: 身手矯健的棕狐狸躍過懶洋洋的棕狗。

hunger.en: Many people are suffering from hunger around the world.

knowledge.en: He doesn't have any knowledge about American democracy.
knowledge.zh: 他一点都不知道美国的民主。

dish.en: I'd like to have this meat dish with your best white wine.
dish.zh: 我想喝著你最好的白酒吃這肉。

orchestra.en: Do you know the concert schedule of London Symphony Orchestra?
orchestra.zh: 你知道伦敦交响乐团的演奏会行程吗？

come.en: He was aware that I was around, but didn't come to greet me.
come.zh: 他注意到我在場，但是沒向我打招呼。

lion.en: If the lion is the king of beasts, the eagle is the king of birds.
lion.zh: 狮子是兽类之王的话，鹰就是鸟类之王。

type.en: I'm the type who gets nervous in front of people, so I'm bad at speech making.
type.zh: 我是那种面对人群很紧张的人，所以我的演讲能力很差。

pleasure.en: It has always been a pleasure to work with you.

experiment.en: Three months is too short a time to finish the experiment.
experiment.zh: 要完成实验，三个月太短了。

mind.en: What image did you have in mind as you painted this picture?
mind.zh: 画这幅画的时候你脑海中浮现出了什么图像？

blow.en: Blow out all the candles on the birthday cake at once.
blow.zh: 一口气吹灭生日蛋糕上所有的蜡烛。

model.en: I'd like to try out this new model before I buy it.
model.zh: 我想在买之前先试试这个新机型。

compass.en: Compass needles point to the north.
compass.zh: 指南针的指针指向北边。

probably.en: The train will probably arrive at the station before noon.
probably.zh: 火车大概会在中午前到站。

library.en: Taking the group of children to the library was no problem.
library.zh: 带孩子团体去图书馆一点问题都没有。

my.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
my.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

nephew.en: My nephew is allergic to eggs.

rarely.en: Sociopaths rarely display remorse or feelings of guilt for their crimes.
rarely.zh: 反社会者极少为他们的罪行显露懊悔或有罪恶的感觉。

itself.en: Just pull the door shut. It'll lock by itself.
itself.zh: 只要推门就好了。它自己会锁上的。

journey.en: Reading a book can be compared to a journey.
journey.zh: 阅读一本书可以比作一次旅行。

bite.en: If you bite me, I'll bite you back.
bite.zh: 如果你咬我，我就咬回来。

bullet.en: Tom was wearing a bulletproof vest, so the bullet didn't kill him.
bullet.zh: 湯姆穿著一件防彈衣，所以子彈沒把他殺死。

history.en: If you want to know a country, you must learn its history.
history.zh: 如果想了解一个国家，就必须学习这个国家的历史。

list.en: She went over the list to see if her name was there.
list.zh: 她走過去看看她的名字是否在清單上。

new.en: The only useful answers are those that raise new questions.
new.zh: 只有能提出新问题的回答才是有用的回答。

van.en: Tom was the last one to get in the van.
van.zh: 汤姆是最后一个上面包车的。

early.en: If for some reason they come early, please tell them to wait.
early.zh: 如果他们由于什么原因早到的话，请转达他们再等一会儿。

number.en: The number of traffic accidents seems to be on the increase.
number.zh: 交通事故的数量似乎在增长。

hint.en: Would you give me a hint?
hint.zh: 你可以给我一个提示吗？

tolerate.en: I can't tolerate this noise any longer.
tolerate.zh: 我不能再忍受這個噪音了。

flash.en: The flash wasn't working, so he couldn't take a picture in the dark.
flash.zh: 因为闪光灯坏了，他不能在黑暗中拍照。

flour.en: Mix the flour with two eggs.
flour.zh: 把麵粉和兩顆雞蛋混合。

catch.en: She tossed me grapes and I tried to catch them with my mouth.
catch.zh: 她朝我丢葡萄，我试着用嘴接住它们。

purple.en: I like the gray sweater more than the purple one.
purple.zh: 比起紫色的毛衣，我更喜歡灰色的毛衣。

feed.en: If you feed your dog properly, you can increase his lifespan.
feed.zh: 合理地喂狗可以延长宠物寿命。

league.en: Tom is out of your league.

finding.en: We're finding it difficult deciding on which one to buy.
finding.zh: 我们觉得很难决定买哪一个。

foreign.en: My father has been engaged in foreign trade for many years.

shave.en: I've got to shave before leaving.

following.en: The girl was always following her mother.
following.zh: 那女孩不管到哪兒都跟著母親。

play.en: Because of the rain, we weren't able to play tennis outside.
play.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

prince.en: Prince William is second in line to the English throne.
prince.zh: 威廉王子是英国王位第二顺位继承人

insurance.en: Cosmetic surgery is not covered by most insurance plans.
insurance.zh: 大部份的保險計劃不包含整容手術。

farther.en: Columbus sailed farther west to look for a new continent.
farther.zh: 哥伦布航行至遥远的西方，去寻找一个新大陆。

mist.en: A boat suddenly appeared out of the mist.
mist.zh: 一艘船突然从雾中出现。

wit.en: I lost my job and I have no money. I'm at my wit's end.
wit.zh: 我失業又沒錢。真不知該何去何從。

noise.en: I can't concentrate on my work because of the noise.
noise.zh: 由于噪音，我无法集中精力工作了。

masterpiece.en: I think that Liszt's "Forgotten Waltz No.3" is a hidden masterpiece.
masterpiece.zh: 我觉得李斯特的《被遗忘的圆舞曲第三首》是个被埋没的名曲。

compute.en: Scientists can easily compute the distance between planets.
compute.zh: 科學家們可以很容易地計算出行星之間的距離。

difficulty.en: I got over the difficulty with my characteristic tenacity.

electricity.en: Austria is one of the largest producers of electricity in Europe.
electricity.zh: 澳大利亚在欧洲是最大的电能生产国之一。

past.en: I don't know about the past, but now we have faxes and emails.
past.zh: 我不知道以前怎样，但现在我们有传真和电子邮件。

temple.en: Do you know which deity this temple is dedicated to?
temple.zh: 您知道这座庙宇供奉的是哪个神吗？

group.en: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
group.zh: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

stranger.en: I'm a stranger here myself. I'm afraid I can't help you.
stranger.zh: 我對這裡不熟。恐怕我不能幫你。

present.en: Between you and me, I'm going to quit my present job soon.
present.zh: 我只跟你说，我很快就要辞掉我现在的工作了。

frog.en: I cannot distinguish a frog from a toad.
frog.zh: 我无法区分青蛙和蟾蜍。

music.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
music.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

simply.en: Doing that is simply out of the question.

heart.en: The number of people suffering from heart disease has increased.
heart.zh: 遭受心脏病困扰的人数增加了。

easily.en: Scientists can easily compute the distance between planets.
easily.zh: 科學家們可以很容易地計算出行星之間的距離。

burn.en: When you've finished reading this letter, burn it.
burn.zh: 看完这封信请把它烧掉。

leadership.zh: 湯姆天生具有領導能力。

jealous.en: You must not be jealous of others' success.
jealous.zh: 不要嫉妒其他人的成功。

can.en: I can usually tell when someone is hiding something from me.
can.zh: 我常常能分辨出来一个人是不是瞒着我什么事情。

cotton.en: Someday I'll buy a cotton candy machine.
cotton.zh: 有一天我买了一台棉花糖机。

european.zh: 亚美尼亚语是一门印欧语言。

explain.en: Tom doesn't quite get it. Could you explain it to him again?
explain.zh: 湯姆不大明白。你能再跟他解釋一遍嗎？

natural.en: The United States is abundant in natural resources.
natural.zh: 美国的自然资源很丰富。

clean.en: Because Tom didn't thoroughly clean the pots, Mary got dysentery.
clean.zh: 湯姆沒有徹底清洗鍋碗瓢盆，導致瑪莉得了痢疾。

rain.en: Because of the rain, we weren't able to play tennis outside.
rain.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

eighth.en: Neptune is the eighth planet of the solar system.
eighth.zh: 海王星是太阳系第八个行星。

bread.en: I just remembered that I was supposed to buy a loaf of bread.
bread.zh: 我才想起来我之前该买个面包。

sorrow.en: No words can express her deep sorrow.

inspect.en: Sir, can we quickly inspect your luggage please?
inspect.zh: 先生，我們可以檢查一下您的行李嗎？

beautiful.en: I hope that this is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
beautiful.zh: 希望這是美好友誼的開始。

freedom.en: Freedom is the center of American democracy.
freedom.zh: 美國民主的中心思想是自由。

touch.en: If there's anything urgent, you can get in touch with me.
touch.zh: 紧急情况下，您可以联系我。

package.en: Did you get the package that I sent you?
package.zh: 你收到我寄給你的包裹了嗎？

part.en: Dr. Yukawa played an important part in the scientific study.
part.zh: 汤川博士在科学研究上起了很重要的作用。

credit.en: Tom almost always uses a credit card when he goes shopping.
credit.zh: 汤姆在去购物的时候，几乎每次都会用信用卡。

judge.en: The prisoner was brought before a judge.
judge.zh: 這個囚犯被帶到法官面前。

decision.en: His decision to retire surprised all of us.
decision.zh: 他要退休的決定讓我們都感到吃驚。

satellite.en: The moon is the earth's only satellite.
satellite.zh: 月球是地球唯一的卫星。

drawing.en: She succeeded in drawing the truth from him.
drawing.zh: 她成功地从他口中得知了真相。

ago.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
ago.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

poem.en: After climbing Mt. Fuji, I got the inspiration for a poem.
poem.zh: 攀登富士山後，我得到了一首詩的靈感。

hear.en: Could you please talk a bit louder? I can't hear very well.
hear.zh: 你能大声点讲吗？我听不太清。

creature.en: Tom says that he's a creature of habit.
creature.zh: 汤姆说他是习惯的产物。

solar.en: The nearest star to our solar system is Proxima Centauri.
solar.zh: 離我們太陽系最近的恆星是比鄰星。

sort.en: He was always annoyed in the city by noises of one sort or another.
sort.zh: 他在城市里一直受到噪音或者其他的干扰。

permit.en: Will you permit me to go there?

describe.en: Can you describe to me the difference between black tea and green tea?
describe.zh: 你能告诉我红茶和绿茶的区别吗？

author.en: This is the room where the author killed himself.
author.zh: 这就是那个作家自杀的房间。

happy.en: Tom would do practically anything to keep Mary happy.
happy.zh: 為了哄瑪莉開心，湯姆幾乎會做任何事。

pen.en: What have you done with my pen? It was here a minute ago.
pen.zh: 你把我的鋼筆怎麼了? 一分鐘前它還在這裡。

nonsense.en: That's nonsense. Nobody but a fool would believe it.
nonsense.zh: 那是無稽之談。只有傻瓜才會相信。

sack.en: It's time to hit the sack.

next.en: I think you should let Tom know you can't do that next week.
next.zh: 我認為你應該告訴湯姆你下週做不了。

tone.en: He doesn't realise that he's tone deaf.
tone.zh: 他不知道他自己五音不全。

stove.en: A plastic dish will melt on the stove.
stove.zh: 塑料盘子在烤箱里会化的。

adjective.en: In this case, the adjective goes before the noun.
adjective.zh: 在这种情况下，形容词放在名词前面。

knee.en: I played with the baby on my knee.

artist.en: The artist who illustrated this book is very good.
artist.zh: 給這本書畫插畫的畫家很好。

mail.en: Please send me a reply as soon as you receive this mail.
mail.zh: 收到此邮件后请尽快给我答复。

cloud.en: That cloud looks like a rabbit to me.
cloud.zh: 那朵云对我来说像一只兔子。

busy.en: I was busy packing, because I was leaving for France in two days.
busy.zh: 我当时正忙着打包，因为我两天后要去法国。

secretary.en: She's determined to become a secretary.

deadly.en: The tip of the spear was dipped in a deadly poison.
deadly.zh: 矛尖浸在一種致命的毒藥裡。

bloom.en: This week the cherry blossoms in the park are in full bloom.

railroad.en: The railroad is parallel to the road.

brother.en: My younger brother really likes to take photos of mountains.
brother.zh: 我弟弟很喜欢拍山的照片。

inch.en: Give him an inch and he'll take a yard.

coffee.en: I do not like tea, so I generally drink coffee for breakfast.
coffee.zh: 我不喜欢茶，所以我早餐大致上都喝咖啡。

as.en: I don't think that Tom was as generous as he should've been.

elementary.en: They became friends in elementary school.
elementary.zh: 他們在小學時就是朋友了。

editor.en: You don't want to be an editor?

coin.en: I found a coin on the sidewalk.
coin.zh: 我在人行道上發現了一枚硬幣。

definite.en: I cannot give you a definite answer today.
definite.zh: 我今天无法给您一个最终的答复。

tourist.en: Visiting all the tourist sights really wore me out.
tourist.zh: 參觀所有觀光勝地累壞了我。

taste.en: You might not like this beer at first. It's an acquired taste.
taste.zh: 剛開始的時候你可能不會喜歡這個啤酒。這是需要多次品嚐去習慣它的口味。

ending.en: I don't want to spoil the ending for you.
ending.zh: 我不想把結局提前透露給你。

nearly.en: Action speaks louder than words, but not nearly as often.
nearly.zh: 行胜于言，但并不是所有情况都是这样。

away.en: She folded up the towels and put them away in the cupboard.
away.zh: 她把毛巾折叠好再放入柜子里。

lawyer.en: He is reputed the best lawyer in this city.
lawyer.zh: 他被认为是这座城市里最好的律师。

smart.en: He is as smart as any other boy in the class.
smart.zh: 他和班上其他男生一样聪明。

floor.en: He was discovered unconscious on the floor of the kitchen.
floor.zh: 他被人发现倒在厨房的地板上，不省人事。

blackboard.en: Take this piece of chalk and write on the blackboard.
blackboard.zh: 拿起這支粉筆，在黑板上寫字。

forecast.en: The weather forecast says that it's going to snow this evening.
forecast.zh: 天氣預報說今晚會下雪。

now.en: If I were you, I'd want to know what Tom is doing right now.
now.zh: 如果我是你，我不会想去知道Tom现在正在做什么。

believe.en: I can't believe your parents let you come here by yourself.
believe.zh: 我不敢相信你父母让你自己过来。

mile.en: A mile is equal to about 1,600 meters.

graduate.en: Tom will graduate from high school the year after next.
graduate.zh: 湯姆將在後年高中畢業。

club.en: Because of his wealth, he was able to become a member of that club.
club.zh: 由於他的財富，他能夠成為這個俱樂部的成員。

hammer.en: To the man who only has a hammer in the toolkit, every problem looks like a nail.
hammer.zh: 对工具箱里只有一把榔头的人来说，所有的问题都像钉子。

guess.en: I guess that you heard about what happened this morning.
guess.zh: 我想你听说今天早上发生什么了。

desirable.en: It is the things that we do not possess which seem to us most desirable.
desirable.zh: 得不到的东西就最想得到。

bottom.en: She is always at the bottom of the class.
bottom.zh: 她总是在班上拿倒数第一。

bud.en: The trees are beginning to bud.

australia.en: I wonder if Tom really wanted to go to Australia with Mary.
australia.zh: 我怀疑汤姆是不是真的想和玛丽一起去澳大利亚。

choose.en: You may choose whichever book you like.
choose.zh: 你可以選擇任何你喜歡的書。

nowadays.en: Everybody is immune to smallpox nowadays.
nowadays.zh: 現今每個人都對天花免疫了。

fall.en: He was about to fall asleep, when he heard his name called.
fall.zh: 他快要睡著的時候，聽到有人在叫他的名字。

furious.en: When Tom found out about that, he was furious.
furious.zh: 当汤姆发现这件事时，他很生气。

tap.en: There's a chance that tap water may contain harmful substances like chlorine and lead.
tap.zh: 自來水有可能含有氯、鉛等有害物質。

be.en: If it had not been for civil war, they would be wealthy now.
be.zh: 要不是当初有内战，他们现在应该挺富裕了。

politics.en: Lots of people in Japan are indifferent to politics.
politics.zh: 很多日本人對政治冷淡。

heavily.en: I had hardly left home when it began to rain heavily.
heavily.zh: 當雨開始下得很大的時候, 我幾乎不能出門了。

operate.en: The doctor decided to operate at once.

record.en: His record is a new world record in the 100-meter dash.
record.zh: 他刷新了百米短跑的世界紀錄。

meat.en: I'd like to have this meat dish with your best white wine.
meat.zh: 我想喝著你最好的白酒吃這肉。

arm.en: Let go of my arm! I can't stand people touching me.
arm.zh: 放開我的手臂！我不能忍受有人碰我。

lip.en: Throughout the five years of painful cancer treatments, he managed to keep a stiff upper lip.
lip.zh: 这五年痛苦的癌症治疗他终于坚持下来了。

excuse.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
excuse.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

noisy.en: Japan is an extremely noisy country.
noisy.zh: 日本是一個非常嘈雜的國家。

her.en: He said that if he knew her address, he would write to her.
her.zh: 他说如果他知道她的地址，他会写信给她。

rather.en: I would rather stay at home than go out in this hot weather.
rather.zh: 在这种暑天里我宁愿呆在家也不出去。

liquid.en: Water is liquid. When it freezes, it becomes solid.
liquid.zh: 水是液体。冻起来就成了固体。

dinner.en: Thanks very much for having me to dinner the other night.
dinner.zh: 谢谢那天晚上请我吃了饭。

kill.en: The kidnapper told me he'd kill Tom if I didn't show up alone.
kill.zh: 绑匪告诉我我如果不独自出现他就会把汤姆杀了。

cough.en: Cover your mouth when you cough, sneeze, or yawn.
cough.zh: 你咳嗽、打喷嚏或打哈欠的时候要捂住你的嘴。

composition.en: I had my composition corrected by the teacher.
composition.zh: 我把我的作文拿給老師訂正。

verify.en: I can verify that that's the truth myself.
verify.zh: 我自己能够证实那是真的。

it.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
it.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

comb.en: Comb your hair before you go out.
comb.zh: 在你出門之前，把你的頭髮梳一梳。

especially.en: I like to listen to music, especially jazz.
especially.zh: 我喜歡聽音樂，特別是爵士音樂。

bottle.en: There's a bottle of white wine in the refrigerator.
bottle.zh: 冰箱裡有一瓶白葡萄酒。

crush.en: It looks like Tom has a crush on Mary.

ourselves.en: We enjoyed ourselves at the picnic.
ourselves.zh: 我們在野餐玩得很開心。

talent.en: I can't help admiring his talent.

happiness.en: It goes without saying that money cannot buy happiness.
happiness.zh: 不言自明，金钱买不到幸福。

january.en: January is usually the coldest month.
january.zh: 一月通常是最冷的月份。

faithful.en: The statue of Hachiko, the faithful dog, stands in front of Shibuya Station.
faithful.zh: 忠犬八公的雕像伫立在涩谷站前。

monkey.en: I'm not talking to you. I'm talking to the monkey.
monkey.zh: 我不是在跟你說話，我在跟猴子說話。

behalf.en: He is acting on his own behalf.

operator.en: The telephone operator asked the caller to hold on until a connection was made.
operator.zh: 电话运营商提示来电人等候接通。

humble.en: Be it ever so humble, there's no place like home.
humble.zh: 金窝银窝不如自己的狗窝。

democracy.en: He doesn't have any knowledge about American democracy.
democracy.zh: 他一点都不知道美国的民主。

city.en: The Eiffel Tower is in the same city as the Louvre Museum.
city.zh: 埃菲尔铁塔和卢浮宫在同一座城市。

spoil.en: I don't want to spoil the ending for you.
spoil.zh: 我不想把結局提前透露給你。

object.en: Most Americans do not object to my calling them by their first names.
object.zh: 大多数美国人似乎不反对我直呼其名。

american.en: The colors of the American flag are red, white and blue.
american.zh: 美国国旗的颜色是红白蓝。

pull.en: Could you please pull the weeds and water the flowers?
pull.zh: 你可不可以帮忙除草浇花？

mixture.en: Blend the mixture together until it is smooth.

october.en: The next meeting will be on the twentieth of October.

divorce.en: Marriage is the main cause of divorce.
divorce.zh: 婚姻是造成離婚的主因。

mad.en: Her eyes shone with joy when she saw that her mother was not mad at her.
mad.zh: 當她看到媽媽沒在生她的氣，她的雙眼因為幸福而閃爍了。

sacrifice.en: Would it be ethical to sacrifice one person to save many?
sacrifice.zh: 为了救许多人牺牲一个人是否道德？

various.en: Japan imports various raw materials from abroad.
various.zh: 日本從國外進口各種原料。

stuff.en: Can't you move your stuff to the other room?
stuff.zh: 你不能把你的东西搬去另一个房间吗？

boss.en: Tom translated a letter from French to English for his boss.
boss.zh: 汤姆为他的老板把一封信从法语翻译成了英语。

dying.en: Let's eat now. I'm dying of hunger.

indeed.en: A friend in need is a friend indeed.

occasionally.en: The mother occasionally reread her son's letter.
occasionally.zh: 这位母亲偶尔会重温她的儿子的信件。

human.en: Needless to say, fundamental human rights should be respected.
human.zh: 無須多言，基本人權應當被尊重。

adventure.en: He wrote a book about a jungle adventure.
adventure.zh: 他写了一本关于丛林冒险的书。

lover.en: She was seen at a restaurant with her lover.
lover.zh: 有人看見他和情人在飯店吃飯。

faint.en: I feel like I'm going to faint.

bed.en: She had already gone to bed when I phoned her at 11:00 p.m.
bed.zh: 23点我打电话给她的时候，她已经去睡觉了。

silent.en: Since he didn't know what to say, he remained silent.
silent.zh: 自从他不知道该说什么的时候，便一直沉默着。

greatly.en: She failed the examination and I was greatly disappointed.
greatly.zh: 令我非常伤心的是她考砸了。

pity.en: It is a pity that you cannot come to the party.

border.en: I was asked to show my passport at the border.
border.zh: 在邊境上，我被要求出示我的護照。

panel.en: A panel of experts discussed the plan.
panel.zh: 一個專家小組討論這個計劃。

wrap.en: Please wrap it like a Christmas present.
wrap.zh: 請把它包裝得像一個聖誕禮物。

passage.en: There's a secret passage on the left.
passage.zh: 在左边有一条秘密通道。

care.en: An aging population will require more spending on health care.
care.zh: 老龄化的人口需要更多医疗保健支出。

organic.en: Tom and Mary own a small organic farm.
organic.zh: 汤姆和玛丽拥有一个小型的有机农场。

easy.en: It hasn't been easy for Tom to deal with Mary's health problems.
easy.zh: 处理玛丽的健康问题对汤姆来说不容易。

hi.en: Hi, my name is Tom. What's your name?
hi.zh: 你好！我叫汤姆。你叫什么？

income.en: His large income enables him to travel abroad every year.
income.zh: 他的收入很高，所以每年都能出國旅行。

spark.en: A spark caused the gunpowder to explode.

meter.en: His record is a new world record in the 100-meter dash.
meter.zh: 他刷新了百米短跑的世界紀錄。

frequent.en: She's a frequent visitor to this country.

pure.en: The sample is not pure enough.

beyond.en: Have you ever seen Mt. Fuji? It is beautiful beyond description.
beyond.zh: 你看過富士山嗎? 它美得無法形容。

eager.en: When we are told not to come, we become all the more eager to go.
eager.zh: 让我们别来，我们就更想来了。

fox.en: The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy brown dog.
fox.zh: 身手矯健的棕狐狸躍過懶洋洋的棕狗。

penny.en: A penny saved is a penny earned.
penny.zh: 省下了一分錢，就等於賺了一分錢。

steam.en: Water turns into steam when it is boiled.

file.en: Do you know how to recover a deleted file?
file.zh: 你知道怎么恢复已删除的文件吗？

scientific.en: Dr. Yukawa played an important part in the scientific study.
scientific.zh: 汤川博士在科学研究上起了很重要的作用。

oil.en: Japan depends on foreign countries for oil.

cancer.en: Cancer can be cured easily if it is found in its first phase.
cancer.zh: 癌症如果在第一阶段被发现的话是很容易治愈的。

instantly.en: Tom was hit by a truck and died instantly.
instantly.zh: 湯姆被卡車撞到而且當場死亡。

chinese.en: It was an advantage having learned Chinese while I was in school.
chinese.zh: 在学校时我学了中文是个优势。

good.en: You can't fight a good fight with such a defeatist attitude.
good.zh: 抱著失敗主義的態度你無法打一場漂亮的仗。

monthly.en: How much is your monthly gas bill?
monthly.zh: 你每個月的瓦斯費多少錢？

dream.en: Do you ever dream about flying through the sky?
dream.zh: 你曾經夢想在天空飛翔嗎？

fuel.en: The fuel tank in the car is full.

modern.en: Modern technology has made our lives more comfortable.
modern.zh: 现代科学技术让我们的生活更加舒适。

common.en: Academic fraud is more common than you might think.
common.zh: 学术造假比你想象的普遍。

castle.en: There is a castle in the background of the picture.
castle.zh: 图片的背景是一座城堡。

ask.en: Do you really need to ask the question to know the answer?
ask.zh: 你真的需要提问题来知道答案吗？

dumb.en: Helen Keller was blind, deaf and dumb.
dumb.zh: 海倫凱勒眼盲，耳聾，又啞。

pin.en: It was so still that you would have heard a pin drop.
pin.zh: 安靜到連針掉在地上的聲音你都會聽得到。

curtain.en: A green carpet will not go with this blue curtain.
curtain.zh: 绿色的毯子和这条蓝色的帘子不配。

fog.en: London, where I live, used to be famous for its fog.
fog.zh: 我住的地方－倫敦，從前以霧聞名。

rotten.en: The oranges in this bag are rotten.
rotten.zh: 這個袋子裡的柳橙都爛了。

mysterious.en: This place has a mysterious atmosphere to it.
mysterious.zh: 这个地方的气氛很神秘。

diary.en: She has kept a diary for 3 years.
diary.zh: 她已經寫了三年的日記。

survive.en: Small businesses will have to tighten their belts to survive.
survive.zh: 中小企业要勒紧裤带才能存活。

bicycle.en: Could you lend me your bicycle for a couple of days?
bicycle.zh: 你能把你的自行车借我两天吗？

sausage.en: Have you ever seen sausage being made?

attack.en: The enemy made a strong attack on that building.
attack.zh: 敵人對那棟建築物使出了強力攻擊。

saw.en: She could hardly keep from laughing when she saw the dress.
saw.zh: 當她看到那件衣服, 她無法抑制自己的笑聲。

overseas.en: I'd like to make an overseas call.

for.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
for.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

healthy.en: You should eat plenty of fruit to keep healthy.
healthy.zh: 你應該吃大量的水果來保持健康。

actress.en: It's said that she's a well-known actress.
actress.zh: 我聽說她是個有名的演員。

economic.en: More money for education will spur economic growth.
economic.zh: 更多投資在教育的錢將會刺激經濟成長。

hand.en: I'll never forget shaking the President's hand last year.
hand.zh: 我决不会忘记去年与总统握手的情景。

partly.en: The wall is partly covered with ivy.
partly.zh: 墙被常青藤覆盖了一部分。

upset.en: Don't get an upset stomach by eating too much.
upset.zh: 不要因为吃得太多而扰乱胃的正常消化。

injury.en: Not all of the passengers escaped injury.
injury.zh: 並非所有的乘客都免於受傷。

hopeless.en: By the way, my English is absolutely hopeless.
hopeless.zh: 順道一提，我的英語是絕對沒有希望了。

escape.en: He looked for every possible means of escape.
escape.zh: 他寻找一切可能的逃生途径。

philosophy.en: Philosophy is not a thing one can learn in six months.
philosophy.zh: 哲学不是我们用六个月就能学的东西。

awfully.en: I was awfully confused by his question.
awfully.zh: 我對他的問題感到非常困惑。

golden.en: Speech is silver, but silence is golden.

lot.en: Tom didn't doubt that there would be a lot of people there.
lot.zh: 汤姆确定那里会有很多人。

unlikely.en: I know that it is highly unlikely that anyone knows me.
unlikely.zh: 我知道有人认识我的可能性微乎其微。

liar.en: A liar needs to have a good memory.
liar.zh: 说谎的人需要很好的记忆力。

family.en: We are all looking forward to seeing you and your family.
family.zh: 我们都期待看到你和你的家人。

many.en: He asked me questions similar to those asked by many others.
many.zh: 他和许多其他人一样问了我同样的问题。

goal.en: He never gave up hope that he would reach that goal.
goal.zh: 他從沒放棄達成那個目標的希望。

inner.en: Politicians never tell us their inner thoughts.
inner.zh: 政治家从来不告诉我们他们的别有用心。

bear.en: The ice on the lake is too thin to bear your weight.
bear.zh: 湖上的冰太薄了，承受不了你的重量。

pretty.en: If her nose were a little shorter, she would be quite pretty.
pretty.zh: 若她的姿態能再低一點就更完美了。

fan.en: Does any other country fan the flames of patriotism as much as America?
fan.zh: 有没有一个国家比美国更提倡爱国主义？

election.en: "What do you think of the election for mayor?" "I don't know."
election.zh: “你对市长选举怎么看？”“我不知道。”

wheat.en: Can you tell wheat from barley?
wheat.zh: 你能辨别小麦和大麦吗？

page.en: I think that Tom and I are on the same page.
page.zh: 我認為我和湯姆的想法一致。

spite.en: My uncle kept on drinking in spite of his doctor's advice.
spite.zh: 我叔叔不顧醫生勸阻，還是繼續喝酒。

relationship.en: I don't know anything about their relationship.
relationship.zh: 我對他們的關係一無所知。

grape.en: That isn't wine. It's grape juice.
grape.zh: 這不是葡萄酒，是葡萄汁。

hero.en: He dreamed of being a hero.
hero.zh: 他梦想着成为一名英雄。

happen.en: What do you think would happen if the earth stopped spinning?
happen.zh: 如果地球停止自传，你认为会发生什么？

kick.en: I get a kick out of her cheerful personality.
kick.zh: 她開朗的個性使我覺得快樂。

chemistry.en: I majored in chemistry at the university.

shot.en: I shot the horse because it had trouble breathing.
shot.zh: 我枪杀了那匹马，因为他已呼吸困难。

gay.en: A female friend of mine loves to go to gay bars with me.
gay.zh: 我的一个女性朋友喜欢跟我一起去同志酒吧。

sometime.en: I hope we'll see each other again sometime.
sometime.zh: 我希望我們有時間還可以見面。

satisfactory.en: The explanation is by no means satisfactory.
satisfactory.zh: 這個解釋不是很令人滿意。

particularly.en: The youngest daughter was particularly beautiful.

reason.en: If for some reason they come early, please tell them to wait.
reason.zh: 如果他们由于什么原因早到的话，请转达他们再等一会儿。

cross.en: He anonymously donated a large sum of money to the Red Cross.
cross.zh: 他匿名向红十字捐了大笔钱。

development.en: The ecological footprint of a country is closely related to its level of economic development.
development.zh: 生態印跡與一國的經濟發展程度密切相關。

medical.en: There is an urgent need for medical supplies.

economical.en: London was very important for economical and cultural reasons.
economical.zh: 倫敦過去因為經濟和文化的緣故，十分重要。

could.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
could.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

latin.en: Many English words are derived from Latin.
latin.zh: 許多英文單字源自於拉丁文。

other.en: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
other.zh: 我有三只狗，其中一只是公的，另外两只是母的。

court.en: Anything you say may be held against you in a court of law.
court.zh: 你所说的一切都将成为呈堂证供。

drink.en: I do not like tea, so I generally drink coffee for breakfast.
drink.zh: 我不喜欢茶，所以我早餐大致上都喝咖啡。

ball.en: Seen from the moon, the earth looks like a ball.
ball.zh: 从月球上看的话，地球看起来像个皮球。

organize.en: I keep meaning to organize my desk.

remain.en: Please remain seated for a few minutes.

join.en: It is a pity that you can't join us.
join.zh: 你不能和我們一起來真可惜。

poor.en: Every nation, rich or poor, has its strengths and weaknesses.
poor.zh: 每个国家，无论贫富，都有其长，都有其短。

delete.en: I wish I could figure out how to delete my Facebook account.
delete.zh: 我希望我能知道如何刪除我的Facebook帳號。

great.en: Every great writer seems to have been interested in English.
great.zh: 每一個偉大的作家似乎已經對英語感興趣。

gun.en: Tom said that he keeps a gun in his home.
gun.zh: 湯姆說他的家裡有把槍。

urge.en: Advertisements urge us to buy luxuries.
urge.zh: 廣告慫恿我們買奢侈品。

but.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
but.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

ought.en: Don't you think you ought to write them a thank-you note?
ought.zh: 你不觉得你应该给他们写一封感谢信吗？

impossible.en: It's impossible to do the sights of Tokyo in a day or two.
impossible.zh: 一两天是没办法逛完东京的。

real.en: Problems that can be solved with money are not real problems.
real.zh: 錢可以解決的問題都不是問題。

score.en: He got a better score than us.
score.zh: 他得到了比我们还高的分数。

equipment.en: Keep away from the electrical equipment.

luck.en: He owes his success both to working hard and to good luck.
luck.zh: 他的成功要归结于他的辛勤工作和好运气。

absolutely.en: Tom said that he was absolutely sure Mary would do that.
absolutely.zh: 湯姆說，他完全肯定瑪莉會那樣做。

office.en: Tom spent most of the morning straightening up his office.
office.zh: 湯姆花了大半箇早晨整理辦公室。

sore.en: I have a very sore arm where you hit me.
sore.zh: 你打在我手臂上的地方超级痛。

japanese.en: We often hear it said that the Japanese are good workers.
japanese.zh: 我们经常听说日本人工作勤奋。

chocolate.en: Does that chocolate bar have nuts in it?
chocolate.zh: 那塊巧克力裡面有堅果嗎？

chicken.en: The child has a case of chicken pox.

separate.en: They sleep in separate bedrooms even though they're married.
separate.zh: 他们分房睡，即使他们已经结婚了。

campus.en: I took him to the most expensive restaurant on campus.
campus.zh: 我把他带到校区里最贵的餐馆去了。

blanket.en: Could I have a pillow and blanket?
blanket.zh: 給我一個枕頭和毛毯好嗎？

frequently.en: How frequently do you check your mail?

market.en: My father is very much involved in the stock market now.
market.zh: 我爸爸现在非常专注于股市。

big.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
big.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

half.en: I waited half an hour for my friend, but he didn't turn up.
half.zh: 我等了我朋友半個小時，但是他還是沒出現。

afraid.en: Afraid of hurting his feelings, I didn't tell him the truth.
afraid.zh: 怕傷害了他的感情，我沒有告訴他真相。

stiff.en: Throughout the five years of painful cancer treatments, he managed to keep a stiff upper lip.
stiff.zh: 这五年痛苦的癌症治疗他终于坚持下来了。

lamp.en: He hung a lamp from the ceiling.
lamp.zh: 他把一盏灯挂在了天花板上。

line.en: Be sure to drop us a line as soon as you get to London.
line.zh: 别忘了一到伦敦就给我们留言啊。

bet.en: I made a bet that she would win the game.

prove.en: I just wanted to prove to myself that I could do this.
prove.zh: 我只想向自己证明我可以做到。

along.en: An opportunity like this only comes along once in a lifetime.
along.zh: 一辈子只会出现一次像这样的机会。

oven.en: I forgot to tell Tom to take the cookies out of the oven.
oven.zh: 我忘了告訴湯姆把餅乾從烤箱拿出來。

arrow.en: The arrow indicates the way to go.

green.en: Is it true that Tom wants to paint his house green?
green.zh: 汤姆想把房子漆成绿色，是真的吗？

press.en: If you would like to speak to a customer service representative, please press three.
press.zh: 如果想與客服代表通話，請按三。

firm.en: The firm went under due to lack of capital.
firm.zh: 公司由于缺乏资本倒闭了。

funeral.en: A great many people attended his funeral.
funeral.zh: 很多人都参加了他的葬礼。

fluent.en: I consider myself fairly fluent in French.
fluent.zh: 我认为自己的法语相当流利。

trade.en: My father has been engaged in foreign trade for many years.

owe.en: I owe it you that I am still alive.

gray.en: My office is on the fourth floor of that gray six-story building.
gray.zh: 我的办公室在那幢灰色的六层楼的四楼。

digital.en: My cell phone has a built-in digital camera.
digital.zh: 我的手機有內建的數位相機。

also.en: It is true that television also has some disadvantages.

subway.en: Father takes the 7:00 subway to work.
subway.zh: 爸爸乘早上7点的地铁去上班。

minister.en: The Prime Minister's speech was calculated to anger the opposition parties.
minister.zh: 總理的發言估計激怒了在野黨。

miracle.en: I can hope for a miracle, can't I?
miracle.zh: 我能等奇跡發生，是不是？

newly.en: Why on earth did you sell your newly-built house?
newly.zh: 你到底为什么把你新建的房子卖了？

lack.en: The firm went under due to lack of capital.
lack.zh: 公司由于缺乏资本倒闭了。

difference.en: Do you know the difference between a microscope and a telescope?
difference.zh: 你知道显微镜和望远镜的差别吗？

hope.en: I hope that this is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
hope.zh: 希望這是美好友誼的開始。

insufficient.en: There is insufficient light to take pictures.

cheerful.en: I get a kick out of her cheerful personality.
cheerful.zh: 她開朗的個性使我覺得快樂。

east.en: The sun comes up in the east and goes down in the west.
east.zh: 太阳从东边升起，西边落下。

pronunciation.en: I would like to improve my English pronunciation.
pronunciation.zh: 我想改善我的英语发音。

photo.en: You need to attach your photo to the application form.
photo.zh: 你必须把你的照片贴在申请书上。

popular.en: In the Edo period, moon-viewing parties were very popular.
popular.zh: 在江戶時代賞月的宴會非常受歡迎。

resume.en: I don't worry so much about my resume.
resume.zh: 我對自己的履歷不那麼在意。

eyesight.en: You're going to wreck your eyesight if you play games all the time.
eyesight.zh: 要是你老打游戏的话，你的视力会下降的。

canal.en: This ship is too big to pass through the canal.
canal.zh: 这艘船太大，没法通过运河。

please.en: Could you please talk a bit louder? I can't hear very well.
please.zh: 你能大声点讲吗？我听不太清。

beside.en: He looked young beside his brother.
beside.zh: 他在他弟弟旁边显得很年轻。

lid.en: The date of manufacture is shown on the lid.

percent.en: More than 40 percent of the students go on to university.

englishman.en: He mistook me for an Englishman.
englishman.zh: 他误认为我是一个英国人。

basketball.en: I've always wanted to be a professional basketball player.
basketball.zh: 我一直想成为一名职业篮球运动员。

orbit.en: It takes 165 years for Neptune to orbit around the sun.
orbit.zh: 海王星繞行太陽一周要花一百六十五年。

privilege.en: We were granted the privilege of fishing in this bay.
privilege.zh: 我们得到了在这个海湾内捕鱼的特权。

numerous.en: I have numerous books on my bookshelf.
numerous.zh: 我有大量的书在我的书架上。

wage.en: What's the minimum wage in your country?
wage.zh: 你的国家的最低工资是多少？

childish.en: His way of thinking is very childish.

name.en: He was about to fall asleep, when he heard his name called.
name.zh: 他快要睡著的時候，聽到有人在叫他的名字。

prefer.en: In general, consumers prefer quantity to quality.
prefer.zh: 一般來說，消费者喜歡數量勝於質量。

exact.en: Can you explain the exact meaning of this word?
exact.zh: 你能否說出這個詞的精確意思?

often.en: Father would often read detective stories in his spare time.
often.zh: 父亲常常在空闲时间读侦探小说。

flood.en: Several cottages have been isolated by the flood water.
flood.zh: 好几间小屋被洪水孤立起来了。

genius.en: He thought that he was a genius.

nerve.en: She had the nerve to speak out.

northern.en: Japan is located in the Northern Hemisphere.

hen.en: That fox must have killed the hen.
hen.zh: 那隻狐狸殺了一隻母雞。

act.en: You are old enough to know better than to act like that.
act.zh: 你夠大了知道不要那樣做。

one.en: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
one.zh: 我有三只狗，其中一只是公的，另外两只是母的。

argument.en: After a long argument, I finally persuaded her to go camping.
argument.zh: 經過長久的爭論，我終於說服了她去露營。

painter.en: You're a good painter, aren't you?
painter.zh: 你是個很棒的畫家，不是嗎？

burst.en: The water pipes froze and then burst.

closely.en: If you listen closely enough you'll be able to hear it.
closely.zh: 靠近一點聽，你就會聽到了。

church.en: The old church on the hill dates back to the twelfth century.
church.zh: 山上的老教堂的歷史可以追溯到12世紀。

note.en: I noticed a note on my desk, but I don't know who wrote it.
note.zh: 我發現了我辦公桌上有張字條, 但是我不知道是誰寫的。

both.en: Both of Tom's parents passed away when he was quite young.
both.zh: 汤姆很小的时候父母就都去世了。

brilliant.en: A brilliant future lay before him.
brilliant.zh: 大好的前途摆在他面前。

officer.en: The police officer arrested the burglar.

keep.en: She could hardly keep from laughing when she saw the dress.
keep.zh: 當她看到那件衣服, 她無法抑制自己的笑聲。

permission.en: The teacher granted me permission to go home early.

paper.en: Write down the medications you need on this piece of paper.
paper.zh: 将你需要的药物写在这张纸上。

former.en: Everyone is anxious to know what has become of the former champion.
former.zh: 大家都渴望知道前冠军得主发生了什么。

truth.en: Afraid of hurting his feelings, I didn't tell him the truth.
truth.zh: 怕傷害了他的感情，我沒有告訴他真相。

pie.en: Can I have a piece of this apple pie?
pie.zh: 我可以吃一塊蘋果派嗎？

reply.en: Please send me a reply as soon as you receive this mail.
reply.zh: 收到此邮件后请尽快给我答复。

cake.en: A girl gave me an orange in exchange for a piece of cake.
cake.zh: 有个女生用一个橙子跟我换了一块蛋糕。

parcel.en: The address on this parcel is wrong.
parcel.zh: 這個包裹上的地址是錯的。

edge.en: The company's competitive edge will be eroded if system engineers continue to leave.
edge.zh: 如果系统工程师继续离开，公司的竞争优势将会被削弱。

positive.en: Try to have a positive attitude about everything.
positive.zh: 试着用积极的态度去面对任何事情。

close.en: It is close to eleven. It's about time we went to bed.
close.zh: 快11点了。我们该上床睡觉了。

presence.en: I told you not to talk about the matter in her presence.
presence.zh: 我跟你说过她在的时候不要说这件事。

production.en: Mass production reduced the price of many goods.
production.zh: 大量生產降低許多商品的價格。

foolish.en: You must put an end to this foolish behavior.
foolish.zh: 你该结束这种愚蠢的行为了。

found.en: When Tom woke up, he found Mary reading a book at the desk.
found.zh: 汤姆醒来的时候看到玛丽在书桌前看一本书。

gather.en: I gather that they'll agree with us.
gather.zh: 我猜想他們會同意我們的。

mess.en: My brother's room is always a mess.
mess.zh: 我弟弟的房间总是很乱。

pronounce.en: Is there anyone who can pronounce this word?

hello.en: Please say hello to your family.

chalk.en: Take this piece of chalk and write on the blackboard.
chalk.zh: 拿起這支粉筆，在黑板上寫字。

despise.en: The rich sometimes despise the poor.
despise.zh: 富人有时会看不起穷人。

roller.en: Which do you enjoy more, ice skating or roller skating?
roller.zh: 你更喜歡滑冰還是輪滑？

needle.en: My hands were shaking too much to thread the needle.
needle.zh: 我的手抖得太厉害，没法穿针了。

another.en: I thought he loved you, but as it is, he loved another girl.
another.zh: 我以為他愛你，但事實上，他愛另一個女孩。

finger.en: The teacher pointed her finger at me and asked me to come with her.
finger.zh: 教师用手指指着我，要我跟她走。

fast.en: The professor spoke too fast for anyone to understand.
fast.zh: 那个教授讲得太快了，没有一个人听得懂。

die.en: Is it right for a doctor to decide when someone should die?
die.zh: 由医生来决定某人何时该死是对的吗？

abnormal.en: Environmental pollution is causing abnormal weather conditions.
abnormal.zh: 環境污染正造成異常的天氣情況。

base.en: We found it very hard going back to our base camp in the blizzard.
base.zh: 暴风雪使得我们难以返回营地。

myself.en: I would rather live by myself than do as he tells me to do.
myself.zh: 我寧願自己獨立生活也不要他來指使我。

thoughtful.en: She is very thoughtful and patient.

draft.en: I am writing a draft of the speech.

workshop.en: I adapted the garage for use as a workshop.
workshop.zh: 我把车库改造成车间使用。

paint.en: He had his sister help him paint the wall of his room.
paint.zh: 他让妹妹帮他涂他房间的墙。

recognize.en: You have changed so much that I can hardly recognize you.
recognize.zh: 你变了那么多，以至于我几乎认不出你了。

okay.en: Stop pretending that everything's okay. It's not.
okay.zh: 不要再假装一切都好了，不是这样的！

police.en: There were several police cars parked in front of the school.
police.zh: 學校門前停著好幾輛警車。

framework.en: The whole framework was made of iron.
framework.zh: 整個框架由鐵金屬製成。

cheese.en: My mother made us cheese sandwiches for lunch.
cheese.zh: 媽媽為我們做了乳酪三明治當午餐。

sleeve.en: The men are wearing short sleeve shirts.

vacant.en: There were several rooms still vacant.

lead.en: Driving on a slippery road can lead to a car wreck.
lead.zh: 在光滑的路上开车会导致车祸。

friendship.en: I hope that this is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
friendship.zh: 希望這是美好友誼的開始。

bare.en: It is not easy to catch a hare with your bare hands.
bare.zh: 空手赤拳抓野兔並不容易。

athlete.zh: 汤姆天生就是个运动员。

cook.en: The only difference between a bad cook and a poisoner is the intent.
cook.zh: 一個差勁的廚師和下毒者唯一的不同在於他們的意圖。

powder.en: The table is covered with powder.

pitch.en: This is a good place to pitch a tent.

deal.en: It hasn't been easy for Tom to deal with Mary's health problems.
deal.zh: 处理玛丽的健康问题对汤姆来说不容易。

collect.en: Collect your thoughts before you begin your work.

jail.en: He has spent ten years in jail for murder.
jail.zh: 他因為謀殺案在牢裡待了十年。

section.en: There are seven men and four women in my section.
section.zh: 在我的部门里有七男四女。

mercy.en: The poor people were at the mercy of the cruel dictator.
mercy.zh: 可憐的人民任憑殘暴的獨裁者處置。

pour.en: Pour melted butter over the popcorn.
pour.zh: 將融化了的奶油倒入爆米花中。

mention.en: He knows German and French, not to mention English.
mention.zh: 不提英语，他还会说德语和法语。

decide.en: Is it right for a doctor to decide when someone should die?
decide.zh: 由医生来决定某人何时该死是对的吗？

conscious.en: The warrior is conscious of both his strength and his weakness.
conscious.zh: 戰士知道自己的力量和弱點。

football.en: A football team consists of eleven players.
football.zh: 一个足球队由十一个球员组成。

careful.en: You must be careful of the traffic when you cross the street.

receive.en: Please send me a reply as soon as you receive this mail.
receive.zh: 收到此邮件后请尽快给我答复。

nowhere.en: Tom had nowhere to return to.

sign.en: To have doubts about oneself is the first sign of intelligence.
sign.zh: 自我怀疑是聪明的第一标志。

hide.en: It was difficult for him to hide his pride in his success.
hide.zh: 他很难掩饰对自己成功的骄傲。

architecture.en: You like to talk about architecture, don't you?
architecture.zh: 你喜欢讨论建筑，不是吗？

existence.en: Do you believe in the existence of ghosts?

subtract.en: Subtract three from eight and you get five.

italian.en: One is Japanese and the other is Italian.
italian.zh: 一个是日本人，另一个是意大利人。

drunk.en: A drunk driver was responsible for the car accident.
drunk.zh: 喝醉的驾驶员对车祸有责任。

magazine.en: Don't throw away this magazine. I haven't read it yet.
magazine.zh: 这本杂志不要扔。我还没看呢。

patience.en: Mastering a foreign language involves a lot of patience.
patience.zh: 学好一门外语需要坚韧不拔的毅力。

direction.en: You have a really good sense of direction.

job.en: We will endeavour to finish the job by the end of the week.
job.zh: 我們會盡力在這禮拜結束前把工作完成。

slope.en: The path zigzagged up the steep slope.
slope.zh: 這條小路沿著陡峭的斜坡蜿蜒而上。

ankle.en: She twisted her ankle while she was doing exercise.

dead.en: If there was no sun, all the animals would be dead.
dead.zh: 如果没有太阳，那所有生物都会死。

me.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
me.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

rabbit.en: Rather than live a hundred years as a rabbit, live one day as a tiger.
rabbit.zh: 寧可當隻老虎活一天，也不願當隻兔子過一百年。

energy.en: The problem is that solar energy costs too much.
energy.zh: 問題是, 太陽能太貴了。

elaborate.en: She made elaborate preparations for the party.
elaborate.zh: 她精心籌備了這個派對。

horse.en: I shot the horse because it had trouble breathing.
horse.zh: 我枪杀了那匹马，因为他已呼吸困难。

moment.en: The moment I held the baby in my arms, it began to cry.
moment.zh: 我一把孩子抱在手里，他就开始哭了。

deed.en: His brave deed earned him respect.
deed.zh: 他的英勇行為使他贏得了尊重。

collection.en: I would like to have a look at your collection of stamps.
collection.zh: 我想看看您的邮票收藏。

knife.en: Tom carefully wiped his fingerprints off the knife.
knife.zh: 汤姆小心翼翼地把刀子上的指纹擦掉。

milk.en: I don't like being the one who always has to milk the cow.
milk.zh: 我不喜欢做那个总是挤牛奶的人。

exercise.en: I am in the habit of taking some exercise before breakfast.
exercise.zh: 我在吃早餐前有運動的習慣。

shortly.en: Shortly after the accident, the police came.
shortly.zh: 事故發生後不久，警察來了。

retire.en: I hope to retire from work when I'm 60 years old.
retire.zh: 我希望在六十歲時退休。

betray.en: A true gentleman would not betray his friends.
betray.zh: 一个真正的绅士不会出卖他的朋友。

meal.en: If you want to lose weight, you should cut down on between-meal snacks.
meal.zh: 你如果想減肥，就應該減少兩餐之間的零食。

august.en: There is no school during August.

during.en: He amassed a fortune in stock trading during the last boom.
during.zh: 他在上个景气时期炒股攒下了一笔钱。

metal.en: The value of the coins depended on the weight of the metal used.
metal.zh: 钱币的价值取决于所使用的金属的重量。

high.en: How to overcome the high value of the yen is a big problem.
high.zh: 如何克服日元升高是个大问题。

born.en: I live in Boston, but I was born in Chicago.
born.zh: 我住在波士顿，但我出生在芝加哥。

heating.en: I'm glad that they fixed the heating system, but now it's too hot.
heating.zh: 我很高興他們修復了暖氣系統，但現在太熱了。

split.zh: 讓我們平分這個報酬吧。

weed.en: Tom said he thought he'd be able to help Mary weed the garden today.
weed.zh: 汤姆说他以为他今天能够帮玛丽的花园除草

calm.en: I was calm until I saw the syringe.
calm.zh: 看到针管儿之前我一直都很淡定。

sweater.en: Take a sweater with you so you don't catch a cold.
sweater.zh: 为了不感冒，请带上这件毛衣。

greet.en: He was aware that I was around, but didn't come to greet me.
greet.zh: 他注意到我在場，但是沒向我打招呼。

nose.en: If her nose were a little shorter, she would be quite pretty.
nose.zh: 若她的姿態能再低一點就更完美了。

morning.en: I saw a group of foreigners on my way to school this morning.
morning.zh: 今天早上在去学校的路上，我看到了一群外国人。

mild.en: Generally speaking, the climate of Japan is mild.
mild.zh: 总体上说，日本的气候温和。

interrupt.en: I didn't mean to interrupt anything.

period.en: In the Edo period, moon-viewing parties were very popular.
period.zh: 在江戶時代賞月的宴會非常受歡迎。

loaf.en: I just remembered that I was supposed to buy a loaf of bread.
loaf.zh: 我才想起来我之前该买个面包。

definitely.en: Tom says that Mary definitely won't accept the job.
definitely.zh: 湯姆說瑪麗絕不會接受這工作。

grow.en: They grow strawberries in their greenhouse.
grow.zh: 他們在他們的溫室裡種植草莓。

beef.en: Beef is usually more expensive than pork.

deposit.en: Some people do not like to deposit their money in banks.
deposit.zh: 有些人不喜欢把钱存银行。

bound.en: We are bound to each other by a close friendship.

merely.en: He said it merely as a joke.
merely.zh: 他这么说就是为了开玩笑。

besides.en: Besides the piano, can you play any other instruments?
besides.zh: 除了钢琴以外，还会玩什么乐器吗？

park.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
park.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

nineteen.en: It's valid until March thirty-first, nineteen-ninety-seven.

cry.en: The moment I held the baby in my arms, it began to cry.
cry.zh: 我一把孩子抱在手里，他就开始哭了。

into.en: Pizza is the kind of food that fits into today's life style.
into.zh: 比萨是种适合现在的生活方式的食物。

bag.en: His bag is right here, so he cannot have gone to school yet.
bag.zh: 他的包就在这儿，所以他不可能已经去了学校。

lazy.en: The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy brown dog.
lazy.zh: 身手矯健的棕狐狸躍過懶洋洋的棕狗。

hurt.en: She hurt her foot when she fell off her bicycle.
hurt.zh: 她在从自行车上摔下来时伤到了脚。

worm.en: The early bird catches the worm.

dictionary.en: Use a dictionary to find the meanings of the phrases below.
dictionary.zh: 用字典查出下面词组的意思。

date.en: The date of the festival coincides with that of the exam.
date.zh: 节日和考试碰巧在同一天。

indoors.en: When I was a child, I spent most of my time indoors reading.
indoors.zh: 当我是个孩子的时候，我会把大部分时间都用于室内阅读。

helicopter.en: Tom and Mary are both helicopter pilots.
helicopter.zh: 湯姆和瑪麗都是直升機飛行員。

leg.en: Who told you Tom broke his leg?
leg.zh: 谁告诉你们汤姆把腿摔断的？

command.en: She has a good command of English though she was brought up in Japan.
command.zh: 雖然她在日本被撫養長大，但是她精通英語。

actually.en: You didn't actually want to go to Australia, did you?
actually.zh: 你其實不想去澳大利亞吧？

report.en: Finishing the report by tomorrow is next to impossible.
report.zh: 在明天前完成报告几乎是不可能的。

none.en: Six people applied for the job, but none of them were employed.
none.zh: 六个人投了这份工作，但他们中没有一个被录用。

large.en: He anonymously donated a large sum of money to the Red Cross.
large.zh: 他匿名向红十字捐了大笔钱。

nearby.en: My wife buys vegetables from a supermarket nearby.
nearby.zh: 我老婆在附近的超市买蔬菜。

map.en: Tom always gets lost if he doesn't carry a map.
map.zh: 汤姆每次要是不带地图的话就会迷路。
