article.en: That's the computer he used to write the article.
article.zh: 那就是那台他用来写文章的电脑。

angle.en: An angle of 90 degrees is called a right angle.

copy.en: I keep the master copy under lock and key.

elephant.en: Nobody understood why the elephant suddenly turned on its owner.
elephant.zh: 没有人明白为什么大象突然攻击了它的主人。

musical.en: Do you play a musical instrument?

anything.en: Anything you say may be held against you in a court of law.
anything.zh: 你所说的一切都将成为呈堂证供。

anxious.en: Everyone is anxious to know what has become of the former champion.
anxious.zh: 大家都渴望知道前冠军得主发生了什么。

mat.en: Entering the house, I tripped over the mat.
mat.zh: 进家门后，我被垫子绊倒了。

vague.en: She had a vague feeling of guilt.
vague.zh: 她隱約地有一種的內疚感。

brain.zh: 他是一個優秀的腦外科醫生。

highway.en: The accident took place on the highway.
highway.zh: 事故發生在高速公路上。

quite.en: This town is quite different from what it was ten years ago.
quite.zh: 這鎮子現在跟十年前差別很大。

disposal.en: My car is at your disposal.

flight.en: Mary placed her baby in a car seat for the flight.
flight.zh: 航程中瑪麗把她的寶寶放在嬰兒汽車座椅上。

inform.en: We should inform them about that.
inform.zh: 我们应该把那件事情告知他们。

flat.en: My bicycle has a flat tire.
flat.zh: 我的腳踏車輪胎沒氣了。

idea.en: Tom has no idea what to do with all the junk in his garage.
idea.zh: 汤姆不知道拿他车库的那些废物怎么办。

blue.en: The colors of the American flag are red, white and blue.
blue.zh: 美国国旗的颜色是红白蓝。

married.en: They sleep in separate bedrooms even though they're married.
married.zh: 他们分房睡，即使他们已经结婚了。

kitchen.en: Tom went into the kitchen and poured himself a cup of coffee.
kitchen.zh: 汤姆进了厨房，给自己倒了杯咖啡。

bridge.en: We enjoyed watching the fireworks on a bridge last summer.
bridge.zh: 去年夏天，我们在桥上看焰火看得很过瘾。

anyone.en: I know that it is highly unlikely that anyone knows me.
anyone.zh: 我知道有人认识我的可能性微乎其微。

envelope.en: Tom told me not to open the envelope until my birthday.
envelope.zh: 汤姆告诉我，到我生日那天我才能打开信封。

fault.en: He is constantly finding fault with other people.

calculation.en: According to my calculation, she should be in India by now.
calculation.zh: 根據我的估計，她現在應該在印度了。

driver.en: My mother has a driver's license, but she doesn't drive a car.
driver.zh: 我母亲有驾照，但是她不开车。

airport.en: My parents have gone to the airport to see my uncle off.
airport.zh: 我父母去机场送我叔叔了。

location.en: A bookstore in that location wouldn't make enough money to survive.
location.zh: 那個地點的書店無法賺足夠的錢生存下去。

unlike.en: The crane, unlike the dog, has never dreamed of flying.
unlike.zh: 不像狗, 這隻鶴從來沒有夢想過飛翔。

chance.en: Is there any chance that you'll go to Australia next month?
chance.zh: 你有機會下箇月去澳大利亞嗎？

extra.en: My wife's part-time job brings in a little extra money.
extra.zh: 我太太兼職的工作賺進了一些額外的錢。

hardly.en: She could hardly keep from laughing when she saw the dress.
hardly.zh: 當她看到那件衣服, 她無法抑制自己的笑聲。

dance.en: Tom has no intention of asking Mary to the upcoming dance.
dance.zh: Tom没有意图去邀请Mary去即将来临的舞会。

atomic.en: They know how to make an atomic bomb.
atomic.zh: 他们知道如何制造原子弹。

neck.en: When he shouted, the veins in his neck stood out clearly.
neck.zh: 他大喊的時候，脖子上青筋暴起。

lady.en: We moved our bags to make room for the elderly lady to sit down.
lady.zh: 我們移走了行李騰出空間讓老太太可以坐下。

engineering.en: Should we use genetic engineering on people?
engineering.zh: 我们应该对人使用基因编辑吗？

law.en: Anything you say may be held against you in a court of law.
law.zh: 你所说的一切都将成为呈堂证供。

dependent.en: The economy of the island is dependent on the fishing industry.
dependent.zh: 这个岛的经济依靠的是渔业。

utmost.en: This is a matter of the utmost importance.

begin.en: Collect your thoughts before you begin your work.

rush.en: Fools rush in where angels fear to tread.
rush.zh: 天使畏懼處, 愚人敢闖入。

lovely.zh: 他們欣賞了美麗的風景。

shelter.en: Children depend on their parents for food, clothing and shelter.
shelter.zh: 孩子们的衣食住行靠的是他们的父母。

promise.en: He is a man of few words, but he always keeps his promise.
promise.zh: 他这个人话不多，但总是遵守诺言。

handkerchief.en: She is always losing her handkerchief.

country.en: If you want to know a country, you must learn its history.
country.zh: 如果想了解一个国家，就必须学习这个国家的历史。

bend.en: I can't bend my right arm.
bend.zh: 我無法彎曲我的右手臂。

learned.en: It was an advantage having learned Chinese while I was in school.
learned.zh: 在学校时我学了中文是个优势。

lock.en: If I lost my key, I wouldn't be able to lock the door.
lock.zh: 如果我弄丟了我的鑰匙，我就無法鎖門了。

moon.en: In the Edo period, moon-viewing parties were very popular.
moon.zh: 在江戶時代賞月的宴會非常受歡迎。

accent.en: Where is the accent on the word 'Australia?'

say.en: It was heartless of him to say such a thing to the sick man.
say.zh: 他对一个生病的男人说这种事真是没良心。

brandy.en: She poured brandy into the glasses.
brandy.zh: 她把白蘭地倒進玻璃杯裡。

meaning.en: Will you please explain the meaning of this sentence to me?
meaning.zh: 您能为我解释这句句子的意思吗？

bomb.en: They know how to make an atomic bomb.
bomb.zh: 他们知道如何制造原子弹。

fry.en: Tom doesn't even know how to fry an egg.
fry.zh: 汤姆甚至连怎么煎鸡蛋都不知道。

hill.en: The old church on the hill dates back to the twelfth century.
hill.zh: 山上的老教堂的歷史可以追溯到12世紀。

tense.en: The situation seemed very tense and dangerous.
tense.zh: 形势似乎非常紧张严峻。

tend.en: Red-haired people tend to have freckles.

shed.en: Nobody's going to shed any tears if that old building gets torn down.
shed.zh: 没有人会为这个旧建筑物的拆除而落泪。

america.en: A trip to America was equivalent to a two-year salary for her.
america.zh: 去美国旅行一次相当于她两年的工资。

directly.en: I got the information from him directly.
directly.zh: 我直接從他那裡得到訊息。

camera.en: Tom always carries a camera with him wherever he goes.
camera.zh: 汤姆无论到哪里都带着照相机。

jazz.en: Tom started playing jazz after studying classical music for many years.
jazz.zh: 在学习古典音乐多年后，汤姆开始演奏爵士了。

trial.en: Tom's trial will continue on October 20th.
trial.zh: 湯姆的審判將於 10 月 20 日繼續進行。

colony.en: Some say that China was like a Russian colony.
colony.zh: 有人說中國像是俄國的殖民地。

north.en: There was a cold wind blowing from the north.
north.zh: 有一阵从北边吹来的冷风。

funny.en: He told us such a funny story that we all laughed.
funny.zh: 他给我们讲了一个有趣的故事，我们都笑了起来。

camp.en: We found it very hard going back to our base camp in the blizzard.
camp.zh: 暴风雪使得我们难以返回营地。

button.en: All you have to do is push this button to take a picture.
button.zh: 你要做的就是按这个按钮拍照。

classical.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
classical.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

friday.en: My car broke down this morning and won't be repaired until Friday.
friday.zh: 我的车今天早上坏了，星期五才能修好。

product.en: My uncle's company launched a new product last month.
product.zh: 舅舅的公司上个月推出了一款新产品。

ridge.en: Is this the bus for Park Ridge?
ridge.zh: 這是去帕克里奇的巴士？

bucket.en: Please fill this bucket with water.

need.en: Write down the medications you need on this piece of paper.
need.zh: 将你需要的药物写在这张纸上。

official.zh: 湯姆不是選出來的官員。

obvious.en: It's obvious why his stomach hurts.
obvious.zh: 他為什麼會胃痛的原因很明顯。

leave.en: I was just about to leave the house when the telephone rang.
leave.zh: 我正要离开家的时候电话响了。

wrist.en: That man grabbed the young girl's wrist.
wrist.zh: 那個男人抓住了這個年輕女孩的手腕。

marine.en: Tom is studying to become a marine biologist.
marine.zh: 湯姆爲了當海洋生物學家學習。

key.en: If I lost my key, I wouldn't be able to lock the door.
key.zh: 如果我弄丟了我的鑰匙，我就無法鎖門了。

rear.en: Look in the rear-view mirror before backing up.

birth.en: She gave birth to her first child at twenty years old.
birth.zh: 她在二十歲的時候生下第一個孩子。

much.en: It's much better to be woken by the birds than by an alarm.
much.zh: 被闹钟唤醒没有被鸟唤醒的好。

pardon.en: Please pardon me for coming late.

phrase.en: What's the meaning of this phrase?

pan.en: I use a frying pan at least once a day.
pan.zh: 我每天至少用一次煎鍋。

i.en: Afraid of hurting his feelings, I didn't tell him the truth.
i.zh: 怕傷害了他的感情，我沒有告訴他真相。

weakness.en: The warrior is conscious of both his strength and his weakness.
weakness.zh: 戰士知道自己的力量和弱點。

japan.en: The population of Japan is larger than that of New Zealand.
japan.zh: 日本的人口比新西兰多。

picture.en: What image did you have in mind as you painted this picture?
picture.zh: 画这幅画的时候你脑海中浮现出了什么图像？

cabin.en: The little cabin was bathed in moonlight.
cabin.zh: 小木屋沐浴在月光之中。

minute.en: What have you done with my pen? It was here a minute ago.
minute.zh: 你把我的鋼筆怎麼了? 一分鐘前它還在這裡。

silly.en: I need to ask you a silly question.
silly.zh: 我必须问你一个蠢问题。

hungry.en: I'm hungry, so I'm going to get something to eat.
hungry.zh: 我餓了，所以我要吃東西。

odd.en: One is the smallest odd number.

traffic.en: The number of traffic accidents seems to be on the increase.
traffic.zh: 交通事故的数量似乎在增长。

unconscious.en: He was discovered unconscious on the floor of the kitchen.
unconscious.zh: 他被人发现倒在厨房的地板上，不省人事。

reading.en: When I was a child, I spent most of my time indoors reading.
reading.zh: 当我是个孩子的时候，我会把大部分时间都用于室内阅读。

physician.en: The physician prescribed his patient some medicine.
physician.zh: 医生给他的病人开了一些药。

pace.en: He was walking up the hill at a steady pace.
pace.zh: 他迈着稳健的步伐登上了山丘。

license.en: It was dark and I couldn't make out the license plate number.
license.zh: 天很黑，我看不清楚車牌號碼。

little.en: I let Tom watch a little TV after he finished his homework.
little.zh: 我让Tom在做完作业后看一点电视。

africa.en: Hemingway enjoyed big game hunting in Africa.
africa.zh: 海明威喜歡在非洲的大狩獵。

globe.en: The equator divides the globe into two hemispheres.
globe.zh: 赤道把地球分为两个半球。

food.en: Pizza is the kind of food that fits into today's life style.
food.zh: 比萨是种适合现在的生活方式的食物。

machine.en: The washing machine is a wonderful invention.
machine.zh: 洗衣機是一個很棒的發明。

reform.en: He proposed a reform in the educational system.
reform.zh: 他提议对教育系统进行改革。

fist.en: She banged the table with her fist.

mosquito.en: Minnesota's state bird is the mosquito.
mosquito.zh: 明尼苏达州的官方鸟就是蚊子。

plus.en: The sum of two plus three plus four is nine.

policeman.en: The policeman told me that the last bus leaves at ten.
policeman.zh: 警察告诉我巴士的末班车在十点出发。

christmas.en: Tom went to Boston to spend Christmas with his grandparents.
christmas.zh: 湯姆去波士頓陪爺爺奶奶過聖誕節。

interest.en: Banks charge higher interest on loans to risky customers.
interest.zh: 银行对风险客户收取较高的贷款利息。

greenhouse.en: Some scientists believe that the greenhouse effect is imaginary.
greenhouse.zh: 有的科學家認為溫室效應是虛構的。

farewell.en: I got a farewell present from everyone.
farewell.zh: 每個人都送了我一份歡送禮物。

him.en: Afraid of hurting his feelings, I didn't tell him the truth.
him.zh: 怕傷害了他的感情，我沒有告訴他真相。

shelf.en: She put her CDs in a row on the shelf.
shelf.zh: 她把她的CD在書架上排成一排。

later.en: Tom is going to be coming here later this afternoon.
later.zh: 湯姆今天下午會來這裡。

fashion.en: You may think those shoes are in fashion, but they aren't.
fashion.zh: 你可能認為那些鞋子很時髦, 但是他們不是。

daily.en: Most people write about their daily life.
daily.zh: 大部分人写的东西是关于他们的日常生活的。

outside.en: Because of the rain, we weren't able to play tennis outside.
outside.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

principal.en: Our school's principal is very old.

mine.en: A female friend of mine loves to go to gay bars with me.
mine.zh: 我的一个女性朋友喜欢跟我一起去同志酒吧。

farmer.en: She borrowed a saw from the farmer.
farmer.zh: 她向農夫借了一把鋸子。

asia.en: Asia is roughly four times the size of Europe.
asia.zh: 亚洲的大小约四倍于欧洲。

playground.en: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
playground.zh: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

nice.en: Blenders are nice for people who really like smoothies.
nice.zh: 攪拌機對真的喜歡冰沙的人來說很不錯。

phone.en: I got a phone call from him just as I was about to go to bed.
phone.zh: 我正要上床的時候接到了他打來的電話。

cat.en: Better be the head of a cat than the tail of a lion.

capacity.en: The room has a seating capacity of 200.

offer.en: With your approval, I would like to offer him the job.
offer.zh: 如果您同意, 我想給他這份工作。

conference.en: The conference is to be held in Tokyo the day after tomorrow.
conference.zh: 会议将在后天于东京举行。

body.en: Children generally have a higher body temperature than adults.
body.zh: 小孩的体温一般比大人的要高。

holiday.en: My plan is to spend the New Year's holiday in Australia.
holiday.zh: 我打算在澳大利亚过新年。

glass.en: In case of fire, break the glass and push the red button.
glass.zh: 万一发生火灾，打碎玻璃并按下红色按钮。

different.en: This town is quite different from what it was ten years ago.
different.zh: 這鎮子現在跟十年前差別很大。

cut.en: Tom cut down the tree that was in front of his house.

dawn.en: It was before dawn that they got the fire under control.
dawn.zh: 他们在黎明前控制住了火势。

ordinary.en: I did nothing out of the ordinary.

cheer.en: The situation is improving, so cheer up!
cheer.zh: 情況正在改善，所以振作起來！

pass.en: The gate is so narrow that the car can't pass through it.
pass.zh: 门太窄了，这辆车通不过。

level.en: I agree on an emotional level, but on the pragmatic level I disagree.
level.zh: 我感情上支持，但是理性上反对。

anywhere.en: Did you go anywhere during the summer vacation?
anywhere.zh: 这个暑假你有去哪儿玩吗?

every.en: Every great writer seems to have been interested in English.
every.zh: 每一個偉大的作家似乎已經對英語感興趣。

a.en: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
a.zh: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

bar.en: If you sang, they'd kick you out of the bar.
bar.zh: 如果你唱歌了，他们就会把你踢出酒吧。

plenty.en: The doctor insisted that the patient get plenty of rest.
plenty.zh: 医生坚持病人获得充分的休息。

baggage.en: How many pieces of baggage do you have?

pint.en: Beer is sold by the pint.

fly.en: He is afraid to fly in an airplane.

friend.en: I waited half an hour for my friend, but he didn't turn up.
friend.zh: 我等了我朋友半個小時，但是他還是沒出現。

any.en: Is there any chance that you'll go to Australia next month?
any.zh: 你有機會下箇月去澳大利亞嗎？

nurse.en: Have you ever thought of becoming a nurse?
nurse.zh: 你曾經想過當個護士嗎?

goods.en: The police have been searching for the stolen goods for almost a month.
goods.zh: 警察大概从一个月前就开始找被偷物品了。

museum.en: The Eiffel Tower is in the same city as the Louvre Museum.
museum.zh: 埃菲尔铁塔和卢浮宫在同一座城市。

coast.en: The students were for the most part from the West Coast.
coast.zh: 大部分的學生來自西海岸。

diamond.en: This might not be a genuine diamond.

chest.en: Tom had a pain in his chest, so he went to the hospital.
chest.zh: 汤姆胸痛，所以去了医院。

bowl.en: The dog is sitting by the bowl.

far.en: English is by far the most widely-spoken language in the world.
far.zh: 英語是目前在世界上使用最廣泛的語言。

tropical.en: This kind of plant grows only in the tropical regions.
tropical.zh: 這類植物只生長在熱帶地區。

general.en: In general, consumers prefer quantity to quality.
general.zh: 一般來說，消费者喜歡數量勝於質量。

gentle.en: She gave the door a gentle push.

however.en: However hard I try, I can't do it any better than she can.
however.zh: 无论我多么努力尝试，我都无法做到比她更好。

drama.en: They made the novel into a drama.
drama.zh: 他們把這本小說變成戲劇。

above.en: Children of six and above should attend school.
above.zh: 六岁及以上的小孩应该上学。

landlord.en: The landlord says he wants to raise the rent.

volcano.en: The volcano erupted suddenly, killing many people.
volcano.zh: 火山突然喷发，造成了多人死亡。

hard.en: I had a hard time trying to persuade him to cancel the trip.
hard.zh: 说服他中止旅行真是件苦差事。

microphone.en: For some reason the microphone didn't work earlier.
microphone.zh: 剛才我的麥克風沒起作用，不知道為什麼。

proud.en: He is proud of having been educated in the United States.
proud.zh: 他对自己在美国读过书这件事感到很骄傲。

gently.en: He put his hand gently on her shoulder.
gently.zh: 他把他的手溫柔地放在她的肩上。

loud.en: The radio is too loud. Can't you turn it down a little?
loud.zh: 收音机太响了。你不能把音量调低一点吗？

manner.en: There is nothing worse than doing something in a half-hearted manner.
manner.zh: 没有什么比做事缺乏热情更糟。

tender.en: My father was no less affectionate and tender to me than my mother was.
tender.zh: 我爸爸对我的爱和照顾不比我妈妈少。

dry.en: Tom wrung out the towel and hung it up to dry.
dry.zh: 汤姆拧干毛巾挂起来晾干。

mute.en: Helen Keller was blind, deaf and mute.
mute.zh: 海伦·凯勒眼盲、耳聋并且不能说话。

dorm.en: Have you gotten used to living in the dorm?
dorm.zh: 你習慣在宿舍生活了嗎？

change.en: I want to go and change into that shirt I bought yesterday.
change.zh: 我想去換我昨天買的這件襯衫。

wear.en: I have so many clothes I don't know what to wear tomorrow.
wear.zh: 我有那么多衣服，以至于我不知道明天穿什么了。

his.en: Afraid of hurting his feelings, I didn't tell him the truth.
his.zh: 怕傷害了他的感情，我沒有告訴他真相。

central.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
central.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

nine.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
nine.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

voyage.en: Mary went on a voyage around the world.

expensive.en: The show was wonderful, but the tickets were too expensive.
expensive.zh: 这场秀棒极了，但是门票太贵了。

provide.en: He has a wife and two young children to provide for.
provide.zh: 他有一个妻子和两个孩子要养活。

before.en: Some babies learn to swim even before they are one year old.
before.zh: 有些宝宝甚至在一岁之前就学习游泳了。

empty.en: There are three empty rooms. However, we can't use any of them.
empty.zh: 虽然有三间空屋，但哪间都用不了。

heat.en: People show up bright on an infrared camera because of their body heat.
heat.zh: 人會因為體溫而在紅外線攝影機上顯現。

canadian.en: Tom is married to a Canadian named Mary.
canadian.zh: 汤姆和一个叫玛丽的加拿大人结婚了。

last.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
last.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

cause.en: The police are investigating the cause of the accident.

mouth.en: She tossed me grapes and I tried to catch them with my mouth.
mouth.zh: 她朝我丢葡萄，我试着用嘴接住它们。

camel.en: The camel can go a long time without water and food.
camel.zh: 駱駝可以撐很久不吃不喝。

fourth.en: My office is on the fourth floor of that gray six-story building.
fourth.zh: 我的办公室在那幢灰色的六层楼的四楼。

march.en: It's valid until March thirty-first, nineteen-ninety-seven.

entrance.en: I hear you passed the entrance exam. Congratulations!
entrance.zh: 我听说你通过了入学考试。恭喜你了！

consider.en: We all consider your idea to be impractical.
consider.zh: 我们都认为您的想法是行不通的。

sound.en: The only sound to be heard was the ticking of the clock.
sound.zh: 唯一能听到的声音是钟的滴答声。

recall.en: I can't recall the last time we met.
recall.zh: 我想不起來我們上次見面的情况了。

scarcely.en: She had scarcely finished speaking when he cut in.
scarcely.zh: 她几乎没有说完话，就被他打断了。

mayor.en: "What do you think of the election for mayor?" "I don't know."
mayor.zh: “你对市长选举怎么看？”“我不知道。”

most.en: When I was a child, I spent most of my time indoors reading.
most.zh: 当我是个孩子的时候，我会把大部分时间都用于室内阅读。

connection.en: The telephone operator asked the caller to hold on until a connection was made.
connection.zh: 电话运营商提示来电人等候接通。

nature.en: She expressed her feelings for nature in a poem.
nature.zh: 她通過一首詩表達了她對大自然的感受。

alone.en: It says in the Bible, "Man shall not live on bread alone."
alone.zh: 圣经里有一句话，叫做“人不能只靠面包生活”。

hold.en: They will hold a meeting at 2 o'clock this afternoon.
hold.zh: 他们今天下午2点会举行一个会议。

like.en: It's hard to predict what the weather will be like tomorrow.
like.zh: 很难说明天的天气将会怎样。

treat.en: Why do you let Tom treat you that way?
treat.zh: 你為甚麼讓湯姆那麼對待你？

himself.en: Tom went into the kitchen and poured himself a cup of coffee.
himself.zh: 汤姆进了厨房，给自己倒了杯咖啡。

cure.en: There aren't any medicines that can cure this disease.
cure.zh: 没有药物能够治疗这种疾病。

bee.en: Bee stings can be very painful.
bee.zh: 蜜蜂螫人可以是非常痛苦的。

treaty.en: In 1978 a peace treaty was concluded between Japan and China.
treaty.zh: 1978年中国和日本签署了和平条约。

bird.en: A bird in the hand is better than two in the bush.
bird.zh: 一鳥在手勝過二鳥在林。

butterfly.en: The life span of a butterfly is short.

phase.en: Cancer can be cured easily if it is found in its first phase.
phase.zh: 癌症如果在第一阶段被发现的话是很容易治愈的。

necessarily.en: Large houses are not necessarily comfortable to live in.

cloth.en: She bought six yards of cloth for a dress.
cloth.zh: 她買了六碼的布做衣服。

door.en: The most logical place to keep your shoes is near the door.
door.zh: 最合逻輯的放鞋處是門口附近。

description.en: Have you ever seen Mt. Fuji? It is beautiful beyond description.
description.zh: 你看過富士山嗎? 它美得無法形容。

marry.en: I told him, once and for all, that I would not marry him.
marry.zh: 我告訴他，我永遠不會嫁給他。

branch.en: A new branch will be opened in Chicago next month.
branch.zh: 新的分店下箇月在芝加哥開始營業。

uneasy.en: I understand that you feel uneasy, but don't worry.
uneasy.zh: 我知道你不自在，但别急。

sew.en: Did you sew this by hand?

astronaut.en: She will be the first Japanese woman astronaut.
astronaut.zh: 她將會成為日本第一個女性太空人。

sulfur.en: Sulfur burns with a blue flame.
sulfur.zh: 硫磺燃燒著藍色的火焰。

beginner.en: Tom's a beginner, but he catches on fast.
beginner.zh: 湯姆是個初學者，但他趕上得很快。

fit.en: There were no hats in that store that fit me.
fit.zh: 那個店裡沒有合我尺寸的帽子。

lay.en: A beautiful lake lay just beyond the forest.
lay.zh: 森林外有一个美丽的湖泊。

cruel.en: The poor people were at the mercy of the cruel dictator.
cruel.zh: 可憐的人民任憑殘暴的獨裁者處置。

desk.en: I noticed a note on my desk, but I don't know who wrote it.
desk.zh: 我發現了我辦公桌上有張字條, 但是我不知道是誰寫的。

cost.en: That coat may have cost a lot of money, but it's worth it.
cost.zh: 那件大衣可能需要很多錢，但它值得。

decay.en: Salt helps to preserve food from decay.
decay.zh: 鹽可以幫助保存食物避免腐爛。

towel.en: This towel is so soft and fluffy. It feels good!
towel.zh: 这条毛巾蓬松又柔软，特别舒服。

crowd.en: I heard someone in the crowd outside the station call my name.
crowd.zh: 我聽到車站外的人群中有人在叫我的名字。

car.en: He crashed his car because someone tampered with the brakes.
car.zh: 他撞车是因为有人在刹车上做了手脚。

prime.en: The coral reef is the region's prime attraction.
prime.zh: 珊瑚礁是这个地区的主要景点。

ache.en: My joints ache when it gets cold.
ache.zh: 當天氣變冷的時候，我的關節疼痛。

grand.en: The grand prize is a kiss from the princess.

earn.en: Blondes earn 7% more than women with any other hair color.
earn.zh: 金髮女郎比其他顏色頭髮的女人多賺7％。

gunpowder.en: A spark caused the gunpowder to explode.

spray.en: Mary carries pepper spray in her purse.
spray.zh: 瑪麗的包裡有辣椒噴霧。

guide.en: Tom has a guide dog named Cookie.
guide.zh: 湯姆有一隻導盲犬，名叫曲奇。

row.en: A beautiful woman was seated one row in front of me.
row.zh: 一個美麗的女人坐在我前面一排。

trick.en: You're not trying to trick me, are you?

february.en: He has not written to us since last February.
february.zh: 他從去年二月開始就沒寫信給我們。

cell.en: "Have you seen my cell phone?" "It's on the table."
cell.zh: "你有看到我的手機嗎?" "它在桌子上。"

completely.en: After running up the hill, I was completely out of breath.
completely.zh: 跑上山後，我完全喘不過氣來。

extend.en: I want to extend my stay here for a few more days.
extend.zh: 我想延长这里的住宿多几天。

pair.en: Tom bought a pair of black leather shoes.
pair.zh: 汤姆买了一双黑色皮鞋。

mass.en: Mass production reduced the price of many goods.
mass.zh: 大量生產降低許多商品的價格。

red.en: He anonymously donated a large sum of money to the Red Cross.
red.zh: 他匿名向红十字捐了大笔钱。

dig.en: In 1848, people came to California to dig for gold.

comfortable.en: Large houses are not necessarily comfortable to live in.

association.en: I applied for membership in the association.

accustomed.en: He quickly accustomed himself to his new surroundings.
accustomed.zh: 他很快就适应了新环境。

assistant.en: I worked three years as Tom's assistant.
assistant.zh: 我给汤姆当了三年助手。

pocket.en: The kitchen knife wasn't sharp enough to cut the meat, so I used my pocket knife.
pocket.zh: 这把菜刀不够锋利，所以我用了我的折叠刀来切肉。

counter.en: Where is the United Airlines check-in counter?
counter.zh: 聯合航空公司辦理登機手續的櫃檯在哪裡？

because.en: Because of the rain, we weren't able to play tennis outside.
because.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

improvement.en: Your essay still needs some improvement.

dial.en: In the case of fire, dial 119.

typist.en: She found employment as a typist.

grasp.en: He has a good grasp of English.

picnic.en: I can still remember the time when we went on a picnic together.
picnic.zh: 我还记得我和你一起去野餐的时候。

underneath.en: I found the key underneath the mat.
underneath.zh: 我在擦鞋墊下面發現了這把鑰匙。

contain.en: Carrots contain a lot of vitamin A.
contain.zh: 胡蘿蔔中含有大量的維生素A。

go.en: I would rather stay at home than go out in this hot weather.
go.zh: 在这种暑天里我宁愿呆在家也不出去。

fill.en: Be sure to fill out the registration form in person.
fill.zh: 确保亲自填写注册表格。

overhead.en: I saw a helicopter flying overhead.
overhead.zh: 我看见一架直升飞机在头顶飞。

ours.en: Their apples aren't as tasty as ours.
ours.zh: 他们的苹果没有我们的好吃。

borrow.en: Father ran short of money and had to borrow some.
borrow.zh: 父親缺錢，所以他必須去借點錢。

landing.en: My grandpa believes that the moon landing was a hoax.
landing.zh: 我的祖父相信登月是一個騙局。

urgent.en: If there's anything urgent, you can get in touch with me.
urgent.zh: 紧急情况下，您可以联系我。

roman.en: I'm looking for books on Roman history.
roman.zh: 我在找关于古罗马历史的书。

remind.en: Let me remind you again that March 31st is the due date.
remind.zh: 讓我再次提醒你3月31日是到期日。

power.en: New York's Empire State Building is now running entirely on wind power.
power.zh: 紐約帝國大廈現在完全依靠風力發電。

pick.en: Don't forget to come and pick me up at the train station.

possess.en: It is the things that we do not possess which seem to us most desirable.
possess.zh: 得不到的东西就最想得到。

between.en: Scientists can easily compute the distance between planets.
between.zh: 科學家們可以很容易地計算出行星之間的距離。

badly.en: Tom speaks French so badly that he's often misunderstood.
badly.zh: 湯姆的法文說得很爛，別人經常誤會他。

or.en: I've no way of telling whether or not what he says is true.
or.zh: 我无法判断他的话是真是假。

post.en: If he were a little younger, he would be eligible for the post.
post.zh: 如果他年轻一点，他将很适合这个职位。

awkward.en: The girl made an awkward bow.
awkward.zh: 這個女孩做了一把很難使用的弓。

generally.en: I do not like tea, so I generally drink coffee for breakfast.
generally.zh: 我不喜欢茶，所以我早餐大致上都喝咖啡。

drop.en: Be sure to drop us a line as soon as you get to London.
drop.zh: 别忘了一到伦敦就给我们留言啊。

its.en: Cancer can be cured easily if it is found in its first phase.
its.zh: 癌症如果在第一阶段被发现的话是很容易治愈的。

carry.en: It's one thing to make plans, but quite another to carry them out.
carry.zh: 做计划是一码事，付诸实践是另一码事。

bill.en: The bill was passed after a hard fight in the House.
bill.zh: 該法案在眾議院爭議後獲得通過。

barber.en: "Where have you been?" "I've been to the barber's."
barber.zh: 你去哪儿了？我去了理发店。

payment.en: We will make the payment by bank transfer.
payment.zh: 我们会用银行转帐付款。

tower.en: They wanted a wedding picture in front of the Eiffel Tower.
tower.zh: 他們想在艾菲爾鐵塔前面拍張結婚照。

luggage.en: Sir, can we quickly inspect your luggage please?
luggage.zh: 先生，我們可以檢查一下您的行李嗎？

important.en: Dr. Yukawa played an important part in the scientific study.
important.zh: 汤川博士在科学研究上起了很重要的作用。

off.en: With the weather getting worse, the departure was put off.
off.zh: 由于天气变差，出发延迟了。

dear.en: Dear Santa, I want a girlfriend for Christmas.
dear.zh: 圣诞老人，我想要一个女朋友当圣诞礼物。

coal.en: Australia is the world's fifth-largest coal producer.
coal.zh: 澳大利亚是世界第五大煤炭产地。

afternoon.en: I want this work completed by two o'clock tomorrow afternoon.
afternoon.zh: 明天下午2点以前，我希望这工作完成了。

worthless.en: An eight-year-old car is almost worthless.
worthless.zh: 一輛車齡八年的車子幾乎是毫無價值的。

ultimate.en: Our ultimate goal is to establish world peace.
ultimate.zh: 我们的究极目标是树立世界和平。

moist.en: Winds from the sea are moist.
moist.zh: 从海洋吹来的风感觉湿漉漉的。

anger.en: The Prime Minister's speech was calculated to anger the opposition parties.
anger.zh: 總理的發言估計激怒了在野黨。

april.en: We'll have lived here for two years next April.
april.zh: 到明年四月我们住在这儿就满两年了。

match.en: I always get nervous just before a match.
match.zh: 比赛前我一直都很紧张。

gasoline.en: There is a good chance that gasoline prices will go up.
gasoline.zh: 油价上涨的可能性很高。

how.en: Excuse me, but could you tell me how to get to Central Park?
how.zh: 不好意思，請問到中央公園要怎麼走?

patient.en: The doctor tried every possible means to save his patient.
patient.zh: 为抢救病人医生已尽力了。

wound.en: He cleansed the wound before putting on a bandage.
wound.zh: 他先清洗了伤口，再绑上绷带。

grade.en: Tom did the best he could, but he wasn't able to get a higher grade than Mary.
grade.zh: 汤姆尽了全力，但他还是不能获得比玛丽更高的等级。

enjoy.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
enjoy.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

deceive.en: It's wrong to deceive people, but worse to deceive yourself.
deceive.zh: 欺騙別人是錯的, 但更糟的欺騙自己。

dialog.en: I did not participate in the dialog.

air.en: I can't survive without air conditioning in the summer.

garden.en: Some of the roses in my garden are white, and the others are red.
garden.zh: 我花园里的一部分玫瑰是白色的，其他的是红色的。

look.en: How many times a day do you look at yourself in the mirror?

forever.en: It would take forever for me to explain everything.
forever.zh: 要都解释的话，需要一辈子的时间。

worship.en: Take your hat off when you enter a house of worship.
worship.zh: 當你進入禮拜堂時，把你的帽子脫下來。

glimpse.en: I caught a glimpse of Mt. Fuji from the window of the train.
glimpse.zh: 我從火車車窗瞥見了富士山。

vice.en: They nominated Calvin Coolidge for vice president.
vice.zh: 他们提名卡尔文•柯立芝为副总统。

romantic.en: He's a very romantic boyfriend who brings me flowers each night.
romantic.zh: 他是箇非常浪漫的男朋友，每晚都給我送花。

health.en: An aging population will require more spending on health care.
health.zh: 老龄化的人口需要更多医疗保健支出。

piece.en: Write down the medications you need on this piece of paper.
piece.zh: 将你需要的药物写在这张纸上。

free.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
free.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

robot.en: How could I be a robot? Robots can't dream.
robot.zh: 我怎么可能是机器人呢？机器人不会做梦。

applicable.en: This law is applicable to all cases.

nobody.en: Nobody noticed that she was absent until the meeting ended.
nobody.zh: 直到会议结束之前都没人注意到她不在。

apologize.en: You should apologize to Dad for not coming home in time for supper.
apologize.zh: 你應該為你沒有及時回家吃晚餐向你父親道歉。

government.en: The government should invest more money in agriculture.
government.zh: 政府应该加大对农业的投资。

flower.en: The bathtub was filled with hot water and flower petals.
flower.zh: 浴缸裡滿是熱水和花瓣。

forgive.en: Tom is never going to forgive me, is he?
forgive.zh: 汤姆永远也不会原谅我了，是吗？

eve.en: I'm spending Christmas Eve with my family.

pillar.en: A large pillar obstructs the view of the lake.
pillar.zh: 巨大的柱子遮住了视线，让人看不到湖。

pine.en: There used to be a big pine tree in front of my house.
pine.zh: 以前我家前面有棵大松树。

eighteen.en: She came to Tokyo when she was eighteen years old.

breath.en: After running up the hill, I was completely out of breath.
breath.zh: 跑上山後，我完全喘不過氣來。

gang.en: The gang was planning a robbery.

effort.en: With just a little more effort, he would have succeeded.
effort.zh: 如果他再努力一点，就可能已经成功了。

near.en: The most logical place to keep your shoes is near the door.
near.zh: 最合逻輯的放鞋處是門口附近。

shower.en: I was caught in a shower and got drenched to the skin.
shower.zh: 我遇上了陣雨被淋得全身濕透。

alive.en: If he had taken his doctor's advice, he might still be alive.
alive.zh: 如果他听了他医生的建议，他可能还活着。

indian.en: Taiwanese food is milder than Indian food.
indian.zh: 台灣菜比印度菜口味淡。

serve.en: It's better to chill white wine before you serve it.
serve.zh: 在你侍酒前最好先將白葡萄酒冷卻一下。

fear.en: Do not fear the unexpected, but be prepared for it.
fear.zh: 不要害怕意外，但要有準備。

arithmetic.zh: 准确性在计算中很重要。

dangerous.en: Children should keep away from the river. It's dangerous.
dangerous.zh: 儿童应该远离河流。有危险。

if.en: If I were you, I'd want to know what Tom is doing right now.
if.zh: 如果我是你，我不会想去知道Tom现在正在做什么。

per.en: These cardboard boxes are a hundred per cent recyclable.
per.zh: 這些紙板盒是百分之百可回收的。

loss.en: The company suffered a loss of one billion yen last year.
loss.zh: 那家公司去年亏损了10亿日元。

damp.en: The weather was not only cold, it was also damp.

age.en: At the age of six, I was taken to a circus for the first time.
age.zh: 在我六岁的时候，我第一次被带去看马戏。

vain.en: He endeavored to make his wife happy, but in vain.
vain.zh: 他試著想讓他妻子開心，但是沒有成功。

egg.en: Tom doesn't even know how to fry an egg.
egg.zh: 汤姆甚至连怎么煎鸡蛋都不知道。

june.en: They are leaving in three days, that is to say June 10th.
june.zh: 他們將在三天後離開, 那也就是說在六月十日。

employee.en: She's not a full-time employee of this company.
employee.zh: 她不是這間公司正式的職員。

typical.en: I find that it's typical for him to come too late.
typical.zh: 我發現他就是會很晚才來這樣的人。

all.en: "When will you come back?" "It all depends on the weather."
all.zh: “你什么时候回来？”“这都要看天气。”

india.en: According to my calculation, she should be in India by now.
india.zh: 根據我的估計，她現在應該在印度了。

cottage.en: The old cottage has a certain charm about it.
cottage.zh: 旧村屋有它自己一定的魅力。

skilled.en: My father is a skilled fisherman.

inn.en: A fire broke out at the inn where they were staying.
inn.zh: 火警發生在他們住的旅館。

forty.en: She looks young. However, she's actually over forty.
forty.zh: 她看起来是年轻的，但实际上她四十多岁了。

partial.en: It was only a partial success.

invite.en: I'd like to invite you to the party.

cord.en: This extension cord is too short.

compound.en: Do you know what compound words are?
compound.zh: 你知道什么是复合词吗？

almost.en: Tom almost always uses a credit card when he goes shopping.
almost.zh: 汤姆在去购物的时候，几乎每次都会用信用卡。

normally.en: A sentence normally has a subject and a verb.
normally.zh: 句子通常有主詞和動詞。

ridiculous.en: It would be ridiculous to spend all their money.
ridiculous.zh: 花光他們所有的錢會很荒謬。

balloon.en: The balloon was caught in the tree.

in.en: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
in.zh: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

everyday.en: TV plays an important part in everyday life.
everyday.zh: 电视在日常生活中起着重要的作用。

criminal.en: His son's criminal activities caused him great pain.
criminal.zh: 他儿子的犯罪行为给他带来了很大的痛苦。

cargo.en: The cargo ship arrived four hours early.

four.en: I studied English for four years with a native speaker.
four.zh: 我跟英语母语者学了四年英语。

humid.en: It is extremely hot and humid in Bali in December.
humid.zh: 12月份巴厘岛极其炎热和潮湿。

preparation.en: We failed due to a lack of preparation.
preparation.zh: 我們因缺乏準備而失敗了。

clothes.en: I have so many clothes I don't know what to wear tomorrow.
clothes.zh: 我有那么多衣服，以至于我不知道明天穿什么了。

dusk.en: The children returned home at dusk.
dusk.zh: 夜幕降临时，孩子们回家了。

force.en: I will never force you to marry him.
force.zh: 我永遠不會逼你跟他結婚。

rainy.en: Apart from on rainy days, I always ride my bike to work.
rainy.zh: 除了雨天，我都是骑车去上班的。

formal.en: There's no need for you to prepare a formal speech.
formal.zh: 您没必要准备一个正式的演讲。

fruit.en: I found a good place to buy fruit a couple of days ago.
fruit.zh: 前几天我发现了一个买水果的好地方。

eighty.en: Eighty percent of all information on computers around the world is in English.
eighty.zh: 全世界百分之八十電腦上的資訊都是用英語寫的。

reach.en: Columbus argued that he could reach India by going west.
reach.zh: 哥伦布提出，向西航行可以到达印度。

pound.en: Fish is sold by the pound here.
pound.zh: 魚在這裡是以磅為單位來出售。

beer.en: You might not like this beer at first. It's an acquired taste.
beer.zh: 剛開始的時候你可能不會喜歡這個啤酒。這是需要多次品嚐去習慣它的口味。

accuracy.zh: 准确性在计算中很重要。

poetry.en: They referred to Chaucer as the father of English poetry.
poetry.zh: 他們視喬叟為英詩之父。

island.en: The economy of the island is dependent on the fishing industry.
island.zh: 这个岛的经济依靠的是渔业。

color.en: Blondes earn 7% more than women with any other hair color.
color.zh: 金髮女郎比其他顏色頭髮的女人多賺7％。

extremely.en: Computers are capable of doing extremely complicated work.
extremely.zh: 电脑可以做极为复杂的工作。

certainly.en: You've worked hard for months and have certainly earned a holiday.
certainly.zh: 你已經辛苦地工作好幾個月了, 當然可以休假。

tractor.en: I can't get my tractor started.
tractor.zh: 我發動不了我的拖拉機。

handwriting.en: Do you know whose handwriting this is?

laugh.en: Tom was trying hard not to laugh out loud.

century.en: The old church on the hill dates back to the twelfth century.
century.zh: 山上的老教堂的歷史可以追溯到12世紀。

gravity.en: It's gravity that makes satellites move around the Earth.
gravity.zh: 让卫星环绕地球的是重力。

nursery.zh: 你最喜歡的兒童歌曲是哪首？

resolution.en: My New Year's resolution is to learn how to play the ocarina.
resolution.zh: 我新年的願望是學會吹奧卡利納塤。

disappoint.en: Tom didn't want to disappoint Mary.

silver.en: Speech is silver, but silence is golden.

hesitate.en: Reporters do not hesitate to intrude into people's privacy.
hesitate.zh: 记者没有犹豫地去干涉了人们的私生活。

independence.en: India gained independence from Britain in 1947.
independence.zh: 印度於1947年脫離英國獲得獨立。

manager.en: He is the manager of the marketing department.

brass.en: A brass band is marching along the street.
brass.zh: 一个管弦乐团沿着路前进

band.en: A brass band is marching along the street.
band.zh: 一个管弦乐团沿着路前进

proceed.en: Let's proceed with the items on the agenda.
proceed.zh: 讓我們繼續進行議程上的項目。

from.en: I can usually tell when someone is hiding something from me.
from.zh: 我常常能分辨出来一个人是不是瞒着我什么事情。

always.en: I always enjoy listening to classical music in my free time.
always.zh: 有空的时候，我总喜欢听古典音乐。

honeymoon.en: We want to spend our honeymoon in Australia.
honeymoon.zh: 我们想在澳大利亚过蜜月。

scholar.en: He is something of a scholar.

late.en: We were unable to make contact with them until it was too late.
late.zh: 我们联系上他们已经为时已晚。

germany.en: Germany adopted a social security system in the 1880's.
germany.zh: 德国在1880年代采取了一种社会保障制度。

clearly.en: After I cleaned the window, I could see through it clearly.
clearly.zh: 清潔窗戶後，我能很清楚的從窗戶看出去。

follow.en: You may injure yourself if you don't follow safety procedures.
follow.zh: 如果你不按照安全手续来的话，你可能会受伤的。

pink.en: Who is the woman dressed in pink?
pink.zh: 那個穿粉紅色衣服的女人是誰？

bring.en: Please bring us two cups of tea and one cup of coffee.
bring.zh: 请来两杯茶和一杯咖啡。

ground.en: The house burned to the ground before the fire truck arrived.
ground.zh: 消防车到达之前，房子就全烧了。

film.en: There isn't any film in this camera.

canada.en: In Canada, there are many areas where it is illegal to log trees.
canada.zh: 在加拿大有很多區域砍伐樹木是非法的。

propose.en: I'm going to propose to her.

recorder.en: I got a video cassette recorder cheap at that shop.
recorder.zh: 我在那商店花低價買了臺錄像機。

among.en: He is numbered among the greatest scientists in the world.
among.zh: 他是世界上最伟大的科学家之一。

discussion.en: They came up with a plan after a long discussion.
discussion.zh: 他们终于在漫长的讨论之后得出了一个计划。

republic.en: After the revolution, France became a republic.
republic.zh: 革命之後，法國成為了一個共和國。

yawn.en: Cover your mouth when you cough, sneeze, or yawn.
yawn.zh: 你咳嗽、打喷嚏或打哈欠的时候要捂住你的嘴。

lawn.en: I didn't charge Tom anything to mow his lawn.
lawn.zh: 我修剪湯姆的草坪，沒有向他收取任何費用。

gas.en: The explosion may have been caused by a gas leak.
gas.zh: 這場爆炸有可能是瓦斯外洩引起的。

lemon.en: Bring me a glass of tea with lemon.

advise.en: I advise you never to live beyond your income.
advise.zh: 我建议你永远不要入不敷出。

bank.en: There's a lot of trash on the far bank of the river.

help.en: Tom said that he really did do that without anybody's help.
help.zh: 湯姆說，他真的沒有借助他人協助，自己完成了那件事。

remember.en: I do not remember seeing the letter, but perhaps I read it.
remember.zh: 我不記得我看過這封信, 但或許我讀過它。

telescope.en: Do you know the difference between a microscope and a telescope?
telescope.zh: 你知道显微镜和望远镜的差别吗？

even.en: Some babies learn to swim even before they are one year old.
even.zh: 有些宝宝甚至在一岁之前就学习游泳了。

booth.en: Tom ran and ran, until at last he saw the telephone booth.
booth.zh: 湯姆跑啊跑, 直到他終於看到了電話亭。

final.en: We left the final decision to him.
final.zh: 我們讓他做最後的決定。

tin.en: Can you distinguish silver from tin?

left.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
left.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

farm.en: I've never lived on a farm, but both of my parents grew up on farms.
farm.zh: 我從沒有在農場住，但我的父母都在農場長大。

britain.en: The population of Japan is larger than that of Britain.

mix.en: I don't like to mix business with pleasure.
mix.zh: 我不喜欢把生意和快乐混在一起。

pinch.en: Add a tiny pinch of salt.

fond.en: My grandfather is fond of taking a walk early in the morning.
fond.zh: 我的爷爷喜欢大清早的散步。

expression.zh: 那種表達方式已經過時了。

five.en: We have less than five minutes to evacuate the whole building.
five.zh: 我们有不到五分钟来疏散整栋楼的人。

house.en: I was just about to leave the house when the telephone rang.
house.zh: 我正要离开家的时候电话响了。

knob.en: Turn the knob and open the door.

religion.en: I am interested in Chinese religion.

finish.en: We did not expect him to finish the task in so short a time.
finish.zh: 我们没指望过他在那么短的时间里完成工作。

allow.en: The circumstances did not allow me to go abroad.

keen.en: Dogs have a keen sense of smell.

vitamin.en: Carrots contain a lot of vitamin A.
vitamin.zh: 胡蘿蔔中含有大量的維生素A。

enemy.en: All of a sudden, the enemy bombs came down on us like rain.
enemy.zh: 突然，敵人的炸彈像雨點一樣落向我們。

eight.en: Lots of companies have implemented an eight-hour working day.
eight.zh: 很多公司實行8小時工作制。

cream.en: If you buy me an ice cream, I'll give you a kiss.
cream.zh: 如果你買給我冰淇淋，我就親你一下。

duty.en: There was only one warden on duty when the riot started.
duty.zh: 暴動開始時只有一位監獄長值班。

cousin.en: She was envious of her cousin's success.

clear.en: It's clear that there's a rather strong disagreement between the two.
clear.zh: 很明顯的是這兩者之間有很強烈的分歧。

airplane.en: This airplane is capable of carrying 40 passengers at a time.
airplane.zh: 这架飞机一次可以携带40名乘客。

coat.en: That coat may have cost a lot of money, but it's worth it.
coat.zh: 那件大衣可能需要很多錢，但它值得。

wreck.en: You're going to wreck your eyesight if you play games all the time.
wreck.zh: 要是你老打游戏的话，你的视力会下降的。

affair.en: I have nothing to do with the affair.

cup.en: Tom went into the kitchen and poured himself a cup of coffee.
cup.zh: 汤姆进了厨房，给自己倒了杯咖啡。

chill.en: It's better to chill white wine before you serve it.
chill.zh: 在你侍酒前最好先將白葡萄酒冷卻一下。

hurry.en: If you don't hurry, you'll miss the last train.
hurry.zh: 再不快点你就要赶不上末班车了。

bad.en: Once you've formed a bad habit, you can't get rid of it easily.
bad.zh: 坏习惯一旦被养成，便不能简单地改正。

pig.en: A hungry pig dreams of acorns.

grandfather.en: My grandfather is fond of taking a walk early in the morning.
grandfather.zh: 我的爷爷喜欢大清早的散步。

gain.en: They tried very hard to gain an advantage over one another.
gain.zh: 他們很努力地超過對方獲得優勢。

except.en: Everybody except Tom knew that he didn't need to do that.
except.zh: 除了汤姆以外任何人都知道他没必要这么做。

unexpected.en: A little bit of luck sometimes leads to an unexpected success.
unexpected.zh: 一點點的運氣有時會導致意想不到的成功。

art.en: I would rather go to the art museum than to the movie theater.
art.zh: 我想去美術館勝過去電影院。

buy.en: I think I now have enough money to buy the car that I want.
buy.zh: 我认为我现在有足够的钱买我想要的那辆车。

girl.en: I thought he loved you, but as it is, he loved another girl.
girl.zh: 我以為他愛你，但事實上，他愛另一個女孩。

chess.en: We often played chess after school.
chess.zh: 我們常常在放學後下棋。

kite.en: There is a kite flying above the tree.

move.en: I want to move out of this cramped room as soon as I can.
move.zh: 我想尽快从这个不透气的屋子里出去。

sow.en: Farmers sow seeds in the spring.

interfere.en: You have no right to interfere in other people's affairs.
interfere.zh: 你沒有干涉他人事務的權力。

glue.en: Some furniture is put together with glue.
glue.zh: 一些家具是用膠水黏在一起。

at.en: Everyone in the room checked their watches at the same time.
at.zh: 房间里的所有人都同时看了看自己的手表。

depend.en: Children depend on their parents for food, clothing and shelter.
depend.zh: 孩子们的衣食住行靠的是他们的父母。

entire.en: This is the stupidest thing I've ever seen in my entire life.
entire.zh: 這是我人生中見過最白癡的事。

charge.en: Is there a place where I can charge my cellphone around here?
charge.zh: 这附近有没有可以给手机充电的地方？

behavior.en: Some people felt that Tom's behavior was inappropriate.
behavior.zh: 一部分人感觉Tom的行为举止不太合适。

provided.en: I don't mind lending you the money provided you pay it back within a month.
provided.zh: 假如能一个月之内还上的话，我可以把钱借给你。

clothing.en: Children depend on their parents for food, clothing and shelter.
clothing.zh: 孩子们的衣食住行靠的是他们的父母。

marriage.en: Keep your eyes wide open before marriage, half shut afterwards.
marriage.zh: 婚前張開眼，婚後半閉眼。

kingdom.en: UK is the abbreviation for the United Kingdom.

monday.en: She did not visit me on Sunday but on Monday.
monday.zh: 她沒有在星期天來找我，而是星期一。

arrival.en: The precise time of their arrival is not known.
arrival.zh: 他們到達的確切時間還不明。

knock.en: Please knock before you come in.

fifteen.en: Please be ready in fifteen minutes.

aunt.en: I have a special relationship with my aunt.
aunt.zh: 我和我阿姨有種特別的情誼。

motive.en: Jealousy was the motive for the murder.

capture.en: They would capture as many people as possible.
capture.zh: 他們會盡可能地抓更多的人。

handful.en: Tom bent down and picked up a handful of sand.
handful.zh: 汤姆弯下腰，捧起了一把沙子。

being.en: The rain stopped us from being able to play tennis outside.
being.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

building.en: He bought the land for the purpose of building a house on it.
building.zh: 他买土地目的是要造房子。

crew.en: Modern ships only need a small crew.
crew.zh: 現代船隻只需要一小組的船員。

restless.en: I've been feeling a little restless.

tempt.en: I didn't mean to tempt you.

fix.en: I'll only buy the car if they fix the brakes first.
fix.zh: 除非他们事先修好刹车，我才会买车子。

classroom.en: As soon as the bell rang, the teacher came into the classroom.
classroom.zh: 鐘聲一響起，老師就走進了教室。

daughter.en: The mother missed her daughter who was away at college.
daughter.zh: 妈妈想念她在读大学的女儿。

out.en: I wish I could figure out how to delete my Facebook account.
out.zh: 我希望我能知道如何刪除我的Facebook帳號。

outdoors.en: The party will be held outdoors, weather permitting.
outdoors.zh: 若天氣許可的話，派對將會在戶外舉行。

mark.en: Mark the words that you cannot understand.

consideration.en: The first thing you have to take into consideration is time.
consideration.zh: 你应该考虑的第一件事是时间。

already.en: I've already spoken to Tom about the problems we're having.
already.zh: 我已經跟湯姆講了我們之間的問題。

tune.en: She played a tune on the piano.
tune.zh: 她在鋼琴上彈了一首曲子。

logical.en: The most logical place to keep your shoes is near the door.
logical.zh: 最合逻輯的放鞋處是門口附近。

book.en: This book says that elephants live to be over 100 years old.
book.zh: 这本书上写，大象能活过一百岁。

heavy.en: The accident seemed to have something to do with the heavy snow.
heavy.zh: 事故似乎和厚厚的积雪有关。

peach.en: Tom isn't eating a peach. He's eating a plum.
peach.zh: 湯姆沒有吃桃子，他在吃李子。

danger.en: The red flag indicated the presence of danger.

calculator.en: The batteries in my calculator are dead.
calculator.zh: 我計算機的電池沒電了。

plate.en: On the table, there was a plate with three fried eggs on it.
plate.zh: 桌子上放著一個盤子，上面放著三顆煎蛋。

communication.en: English is a means of communication.
communication.zh: 英語是一種溝通的手段。

rat.en: A cornered rat will bite a cat.

plan.en: My plan is to spend the New Year's holiday in Australia.
plan.zh: 我打算在澳大利亚过新年。

party.en: Tom was the last person Mary expected to see at John's party.
party.zh: 玛丽没料到会在约翰的聚会上见到汤姆。

further.en: The horse stopped and refused to go any further.
further.zh: 馬停了下來，而且拒絕移動。

radio.en: The radio is too loud. Can't you turn it down a little?
radio.zh: 收音机太响了。你不能把音量调低一点吗？

coward.en: She resented being called a coward.
coward.zh: 她對被稱為懦夫很反感。

throat.en: Tom cleared his throat and continued to speak.
throat.zh: 汤姆咳嗽了一下然后接着讲。

ice.en: In the winter, many older people slip on ice and fall down.
ice.zh: 冬天有很多老人在冰上滑倒。

piano.en: Beethoven went over to the piano, sat down and began to play.
piano.zh: 贝多芬走向钢琴，坐下来并开始弹。

discuss.en: There's something I've been meaning to discuss with you.
discuss.zh: 有件事我一直想跟你商量。

refresh.en: Moderate exercise will refresh both mind and body.
refresh.zh: 适度的运动让身心焕然一新。

leader.en: The leader governed his country for more than 50 years.
leader.zh: 這位領導人統治了他的國家五十年。

trim.en: Did you trim the apple trees?

baby.en: The moment I held the baby in my arms, it began to cry.
baby.zh: 我一把孩子抱在手里，他就开始哭了。

wooden.en: The garden was surrounded by a wooden fence.
wooden.zh: 花园被木栅栏围了起来。

honest.en: To be very honest with you, I don't think I can do that.
honest.zh: 和你说句实话，我觉得我做不到。

necklace.en: My grandma gave me this necklace.
necklace.zh: 这条项链是我奶奶送给我的。

merry.en: I wish you a Merry Christmas.

fountain.en: How much does this fountain pen cost?

surroundings.en: He quickly accustomed himself to his new surroundings.
surroundings.zh: 他很快就适应了新环境。

chair.en: This chair is really comfortable to sit on.

back.en: Tom took Mary to the hospital on the back of his motorcycle.
back.zh: 汤姆把玛丽放到他的摩托车背上送到医院。

jacket.en: Put this jacket on, and you'll be much warmer.
jacket.zh: 穿上外套吧！你會暖一些。

rifle.en: He carried a rifle on his shoulder.
rifle.zh: 他把步槍背在他的肩上。

our.en: I think that our living together has influenced your habits.
our.zh: 我觉得我和你一起住影响了你生活的方式。

low.en: Because his salary is low, he can't buy that house.
low.zh: 因為他的薪水太低，他買不起那棟房子。

pretend.en: There's no need to pretend anymore.

bathroom.en: I sometimes hear my father singing in the bathroom.
bathroom.zh: 我有時會聽到父親在浴室裡唱歌。

champion.en: Everyone is anxious to know what has become of the former champion.
champion.zh: 大家都渴望知道前冠军得主发生了什么。

jump.en: The girl was afraid to jump down from the roof.
jump.zh: 小女孩害怕从屋顶上跳下来。

count.en: Tom closed his eyes and began to count sheep.
count.zh: 汤姆闭上了眼睛开始数羊。

orange.en: A girl gave me an orange in exchange for a piece of cake.
orange.zh: 有个女生用一个橙子跟我换了一块蛋糕。

upper.en: Throughout the five years of painful cancer treatments, he managed to keep a stiff upper lip.
upper.zh: 这五年痛苦的癌症治疗他终于坚持下来了。

fridge.en: Get yourself something to eat from the fridge.
fridge.zh: 你去冰箱拿點東西吃吧。

transmission.en: Can you drive a manual transmission?

german.en: He knows German and French, not to mention English.
german.zh: 不提英语，他还会说德语和法语。

british.en: The population of London is much greater than that of any other British city.
british.zh: 倫敦的人口遠遠多於其他英國城市的人口。

series.en: He has just published an interesting series of articles.
series.zh: 他刚发表一系列有趣的文章。

famous.en: London, where I live, used to be famous for its fog.
famous.zh: 我住的地方－倫敦，從前以霧聞名。

only.en: It seems as if I'm the only person here capable of doing it.
only.zh: 看来我是这里唯一有能力做这件事的人。

gold.en: In 1848, people came to California to dig for gold.

breathe.en: I want to breathe some fresh air.
breathe.zh: 我想呼吸一下新鮮空氣。

rainbow.en: Did you see the rainbow this morning?
rainbow.zh: 你见到今天早上的彩虹了吗？

furniture.en: A few years ago, our room had little furniture in it.
furniture.zh: 幾年前，我們的房間裡沒有什麼家具。

college.en: Tom is still uncertain about whether to go to college or not.
college.zh: 汤姆还不清楚要不要上大学。

mother.en: I had hoped that my mother would live until I got married.
mother.zh: 我曾经希望我妈妈能活到我结婚的时候。

hour.en: I waited half an hour for my friend, but he didn't turn up.
hour.zh: 我等了我朋友半個小時，但是他還是沒出現。

feel.en: After reading his books I feel I can construct a house.
feel.zh: 讀完他的書後，我覺得我可以構建一棟房子。

active.en: The volcano has become active again.
active.zh: 這座火山又開始活動了。

game.en: As time went on, rules were added to the game to make it safer.
game.zh: 随着时间的推移，比赛增加了规则以使之更安全。

devil.en: I'm just playing the devil's advocate.

imagination.en: Imagination affects every aspect of our lives.
imagination.zh: 想像力影响着我们生活的各个方面。

opinion.en: In my opinion, it would be difficult to solve this problem.
opinion.zh: 在我看来，这个问题很难解决。

yard.en: Tom planted three apple trees in his yard.
yard.zh: 汤姆在他的院子里种了三棵苹果树。

doctor.en: Is it right for a doctor to decide when someone should die?
doctor.zh: 由医生来决定某人何时该死是对的吗？

dam.en: This dam supplies us with water and electricity.
dam.zh: 这个水坝给我们提供水和电。

soil.en: The crash was and remains to date the deadliest airplane accident on Canadian soil.
soil.zh: 這起空難是迄今為止加拿大境內最嚴重的空難。

earth.en: What do you think would happen if the earth stopped spinning?
earth.zh: 如果地球停止自传，你认为会发生什么？

alphabet.en: I remember my mother teaching me the alphabet.
alphabet.zh: 我记得我母亲教我认字。

lucky.en: It was lucky for you that you found it.

regret.en: We apologize for the delay and regret any inconvenience it may have caused.
regret.zh: 我们对这次的延迟表示抱歉，并对可能造成的不便表示遗憾。

area.en: It is said that treasure is buried in this area.
area.zh: 据说这个区域埋着财宝。

ocean.en: He crossed the Pacific Ocean in thirty days.

everything.en: There's no time to tell you everything you need to know.
everything.zh: 没时间告诉你一切你需要知道的事情。

total.en: What is the total amount of money you spent?

check.en: Did you check all the items on the shopping list?
check.zh: 你把購物單上的全都檢查過了嗎？

cheap.en: The food in the cafeteria is cheap, and it's delicious.
cheap.zh: 餐廳的飯很便宜，而且很好吃。

anyway.en: We're all going to die anyway.
anyway.zh: 不管怎样，我们所有人都将死。

string.en: A string of disasters struck the region.
string.zh: 一連串的災難襲擊這個地區。

memory.en: What I hate most of all is having to recite texts from memory.

behind.en: Step out of the car and place your hands behind your back.

false.en: The truth is that nothing is totally true or false.
false.zh: 真相是沒有甚麼完全正確或錯誤。

increase.en: The number of traffic accidents seems to be on the increase.
increase.zh: 交通事故的数量似乎在增长。

constitution.en: Equality is guaranteed by the Constitution.

raw.en: Japan imports various raw materials from abroad.
raw.zh: 日本從國外進口各種原料。

polite.en: I suggest we drink as little as possible to be polite.
polite.zh: 我建议，为了礼貌起见，我们尽可能少喝。

box.en: She tried to lift the box, but found it impossible to do.
box.zh: 她試了試舉起箱子，但舉不起來。

square.en: The area of the factory is 1,000 square meters.

pray.en: There's nothing we can do to save Tom at this point. All we can do is pray.
pray.zh: 現在我們什麼也做不了，救不了湯姆。我們唯一能做的就是祈禱。

attraction.en: The coral reef is the region's prime attraction.
attraction.zh: 珊瑚礁是这个地区的主要景点。

decrease.en: This medicine will decrease your pain.
decrease.zh: 这种药会减轻你的疼痛。

cave.en: "What's going on in the cave? I'm curious." "I have no idea."
cave.zh: “洞里发生了什么？我很好奇。”“我一点也不知道。”

banana.en: Have you ever eaten a banana pie?

unknown.en: The suspect's gender is currently unknown.

material.en: She is collecting material for a book.

male.en: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
male.zh: 我有三只狗，其中一只是公的，另外两只是母的。

circle.en: She drew a circle on a piece of paper with a pencil.
circle.zh: 她用铅笔在纸上画了一个圈。

news.en: According to TV news, there was a plane crash in India.
news.zh: 根据电视新闻，一架飞机在印度坠毁了。

suspicious.en: This statement is actually kind of suspicious.
suspicious.zh: 这种说法其实有点可疑。

shoot.en: My camera can shoot high-definition video.
shoot.zh: 我的录像机可以拍高清视频。

publication.en: Publication of the article was timed to coincide with the professor's birthday.
publication.zh: 文章的发表被预定在教授生日那天。

possibility.en: There's a possibility that you'll have to do that.
possibility.zh: 你有可能不得不那么做。

lie.en: You can lie to everyone else, but you can't lie to yourself.
lie.zh: 你可以向别人撒谎，但你不会向自己撒谎。

quarrel.en: Every time they meet, they quarrel.

here.en: His bag is right here, so he cannot have gone to school yet.
here.zh: 他的包就在这儿，所以他不可能已经去了学校。

example.en: You should set a good example for your children.
example.zh: 你应该给你的孩子们树立好榜样。

bible.en: According to the Bible, God created the world in six days.
bible.zh: 根据圣经记载，上帝用6天创造了世界。

forest.en: She slowly disappeared into the foggy forest.
forest.zh: 她緩緩消失在霧氣瀰漫的森林中。

reasonable.en: Tom bought this camera for a reasonable price.
reasonable.zh: Tom用合理的價格買了相機。

lower.en: I think we should lower the price.
lower.zh: 我觉得我们得调低价格。

musician.en: In her opinion, he is the best musician she has ever seen.
musician.zh: 她認為他是她所見過最好的音樂家。

trunk.en: Go upstairs and bring down my trunk.
trunk.zh: 上樓把我的旅行箱拿下來。

customer.en: We're looking for someone who has experience in customer service.
customer.zh: 我們正在尋找具有客服工作經驗的人。

moderate.en: Moderate exercise will refresh both mind and body.
moderate.zh: 适度的运动让身心焕然一新。

cope.en: Tom found Mary's constant criticism of him hard to cope with.
cope.zh: 汤姆认为和经常批评他的玛丽很难相处。

king.en: We are here in the name of Jesus Christ and King Charles.
king.zh: 我們這裡以耶穌基督和查理斯國王之名。

member.en: Because of his wealth, he was able to become a member of that club.
member.zh: 由於他的財富，他能夠成為這個俱樂部的成員。

passport.en: She was in trouble because she lost her passport.
passport.zh: 她遇到了麻煩，因為她弄丟了她的護照。

reduction.en: He advocated the reduction of taxes.

childhood.en: When I heard that song, it reminded me of my childhood.
childhood.zh: 我一聽到那首歌，就想起來我小的時候。

corner.en: As we went around the corner, the lake came into view.
corner.zh: 当我们走到转角处，湖就映入了眼帘。

grandmother.en: My grandmother mailed the letter this morning.
grandmother.zh: 今天早上我祖母寄出了这封信。

lightning.en: The taller the tree, the more likely it is to be struck by lightning.

of.en: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
of.zh: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

hopeful.en: I feel hopeful about the future.

invisible.en: If I were invisible, I wouldn't have to wear anything.
invisible.zh: 若我是隱形的，就不用穿衣服了。

noun.en: In this case, the adjective goes before the noun.
noun.zh: 在这种情况下，形容词放在名词前面。

blend.en: Blend the mixture together until it is smooth.

electronic.en: The good thing about this electronic dictionary is that it's easy to carry.
electronic.zh: 这电子辞典的好处就是便于携带。

fire.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
fire.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

ahead.en: If you can't come, you should let me know ahead of time.
ahead.zh: 如果你不能來，你該讓我提前知道。

eleven.en: It is close to eleven. It's about time we went to bed.
eleven.zh: 快11点了。我们该上床睡觉了。

by.en: He asked me questions similar to those asked by many others.
by.zh: 他和许多其他人一样问了我同样的问题。

main.en: The main problem with Tom is that he has no sense of humor.
main.zh: 汤姆的主要问题是他一点幽默感都没有

candy.en: I never should've let Tom eat so much candy.
candy.zh: 我不論甚麼時候都不該讓湯姆吃那麼多糖。

repeatedly.en: I can't believe you are eating something the doctor has told you repeatedly you shouldn't eat.
repeatedly.zh: 真的不敢相信你在吃医生叮嘱不要食用的东西。

explanation.en: The explanation is by no means satisfactory.
explanation.zh: 這個解釋不是很令人滿意。

mainly.en: That company deals mainly in imported goods.
mainly.zh: 這公司主要做進口貨物的生意。

data.en: As is evident from the data, smoking is not decreasing among the young.
data.zh: 数据表明年轻人抽烟的现象没有减少。

pollution.en: Environmental pollution is causing abnormal weather conditions.
pollution.zh: 環境污染正造成異常的天氣情況。

possession.en: The ball is that boy's prized possession.
possession.zh: 这个球是那个男孩的宝贝。

have.en: Every great writer seems to have been interested in English.
have.zh: 每一個偉大的作家似乎已經對英語感興趣。

boy.en: He quickly made friends with the new boy on the block.
boy.zh: 他很快便与小区里新来的男孩交上了朋友。

crawl.en: She knows how to do the crawl.

employment.en: They guaranteed regular employment to their workers.
employment.zh: 他們對他們的員工保證就業。

difficult.en: In my opinion, it would be difficult to solve this problem.
difficult.zh: 在我看来，这个问题很难解决。

twin.en: He mistook me for my twin brother.
twin.zh: 他把我誤認為我的雙胞胎兄弟。

political.en: It takes time to develop political awareness.
political.zh: 培养政治意识要花费时间。

statue.en: The statue of Hachiko, the faithful dog, stands in front of Shibuya Station.
statue.zh: 忠犬八公的雕像伫立在涩谷站前。

union.en: The Cold War ended when the Soviet Union collapsed.

northwest.en: They marched northwest into the Shenandoah Valley.
northwest.zh: 他們向西北方向進軍，進入了謝南多厄河谷。

oneself.en: To have doubts about oneself is the first sign of intelligence.
oneself.zh: 自我怀疑是聪明的第一标志。

veteran.zh: 汤姆是一个越军退役军人。

span.en: The life span of a butterfly is short.

bunch.en: The young man saved the girl from a bunch of hoodlums.
bunch.zh: 该名青年将少女从流氓团伙中救了出来。

hobby.en: My hobby is taking pictures of wild flowers.
hobby.zh: 我的业余爱好是拍野花的照片。

insect.en: What do you call this insect in English?
insect.zh: 这种昆虫在英语中叫什么？

he.en: He asked me questions similar to those asked by many others.
he.zh: 他和许多其他人一样问了我同样的问题。

eat.en: The best way to lose weight is to eat less and exercise more.
eat.zh: 最好的減肥方法就是少吃多運動。

add.en: Is there anything you want to add to what I just said?
add.zh: 我刚才说的内容，你想补充么？

growth.en: The third quarter GNP growth was 1% over the preceding quarter.
growth.zh: 第三季國民生產總值較上一季成長了1％。

strange.en: This story may sound strange, but it's absolutely true.
strange.zh: 這個故事聽起來可能很奇怪，但卻是千真萬確的。

invention.en: The washing machine is a wonderful invention.
invention.zh: 洗衣機是一個很棒的發明。

female.en: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
female.zh: 我有三只狗，其中一只是公的，另外两只是母的。

disaster.en: It sounds as if he were to blame for the disaster.
disaster.zh: 听起来好像他是这场灾难的罪魁祸首。

headache.en: I've had a headache for three days and I can't get rid of it.
headache.zh: 我已经头疼三天了，还没摆脱它。

damage.en: Our employees are working around the clock to fix the damage caused by the ice storm.
damage.zh: 我们的员工正在争分夺秒地修理冰暴带来的损坏。

store.en: There is a bookstore in front of the department store.

conduct.en: One must be responsible for one's conduct.
conduct.zh: 人要为自己的行为负责。

naked.en: My little brother ran through the living room stark naked.
naked.zh: 我弟弟全身光溜溜地跑過客廳。

radar.en: The ship is not equipped with radar.

birthday.en: We all chipped in to buy our teacher a birthday present.
birthday.zh: 我们所有人凑份子给老师买生日礼物。

precise.en: The precise time of their arrival is not known.
precise.zh: 他們到達的確切時間還不明。

reality.en: She looks young, but in reality she's over 40.
reality.zh: 她看起来是年轻的，但实际上她四十多岁了。

give.en: A little walk will give you a good appetite for breakfast.
give.zh: 散散步將會給你很好的食慾吃早餐。

end.en: All subscriptions must be paid before the end of this year.
end.zh: 所有訂購必須在今年年底前支付款項。

rust.en: A bicycle will rust if you leave it in the rain.
rust.zh: 如果你把自行車留在雨中，它會生鏽的。

disagree.en: I agree on an emotional level, but on the pragmatic level I disagree.
disagree.zh: 我感情上支持，但是理性上反对。

engineer.en: The engineer told us how to use the machine.
engineer.zh: 工程师告诉我们如何使用机器。

plain.en: Could you say that in plain English?

automobile.zh: 这家工厂生产汽车配件。

noon.en: The train will probably arrive at the station before noon.
noon.zh: 火车大概会在中午前到站。

least.en: Tom has been to this park with Mary at least a dozen times.
least.zh: 湯姆跟瑪麗來這公園至少十二次。

do.en: I think you should let Tom know you can't do that next week.
do.zh: 我認為你應該告訴湯姆你下週做不了。

national.en: He's a professor at the National University.
national.zh: 他是国立大学的一名教授。

suit.en: Tom only wears a suit on special occasions.
suit.zh: 湯姆只在特殊場合穿西裝。

needless.en: Needless to say, fundamental human rights should be respected.
needless.zh: 無須多言，基本人權應當被尊重。

laser.en: Laser printers are generally cheaper to maintain than inkjet printers.
laser.zh: 激光打印机一般比喷墨打印机用起来更省钱。

pain.en: Tom had a pain in his chest, so he went to the hospital.
pain.zh: 汤姆胸痛，所以去了医院。

noticeable.en: There are noticeable differences between the two.
noticeable.zh: 两者之间有显著的差别。

hate.en: What I hate most of all is having to recite texts from memory.

point.en: I'm afraid that I differ with you on this point.
point.zh: 恐怕就这点上，我和你持不同意见。

live.en: This book says that elephants live to be over 100 years old.
live.zh: 这本书上写，大象能活过一百岁。

horizon.en: The sun went below the horizon.

july.en: We have a lot of rain in June and July.

sake.en: I stopped smoking for the sake of my health.

tendency.en: It seems to me that she has a tendency to exaggerate.
tendency.zh: 在我看來，她有一種誇張的傾向。

father.en: Father would often read detective stories in his spare time.
father.zh: 父亲常常在空闲时间读侦探小说。

ready.en: The cake should just about be ready to be taken out of the oven.
ready.zh: 蛋糕應該差不多可以出爐了。

path.en: The path zigzagged up the steep slope.
path.zh: 這條小路沿著陡峭的斜坡蜿蜒而上。

helmet.en: You need to wear a helmet.
helmet.zh: 你需要戴安全帽。你需要戴頭盔。

information.en: Tom doesn't care about protecting his personal information online.
information.zh: 湯姆上網時並不在乎個人資訊的保護。

tidy.en: The cottage was clean and tidy.

eagle.en: If the lion is the king of beasts, the eagle is the king of birds.
eagle.zh: 狮子是兽类之王的话，鹰就是鸟类之王。

belt.en: Tom would still be alive if he had been wearing his seat belt.
belt.zh: 要是汤姆系上安全带的话，他就不会死的。

open.en: Keep your eyes wide open before marriage, half shut afterwards.
open.zh: 婚前張開眼，婚後半閉眼。

cage.en: He thought that it was like a bird cage.

width.en: What's the width of this road?

argue.en: Tom and Mary argue with each other all the time.
argue.zh: 汤姆和玛丽无时无刻不在辩论。

herself.en: She wears high heels to make herself look taller.
herself.zh: 她穿著高跟鞋，這樣顯得更高一些。

potato.en: I shouldn't have eaten the whole bag of potato chips.
potato.zh: 我不该把一整包薯片都吃完的。

dye.en: India ink produces an interesting pattern when used as a dye.
dye.zh: 墨汁用作染料时会产生有趣的图案。

condition.en: We will only consent on that condition.
condition.zh: 我们只会在那样的条件下同意。

deaf.en: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
deaf.zh: 善良是聾子能聽盲人能看的語言。

prize.en: After winning the Nobel prize, she remained as modest as ever.
prize.zh: 獲得諾貝爾獎後，她仍謙虛如昔。

knit.en: Tom tried to convince Mary to knit him a scarf.
knit.zh: 湯姆想說服瑪麗給他織一條圍巾。

neither.en: If you are not going to the concert, then neither am I.
neither.zh: 如果你不去音樂會, 我也不去。

register.en: Could you please sign the register?
register.zh: 請您在登記冊上簽名好嗎？

flu.en: I was vaccinated against the flu.

continent.en: Columbus sailed farther west to look for a new continent.
continent.zh: 哥伦布航行至遥远的西方，去寻找一个新大陆。

boil.en: I'll boil the potatoes for you.

log.en: In Canada, there are many areas where it is illegal to log trees.
log.zh: 在加拿大有很多區域砍伐樹木是非法的。

grass.en: Cows are eating grass in the meadow.

first.en: The first thing you have to take into consideration is time.
first.zh: 你应该考虑的第一件事是时间。

layout.zh: 我改了一下我网站的版面设计。

business.en: We take it for granted that he will succeed in his business.
business.zh: 我们认为他的生意理所当然会获得成功。

photograph.en: My grandfather's photograph is on the wall.
photograph.zh: 我祖父的照片在墙上挂着。

fisherman.en: My father is a skilled fisherman.

love.en: If a guy's in love with you, he'll think about you all the time.
love.zh: 如果一個男生愛你，他會時時刻刻想著你。

arrive.en: The train will probably arrive at the station before noon.
arrive.zh: 火车大概会在中午前到站。

impatient.en: Tom told me he thought Mary would be impatient.
impatient.zh: 湯姆告訴我，他以為瑪莉會有耐心。

novel.en: This novel is more interesting than the one I read last week.
novel.zh: 這本小說比我上週看的那本有意思。

forward.en: We are all looking forward to seeing you and your family.
forward.zh: 我们都期待看到你和你的家人。

nail.en: To the man who only has a hammer in the toolkit, every problem looks like a nail.
nail.zh: 对工具箱里只有一把榔头的人来说，所有的问题都像钉子。

fail.en: That kind of person will definitely fail.

disturb.en: I'll try not to disturb you while you're studying.
disturb.zh: 我会尽量不打扰你复习。

exciting.en: What's the most exciting thing you've done this year?
exciting.zh: 你今年做的最刺激的事是什么？

day.en: How many times a day do you look at yourself in the mirror?

onto.en: If we'd arrived ten minutes earlier, we would've made it onto the plane.
onto.zh: 要是我们早十分钟到的话，我们就能赶上飞机了。

ninety.en: It's valid until March thirty-first, nineteen-ninety-seven.

plot.en: They accused him of being part of the plot.
plot.zh: 人們指控他參與了這場陰謀。

hotel.en: If you stay at a big hotel, you can use their swimming pool.
hotel.zh: 若你住到的是大的旅館，就能使用他們的游泳池。

concentrate.en: I can't concentrate on my work because of the noise.
concentrate.zh: 由于噪音，我无法集中精力工作了。

achievement.en: The moon landing was a monumental achievement.
achievement.zh: 登月是一項里程碑式的成就。

comparison.en: In comparison with Tokyo, London is small.

build.en: You can't build buildings on swampy land.
build.zh: 你不能在沼澤地上建造建築物。

festival.en: They helped one another to make the school festival a success.
festival.zh: 他们互帮互助，把校庆搞得很成功。

face.en: Tom wouldn't dare show his face around here again.
face.zh: 汤姆不敢再到这里露面。

cycle.en: Usually I cycle or get the bus to work.
cycle.zh: 我通常骑自行车或乘公交车去上班。

deny.en: We can't deny the fact that he's honest.
deny.zh: 我们无法否认，他确实是很诚实的人。

empire.en: New York's Empire State Building is now running entirely on wind power.
empire.zh: 紐約帝國大廈現在完全依靠風力發電。

surgery.en: Cosmetic surgery is not covered by most insurance plans.
surgery.zh: 大部份的保險計劃不包含整容手術。

fortune.en: He amassed a fortune in stock trading during the last boom.
fortune.zh: 他在上个景气时期炒股攒下了一笔钱。

interesting.en: India ink produces an interesting pattern when used as a dye.
interesting.zh: 墨汁用作染料时会产生有趣的图案。

again.en: Tom doesn't quite get it. Could you explain it to him again?
again.zh: 湯姆不大明白。你能再跟他解釋一遍嗎？

letter.en: Tom translated a letter from French to English for his boss.
letter.zh: 汤姆为他的老板把一封信从法语翻译成了英语。

effective.en: Preventive measures are much more effective than the actual treatment.
effective.zh: 预防措施比真正的治疗更有效。

eye.en: You nearly poked me in the eye with your pencil.
eye.zh: 你的鉛筆差點戳到我的眼睛了。

card.en: Tom almost always uses a credit card when he goes shopping.
card.zh: 汤姆在去购物的时候，几乎每次都会用信用卡。

bush.en: A bird in the hand is better than two in the bush.
bush.zh: 一鳥在手勝過二鳥在林。

basic.en: Mathematics is basic to all sciences.
basic.zh: 數學是所有科學的基礎。

director.en: They appointed him as a director.

own.en: We should try to avoid imposing our own beliefs on others.
own.zh: 我們應該盡量避免把我們自己的信念強加在別人身上。

blast.en: News of the recent blast is all over the radio.
blast.zh: 收音機廣播充斥著有關最近爆炸的新聞。

mathematics.en: Mathematics is an easy subject for me.
mathematics.zh: 數學對我來說是一個容易的科目。

oak.en: When it's windy, the leaves of the old oak rustle and its branches creak.
oak.zh: 刮風的時候，老橡樹的葉子會沙沙作響，樹枝會發出嘎吱聲。

no.en: Because of the storm, we had no choice but to stay at home.
no.zh: 因為暴風雨的關係，所以我們必須待在家裡。

somebody.en: We're looking for somebody who has experience in customer service.
somebody.zh: 我們正在尋找具有客服工作經驗的人。

urban.en: More and more people are moving to urban areas.
urban.zh: 越來越多的人遷往市區。

ink.en: India ink produces an interesting pattern when used as a dye.
ink.zh: 墨汁用作染料时会产生有趣的图案。

parallel.en: The opposite sides of a parallelogram are parallel.
parallel.zh: 平行四边形的对边平行。

cassette.en: I got a video cassette recorder cheap at that shop.
cassette.zh: 我在那商店花低價買了臺錄像機。

fifth.en: Australia is the world's fifth-largest coal producer.
fifth.zh: 澳大利亚是世界第五大煤炭产地。

organization.en: The organization furnished the refugees with food.
organization.zh: 那个团体为难民们提供食品供给。

hall.en: Do you know how far it is from the station to city hall?
hall.zh: 你知道从火车站到市政府有多远？

continue.en: We will continue the meeting after some light refreshments.
continue.zh: 茶点过后我们接着开会。

unless.en: You don't have to go to the party unless you want to.
unless.zh: 除非你想去, 否則你不必去這個派對。

manage.en: You should be able to manage it.

owner.en: Nobody understood why the elephant suddenly turned on its owner.
owner.zh: 没有人明白为什么大象突然攻击了它的主人。

weep.en: My mother did nothing but weep.
weep.zh: 我的母亲只是默默地哭泣。

vacuum.en: I got this vacuum cleaner for nothing.
vacuum.zh: 我免費得到了這個吸塵器。

realize.en: Life begins when we realize who we really are.
realize.zh: 当我们明白真正的自己时，生活开始了。

relief.en: This medicine will give you some relief.

laboratory.en: This laboratory is equipped with the latest computers.
laboratory.zh: 这个实验室配备了最新的计算机。

brush.en: Most people brush their teeth at least two times a day.
brush.zh: 多数人每天至少刷两次牙。

microscope.en: Do you know the difference between a microscope and a telescope?
microscope.zh: 你知道显微镜和望远镜的差别吗？

emperor.en: The princess begged forgiveness from the emperor.

candle.en: When the lights went out, Tom lit a candle.
candle.zh: 灯灭了，汤姆点起了蜡烛。

adult.en: Two adult tickets and three children's tickets to London, please.
adult.zh: 请给我两张到伦敦的成人票，三张儿童票。

glad.en: I'm glad that they fixed the heating system, but now it's too hot.
glad.zh: 我很高興他們修復了暖氣系統，但現在太熱了。

radiation.en: The ozone in the stratosphere absorbs ultraviolet radiation.
radiation.zh: 平流層的臭氧會吸收紫外線。

dog.en: If you feed your dog properly, you can increase his lifespan.
dog.zh: 合理地喂狗可以延长宠物寿命。

huge.en: Seen from the sky, the river looked like a huge snake.
huge.zh: 从天上看下来，这条河像一条巨蛇。

few.en: I'll sauté a few sweet potatoes and sprinkle them with sugar.
few.zh: 我去炸一點紅薯，然後在上面撒上糖。

angel.en: This morning, I saw an angel.

handsome.en: Tom wasn't as handsome as Mary said he was.
handsome.zh: 汤姆并不是玛丽说得那样英俊。

class.en: I can't believe that you were the smartest kid in your class.
class.zh: 我不敢相信你是你们班里面最聪明的孩子。

nation.en: Every nation, rich or poor, has its strengths and weaknesses.
nation.zh: 每个国家，无论贫富，都有其长，都有其短。

message.en: "Shall I take a message?" "No, thank you."
message.zh: “需要我为您留个口信儿吗？”“不用了，谢谢。”

pack.en: She helped me pack my suitcase.
pack.zh: 她幫我打包我的手提箱。

black.en: I have two dogs. One is white and the other black.
black.zh: 我有两条狗。一条是白色的，另一条是黑色的。

lend.en: I'll lend you the book as soon as I'm done reading it.
lend.zh: 我一把这本书读完了就借给你。

reflection.en: Tom looked at his reflection in the mirror.
reflection.zh: 汤姆看他在镜中的映像。

sail.en: Tom is teaching me to how to sail.
sail.zh: 汤姆正在教我怎么开帆船。

france.en: France is running a welfare state it can no longer afford.
france.zh: 法國是一個福利國家，但它卻不再能夠負擔得起了。

cafeteria.en: The food in the cafeteria is cheap, and it's delicious.
cafeteria.zh: 餐廳的飯很便宜，而且很好吃。

ideal.en: The beach is an ideal place for children to play.
ideal.zh: 海滩是一个供孩子们玩乐的理想场所。

sample.en: The sample is not pure enough.

joy.en: Her eyes shone with joy when she saw that her mother was not mad at her.
joy.zh: 當她看到媽媽沒在生她的氣，她的雙眼因為幸福而閃爍了。

navy.en: Mary was wearing a navy blue skirt.
navy.zh: 玛丽穿着深蓝色的裙子。

fabric.en: The dress is made of a thin fabric.
fabric.zh: 這件衣服是由薄織物製成的。

staff.en: The entire sales staff has worked around the clock for a week.
staff.zh: 全体销售人员通宵达旦地工作了一周。

repeat.en: Could you please repeat what you just said?
repeat.zh: 您可以再重复一遍刚才说的话吗？

fence.en: The garden was surrounded by a wooden fence.
fence.zh: 花园被木栅栏围了起来。

necessary.en: You'd better remember that tipping is necessary in the USA.
necessary.zh: 你最好記住，在美國給小費是必須的。

read.en: Father would often read detective stories in his spare time.
read.zh: 父亲常常在空闲时间读侦探小说。

and.en: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
and.zh: 我有三只狗，其中一只是公的，另外两只是母的。

junior.en: I'm not a junior high school student.

leading.en: The prosecutor asked me a leading question.
leading.zh: 检察官问了我一个引导性的问题。

spur.en: More money for education will spur economic growth.
spur.zh: 更多投資在教育的錢將會刺激經濟成長。

climate.en: Generally speaking, the climate of Japan is mild.
climate.zh: 总体上说，日本的气候温和。

frost.en: We had a heavy frost this morning.

leak.en: The explosion may have been caused by a gas leak.
leak.zh: 這場爆炸有可能是瓦斯外洩引起的。

apart.en: Apart from on rainy days, I always ride my bike to work.
apart.zh: 除了雨天，我都是骑车去上班的。

passenger.en: Tom put the large picnic basket on the passenger seat next to him.
passenger.zh: 汤姆把那个大野餐篮子放在他旁边的乘客座位上。

precious.en: Time is the most precious thing in the world.
precious.zh: 时间是世界上最宝贵的东西。

kind.en: Pizza is the kind of food that fits into today's life style.
kind.zh: 比萨是种适合现在的生活方式的食物。

helpful.en: It would be helpful if you could do that for me.
helpful.zh: 您那样做的话，可就帮到我了。

apology.zh: 汤姆不接受玛丽的道歉。

lighten.en: It was just a joke. Lighten up!

hot.en: I would rather stay at home than go out in this hot weather.
hot.zh: 在这种暑天里我宁愿呆在家也不出去。

civil.en: If it had not been for civil war, they would be wealthy now.
civil.zh: 要不是当初有内战，他们现在应该挺富裕了。

able.en: Because of the rain, we weren't able to play tennis outside.
able.zh: 由于下雨，我们没能上外头打网球。

drive.en: Be careful not to drive the wrong way on a one-way street.
drive.zh: 小心不要在单行道逆向行驶。

eleventh.en: A stay of execution was ordered at the eleventh hour.
eleventh.zh: 缓期执行在最后关头决定了下来。

old.en: Some babies learn to swim even before they are one year old.
old.zh: 有些宝宝甚至在一岁之前就学习游泳了。

night.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
night.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

highly.en: I know that it is highly unlikely that anyone knows me.
highly.zh: 我知道有人认识我的可能性微乎其微。

full.en: This week the cherry blossoms in the park are in full bloom.

foot.en: How long does it take to get from here to your house on foot?
foot.zh: 从这里步行到你家要多长时间？

tag.en: I'm going to run a couple of errands. Wanna tag along?
tag.zh: 我要去购物。你要跟着来吗？

cash.en: Tom handed the envelope full of cash to Mary.
cash.zh: 汤姆把装满现金的信封递给玛丽。

movie.en: I would rather go to the art museum than to the movie theater.
movie.zh: 我想去美術館勝過去電影院。

although.en: Although I enjoy bowling, I haven't gone bowling recently.
although.zh: 虽然我享受打保龄球，但是我最近没有去打保龄球。

event.en: On the whole, the event was successful.
event.zh: 整體而言，這個事件是成功的。

jam.en: Please hide the blueberry jam where Takako can't see it.
jam.zh: 把蓝莓酱藏在享子看不到的地方。

pot.en: Put the carrots in the pot.

murder.en: The court declared him innocent on the charge of murder.
murder.zh: 法庭对他的谋杀罪名作出了无罪判决。

language.en: Language is the means by which people communicate with others.
language.zh: 语言是人们与他人交流的手段。

lunch.en: I slept a little during lunch break because I was so tired.
lunch.zh: 我在午休时间睡了一会儿，因为我太累了。

form.en: You should try to form the habit of using your dictionaries.
form.zh: 你们该养成使用字典的习惯。

mobile.en: I need to charge my mobile phone.

dim.en: I have a dim memory of my grandmother.
dim.zh: 我对祖母的记忆很模糊。

death.en: He took care of the business after his father's death.
death.zh: 在他父亲死后，他接管了公司。

pork.en: Beef is usually more expensive than pork.

expect.en: We did not expect him to finish the task in so short a time.
expect.zh: 我们没指望过他在那么短的时间里完成工作。

disorder.en: Tom thinks that Mary may have an eating disorder.
disorder.zh: 汤姆认为玛丽可能有进食障碍。

jaw.en: He got a broken jaw and lost some teeth.
jaw.zh: 他磕碎了下巴，掉了几颗牙。

practically.en: Tom would do practically anything to keep Mary happy.
practically.zh: 為了哄瑪莉開心，湯姆幾乎會做任何事。

sweep.en: You have to sweep the floor.

countryside.en: There are lots of trees in the countryside.

miss.en: He hurried to the station so he wouldn't miss the train.
miss.zh: 为了不错过火车，他匆匆赶往了车站。

hundred.en: No less than three hundred dollars was needed for the work.
hundred.zh: 这个工作需要不低于300美金。

tube.en: Please buy a tube of toothpaste.

jungle.en: He wrote a book about a jungle adventure.
jungle.zh: 他写了一本关于丛林冒险的书。

fool.en: That's nonsense. Nobody but a fool would believe it.
fool.zh: 那是無稽之談。只有傻瓜才會相信。

anybody.en: Tom said that he really did do that without anybody's help.
anybody.zh: 湯姆說，他真的沒有借助他人協助，自己完成了那件事。

depth.en: We measured the depth of the river.
depth.zh: 我们测量了这条河的深度。

tire.en: Could you check the tire pressure?
tire.zh: 你能檢查一下這個輪胎的氣壓嗎？

god.en: According to the Bible, God created the world in six days.
god.zh: 根据圣经记载，上帝用6天创造了世界。

habit.en: You should try to form the habit of using your dictionaries.
habit.zh: 你们该养成使用字典的习惯。

dare.en: Tom wouldn't dare show his face around here again.
dare.zh: 汤姆不敢再到这里露面。

thunder.en: Lightning is usually followed by thunder.

enter.en: People who drink alcoholic beverages are not allowed to enter.

introduce.en: I think the time is right to introduce this product.
introduce.zh: 我覺得現在是發表這個產品的好時機。

pool.en: If you stay at a big hotel, you can use their swimming pool.
pool.zh: 若你住到的是大的旅館，就能使用他們的游泳池。

telegram.en: Send us a telegram when you arrive.
telegram.zh: 當你到的時候發一份電報給我們。

lifetime.en: An opportunity like this only comes along once in a lifetime.
lifetime.zh: 一辈子只会出现一次像这样的机会。

control.en: It was before dawn that they got the fire under control.
control.zh: 他们在黎明前控制住了火势。

lab.en: The air conditioner in the lab is broken.

disable.en: I wish I could figure out how to disable comments on my blog.
disable.zh: 但愿我能找到在我的博客上屏蔽评论的办法。

gate.en: The gate is so narrow that the car can't pass through it.
gate.zh: 门太窄了，这辆车通不过。

fame.en: Even with all his wealth and fame, he's unhappy.
fame.zh: 尽管有金钱和名誉，他还是不幸福。

doubtful.en: I am doubtful whether he will come.

concert.en: Do you know the concert schedule of London Symphony Orchestra?
concert.zh: 你知道伦敦交响乐团的演奏会行程吗？

slice.en: Will you have another slice of pie?

celebrate.en: The contract is in the bag, so let's go out and celebrate.
celebrate.zh: 合同已经到手了，那就出去庆祝一下吧。

prisoner.en: Everybody showed sympathy toward the prisoner.
prisoner.zh: 每个人都对囚犯表示同情。

temporary.en: A permanent job is better than a temporary one.

princess.en: Once upon a time, there was a beautiful princess.

ill.en: They called in a doctor because the child was ill.
ill.zh: 他們打電話給醫生因為這個孩子生病了。

problem.en: I think that we're just beginning to understand the problem.
problem.zh: 我认为我们刚开始了解这个问题。

enough.en: I think I now have enough money to buy the car that I want.
enough.zh: 我认为我现在有足够的钱买我想要的那辆车。

bath.en: I was having a bath when the telephone rang.
bath.zh: 在我洗澡的时候，电话响了。

inside.en: Iron the inside of collars first, and then the outside.
inside.zh: 先熨烫领子的里面，然后是外面。

oh.en: Oh, no! My house is on fire!

talk.en: Could you please talk a bit louder? I can't hear very well.
talk.zh: 你能大声点讲吗？我听不太清。

ever.en: This is one of the best restaurants that I've ever eaten in.
ever.zh: 这是我吃过的最好的餐馆之一。

bark.en: A dog will bark at strangers.

horror.en: I'm going to see a horror film.

angry.en: That was the first time that I'd seen Tom so angry.
angry.zh: 那是我第一次见到汤姆如此生气。

asian.zh: 我对亚洲的历史很感兴趣。

dress.en: She could hardly keep from laughing when she saw the dress.
dress.zh: 當她看到那件衣服, 她無法抑制自己的笑聲。

hospital.en: Tom took Mary to the hospital on the back of his motorcycle.
hospital.zh: 汤姆把玛丽放到他的摩托车背上送到医院。

assist.en: I'll be able to assist you.

carpet.en: A green carpet will not go with this blue curtain.
carpet.zh: 绿色的毯子和这条蓝色的帘子不配。

railway.en: I'm sitting in the railway station.

each.en: After they argued, they didn't speak to each other for a week.
each.zh: 他们争吵后，一周都没有再说话。

clerk.en: She is a clerk in the supermarket.

asleep.en: He was about to fall asleep, when he heard his name called.
asleep.zh: 他快要睡著的時候，聽到有人在叫他的名字。

possible.en: The doctor tried every possible means to save his patient.
possible.zh: 为抢救病人医生已尽力了。

might.en: If he had taken his doctor's advice, he might still be alive.
might.zh: 如果他听了他医生的建议，他可能还活着。

recovery.en: There is no hope of his recovery.

brown.en: She was a tall, thin girl with long, soft brown hair.
brown.zh: 她是個又高又瘦, 留著一頭又長又軟的褐色頭髮的女孩。

blind.en: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
blind.zh: 善良是聾子能聽盲人能看的語言。

dash.en: His record is a new world record in the 100-meter dash.
dash.zh: 他刷新了百米短跑的世界紀錄。

must.en: All subscriptions must be paid before the end of this year.
must.zh: 所有訂購必須在今年年底前支付款項。
