importance.en: This is considered to be a matter of great importance.

cap.en: I paid ten dollars for this cap.
cap.zh: 我付了十美元買這頂帽子。

captain.en: The captain is responsible for the safety of passengers.
captain.zh: 船长要为乘客安全负责。

mistake.en: No matter how often I tell her, she keeps making the same mistake.
mistake.zh: 不管我跟她说了多少次，她还是继续犯同样的错误。

depart.en: How often do the buses depart?
depart.zh: 公共汽车多久发车一次？

crazy.en: How did you come up with this crazy idea?
crazy.zh: 你是怎麼想到這麼瘋狂的主意的？

pay.en: I'd gladly pay more for something if it's of high quality.
pay.zh: 如果它是高品質的東西我會很樂意多付一點錢。

lonely.en: When I first came back to Boston, I was really lonely.
lonely.zh: 当我第一次回波士顿时，我真是孤独。

field.en: Field hockey is not very popular in China.
field.zh: 曲棍球在中国不是很流行。

compromise.en: We tried to come to a compromise with them.

crane.en: The crane, unlike the dog, has never dreamed of flying.
crane.zh: 不像狗, 這隻鶴從來沒有夢想過飛翔。

future.en: I really look forward to your visit in the near future.
future.zh: 我很期待在不久的將來您的光臨。

claim.en: America likes to claim that it is a "classless" society.
claim.zh: 美国是一个自称没有社会阶层的国家。

about.en: I was just about to leave the house when the telephone rang.
about.zh: 我正要离开家的时候电话响了。

parade.en: A crowd of people gathered to see the parade.
parade.zh: 一大群人聚在一起看巡游。

choice.en: Because of the storm, we had no choice but to stay at home.
choice.zh: 因為暴風雨的關係，所以我們必須待在家裡。

sum.en: He anonymously donated a large sum of money to the Red Cross.
sum.zh: 他匿名向红十字捐了大笔钱。

foreigner.en: A foreigner came up to me and asked me for money.
foreigner.zh: 一個外國人找到我，管我要錢。

mud.en: He scraped the mud off his boots.

beard.en: He grew a beard to look more mature.
beard.zh: 他留了胡子，为了让自己看起来更成熟。

protect.en: We should tell children how to protect themselves.
protect.zh: 我们应该告诉孩子怎么保护自己。

deep.en: The baby was in a deep sleep in his mother's arms.
deep.zh: 孩子在母亲的怀中熟睡。

willing.en: Tom doesn't have any friends who are willing to help him.
willing.zh: 汤姆没有愿意帮助他的朋友。

quarter.en: The third quarter GNP growth was 1% over the preceding quarter.
quarter.zh: 第三季國民生產總值較上一季成長了1％。

obey.en: They don't always obey their parents.
obey.zh: 他們並不總是服從他們的父母。

case.en: In case of fire, break the glass and push the red button.
case.zh: 万一发生火灾，打碎玻璃并按下红色按钮。

overcoat.en: The child had no overcoat on although it was very cold.
overcoat.zh: 尽管天气很冷，孩子却没有大衣穿。

failure.en: It's not fair to attribute your failure to your parents.
failure.zh: 把你的失败归咎于你的父母是不对的。

beauty.en: Switzerland is famous for its scenic beauty.
beauty.zh: 瑞士以它的風景優美而聞名。

painting.en: I can't look at this painting without thinking of my mom.
painting.zh: 我無法看著這幅畫而不想起我母親。

pressure.en: I'm under so much pressure, I just want to cry.

remarkable.en: In recent years, science has made remarkable progress.
remarkable.zh: 这几年，科学取得了显著的进步。

nap.en: Maybe I'll just give up soon and take a nap instead.
nap.zh: 也许我会马上放弃然后去打盹。

polish.en: I got him to polish my shoes.

company.en: Two thirds of the employees of this company are engineers.
company.zh: 这个公司二分之三的雇员是工程师。

computer.en: It is becoming important for us to know how to use a computer.
computer.zh: 知道如何使用电脑对我们来说变得很重要。

politician.en: A slip of the tongue is sometimes fatal to a politician.
politician.zh: 有时候口误对政治家来说是致命的。

height.en: The average height of girls in this class is over 155 centimeters.
height.zh: 这个班的女生平均身高超过了155公分。

bit.en: Could you please talk a bit louder? I can't hear very well.
bit.zh: 你能大声点讲吗？我听不太清。

sole.en: There was some chewing gum stuck to the sole of Tom's shoe.
sole.zh: 汤姆的鞋底粘了口香糖。

practice.en: You should practice playing the violin every day.
practice.zh: 你應該每天練習拉小提琴。

rapid.en: I'm amazed at his rapid progress in English.
rapid.zh: 我被他英语的快速进步惊呆了。

ghost.en: You look like you've just seen a ghost.
ghost.zh: 你看起來就像見鬼了一樣。

mortal.en: We know that all men are mortal.
mortal.zh: 我們知道人皆難免一死。

iron.en: Iron the inside of collars first, and then the outside.
iron.zh: 先熨烫领子的里面，然后是外面。

china.en: In 1978 a peace treaty was concluded between Japan and China.
china.zh: 1978年中国和日本签署了和平条约。

crime.en: There were three uniformed police officers at the crime scene.
crime.zh: 犯罪现场有三名穿制服的警察。

newspaper.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
newspaper.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

pencil.en: She drew a circle on a piece of paper with a pencil.
pencil.zh: 她用铅笔在纸上画了一个圈。

courage.en: I couldn't help but be impressed by Tom's courage.
courage.zh: 汤姆的勇气给我留下了深刻印象。

forehead.en: The scar on his forehead is conspicuous.
forehead.zh: 他額頭上的疤痕很醒目。

place.en: The most logical place to keep your shoes is near the door.
place.zh: 最合逻輯的放鞋處是門口附近。

joke.en: Tom meant it as a joke, but nobody laughed.
joke.zh: 汤姆认为那是个玩笑，但是没人笑。

sheet.en: Bring me a sheet of paper, please.

melon.en: Cut the melon into six equal pieces.

flame.en: Sulfur burns with a blue flame.
flame.zh: 硫磺燃燒著藍色的火焰。

less.en: No less than three hundred dollars was needed for the work.
less.zh: 这个工作需要不低于300美金。

peace.en: In 1978 a peace treaty was concluded between Japan and China.
peace.zh: 1978年中国和日本签署了和平条约。

basis.en: She visits the dentist on a regular basis, so she seldom gets toothaches.
basis.zh: 她定期去看牙医，所以她很少牙痛。

once.en: An opportunity like this only comes along once in a lifetime.
once.zh: 一辈子只会出现一次像这样的机会。

bus.en: There were only three passengers on the bus when it exploded.
bus.zh: 当汽车爆炸时，车上只有三名乘客。

husband.en: She employed a private detective to keep a watch on her husband.
husband.zh: 她僱了一個私人偵探看守她的丈夫。

haircut.en: I want to get a haircut before I go on the trip.
haircut.zh: 我想在出發旅行前剪個頭髮。

kiss.en: If you buy me an ice cream, I'll give you a kiss.
kiss.zh: 如果你買給我冰淇淋，我就親你一下。

pet.en: She keeps a parrot as a pet.
pet.zh: 她養一隻鸚鵡作為寵物。

sketch.en: Tom ripped a page out of his sketch book.
sketch.zh: 汤姆从他的绘画本上撕下了一页。

avenue.en: I'd like to do shopping on Fifth Avenue in New York.
avenue.zh: 我想在紐約的第五大道購物。

bright.en: Tom rolled up his trouser legs, making his bright red socks visible.
bright.zh: 湯姆捲起褲管，露出鮮紅的襪子。

pride.en: It was difficult for him to hide his pride in his success.
pride.zh: 他很难掩饰对自己成功的骄傲。

cupboard.en: She folded up the towels and put them away in the cupboard.
cupboard.zh: 她把毛巾折叠好再放入柜子里。

impression.en: You never get a second chance to make a first impression.
impression.zh: 你永遠沒有第二次機會去打造第一印象。

find.en: Use a dictionary to find the meanings of the phrases below.
find.zh: 用字典查出下面词组的意思。

chapter.en: We'll deal with this problem in Chapter 3.
chapter.zh: 我们在第三章讨论这个问题。

overtime.en: I had to work overtime yesterday.

garbage.en: Don't forget to take out the garbage.

nasty.en: She gives me a nasty look every time she sees me.
nasty.zh: 她每次看見我都給露出厭惡的眼神。

aboard.en: How many people were aboard that ship?

heaven.en: My father always said that heaven helps those who help themselves.
heaven.zh: 我父親總是說天助自助者。

medicine.en: More and more doctors have begun to use the new medicine.
medicine.zh: 開始使用新藥的醫生越來越多。

europe.en: He left for Europe a week ago, that is, on the tenth of May.
europe.zh: 他在一周前离开去往欧洲，就是说，是在五月十号。

halt.en: As the train came to a halt, all of the passengers wondered what was happening.
halt.zh: 当列车停止时，所有的乘客都想知道发生了什么。

opening.en: The opening ceremony of the Olympics has already begun.

silence.en: There was a minute of silence and then everybody started screaming.
silence.zh: 有一分钟的沉默，然后每个人都开始尖叫。

executive.en: I got acquainted with the chief executive.
executive.zh: 我認識了這位行政長官。

occasional.en: Tomorrow's weather should be sunny with occasional rain.

ear.en: You'll have to play it by ear at the interview.
ear.zh: 在面試的時候你必須見機行事。

after.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
after.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

recently.en: Even though I enjoy bowling, I haven't gone bowling recently.
recently.zh: 虽然我享受打保龄球，但是我最近没有去打保龄球。

perhaps.en: I do not remember seeing the letter, but perhaps I read it.
perhaps.zh: 我不記得我看過這封信, 但或許我讀過它。

acid.en: Acid rain is not a natural phenomenon.

cent.en: These cardboard boxes are a hundred per cent recyclable.
cent.zh: 這些紙板盒是百分之百可回收的。

either.en: We don't like our neighbors, and they don't like us, either.
either.zh: 我們不喜歡我們的鄰居，而他們也不喜歡我們。

atlantic.en: Charles Lindbergh made the first solo flight across the Atlantic Ocean in 1927.
atlantic.zh: Charles Lindbergh於1927年成功完成了第一次獨自飛越大西洋。

actor.en: Do you want to be an actor in a movie?
actor.zh: 你想成為一名電影演員嗎？

fever.en: Do you have a fever and a sore throat?

player.en: I've always wanted to be a professional basketball player.
player.zh: 我一直想成为一名职业篮球运动员。

perfect.en: I thought we had found the perfect hiding place, but the police found us.
perfect.zh: 我以为我们发现了绝妙的藏身之处，但警察找到了我们。

affection.en: Everyone knows of his affection for that dog.
affection.zh: 人人都知道他對那狗的感情。

extent.en: I agree with what you say to some extent.
extent.zh: 在某种程度上，我认同你所说的。

better.en: It's much better to be woken by the birds than by an alarm.
better.zh: 被闹钟唤醒没有被鸟唤醒的好。

chairman.en: He was invited to be the chairman of the club.
chairman.zh: 他受邀做俱乐部的主席。

journal.en: My dad keeps a journal every day.

below.en: Use a dictionary to find the meanings of the phrases below.
below.zh: 用字典查出下面词组的意思。

belief.en: It's my belief that knowledge is power.

over.en: This book says that elephants live to be over 100 years old.
over.zh: 这本书上写，大象能活过一百岁。

conversation.en: They fell into the conversation immediately.

factory.en: Yesterday, an explosion occurred at the fireworks factory.
factory.zh: 昨晚，烟花厂发生了爆炸。

cherry.en: This week the cherry blossoms in the park are in full bloom.

else.en: You can lie to everyone else, but you can't lie to yourself.
else.zh: 你可以向别人撒谎，但你不会向自己撒谎。

mouse.en: Should I buy a wireless mouse?
mouse.zh: 要不要買個無線鼠標呢？

fundamental.en: Needless to say, fundamental human rights should be respected.
fundamental.zh: 無須多言，基本人權應當被尊重。

liquor.en: Lips that touch liquor shall not touch mine.
liquor.zh: 碰過酒的嘴唇就別想碰我的唇。

pillow.en: Could I have a pillow and blanket?
pillow.zh: 給我一個枕頭和毛毯好嗎？

chief.en: I got acquainted with the chief executive.
chief.zh: 我認識了這位行政長官。

dark.en: It was dark and I couldn't make out the license plate number.
dark.zh: 天很黑，我看不清楚車牌號碼。

hang.en: Give a thief enough rope and he'll hang himself.

pacific.en: He crossed the Pacific Ocean in thirty days.

against.en: Anything you say may be held against you in a court of law.
against.zh: 你所说的一切都将成为呈堂证供。

blood.en: A connection between personality and blood type has not been scientifically proven.
blood.zh: 科学上，血型和性格的关联性没有被证明。

life.en: Pizza is the kind of food that fits into today's life style.
life.zh: 比萨是种适合现在的生活方式的食物。

evening.en: Tom died in the evening of the day he and Mary got married.
evening.zh: 汤姆死在了他和玛丽结婚的那天傍晚。

ceiling.en: There's a big fly on the ceiling.
ceiling.zh: 有一隻大蒼蠅在天花板上。

just.en: I think that we're just beginning to understand the problem.
just.zh: 我认为我们刚开始了解这个问题。

necessity.en: A computer is an absolute necessity now.
necessity.zh: 電腦現在是一個絕對必要的東西了。

mercury.en: Mercury is the smallest planet in our solar system.
mercury.zh: 水星是我們的太陽系中最小的行星。

let.en: I think you should let Tom know you can't do that next week.
let.zh: 我認為你應該告訴湯姆你下週做不了。

billion.en: The company suffered a loss of one billion yen last year.
billion.zh: 那家公司去年亏损了10亿日元。

incident.en: The incident made everyone feel more embarrassed.
incident.zh: 這件事弄得大家都比較尷尬。

head.en: Better be the head of a cat than the tail of a lion.

acquaintance.en: I'm very happy to make your acquaintance.

fifty.en: It's not that easy to learn a new language after fifty.
fifty.zh: 五十岁以后学一门新的语言不是那么容易。

people.en: It's wrong to deceive people, but worse to deceive yourself.
people.zh: 欺騙別人是錯的, 但更糟的欺騙自己。

injection.en: I need to give you an injection.

around.en: He was aware that I was around, but didn't come to greet me.
around.zh: 他注意到我在場，但是沒向我打招呼。

everybody.en: Everybody except Tom knew that he didn't need to do that.
everybody.zh: 除了汤姆以外任何人都知道他没必要这么做。

cart.en: Don't put the cart before the horse.
cart.zh: 不要把馬車放在馬的前面。

england.en: France is to the south of England.

agree.en: Let me tell you the reasons that I don't agree with you.
agree.zh: 让我来告诉你我不赞成你的理由。

lens.en: I'm looking for my contact lens.

dirt.en: The children were playing in the dirt.

drawer.en: Tom took a spatula out of the drawer.
drawer.zh: 湯姆從抽屜裡拿出一把鍋鏟。

ray.en: The X-ray showed two broken fingers.
ray.zh: X光片显示两根手指断了。

delicious.en: The food in the cafeteria is cheap, and it's delicious.
delicious.zh: 餐廳的飯很便宜，而且很好吃。

thread.en: My hands were shaking too much to thread the needle.
thread.zh: 我的手抖得太厉害，没法穿针了。

poet.en: The poet expressed his burning passion for the woman he loved.
poet.zh: 詩人對他愛的女人表達了他火熱的激情。

somehow.en: We have to have fun somehow.

across.en: He failed in his attempt to swim across the river.
across.zh: 他试图游过河，但是失败了。

attend.en: "Why are you going to Japan?" "To attend a conference in Tokyo."
attend.zh: “你去日本干嘛？”“去东京参加一个会议。”

cover.en: One thousand dollars will cover all the expenses for the party.
cover.zh: 1000美元将负担聚会的全部费用。

push.en: All you have to do is push this button to take a picture.
push.zh: 你要做的就是按这个按钮拍照。

light.en: There's no light without shade, and no shade without light.
light.zh: 不存在没有阴影的光明，也不存在没有光明的阴影。

earthquake.en: A couple of flights were delayed on account of the earthquake.
earthquake.zh: 一些航班由於地震被延誤了。

make.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
make.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

wind.en: The ship made slow progress against the strong wind.
wind.zh: 這艘船逆風而行緩慢前進。

guilty.en: If he is innocent, it follows that his wife is guilty.
guilty.zh: 如果他是清白的，那他妻子就有罪。

cloudy.en: It's getting cloudy. It may rain soon.
cloudy.zh: 雲愈來愈多，可能快下雨了。

grandson.en: My grandson is still a baby.

feeling.en: After a couple of drinks, the guy was feeling no pain.
feeling.zh: 喝了幾杯酒後，這個傢伙就感覺不痛了。

trap.en: We set a trap to catch a fox.
trap.zh: 我们设了个陷阱来抓狐狸。

race.en: A new team was formed in order to take part in the boat race.
race.zh: 为了参加划船比赛，一支新的队伍组成了。

overlook.en: These kinds of mistakes are easy to overlook.
overlook.zh: 这种错误很容易被人忽视。

whistle.en: Do you know how to whistle?

action.en: Action speaks louder than words, but not nearly as often.
action.zh: 行胜于言，但并不是所有情况都是这样。

listen.en: Tom likes to listen to music while he's doing his homework.
listen.zh: Tom很喜欢一边听歌一边做作业。

murderer.en: The gardener turned out to be the murderer.
murderer.zh: 园丁后来发现就是凶手。

instead.en: Instead of doing what he was supposed to do, Tom went fishing.
instead.zh: 湯姆沒有做該做的事情，而是去釣魚了。

lesson.en: Ten minutes remained until the end of the lesson.

butter.en: I like to eat honey and peanut butter sandwiches.
butter.zh: 我喜歡吃蜂蜜花生醬三明治。

fairly.en: Tom seems to be a fairly successful businessman.
fairly.zh: 湯姆看來是箇很成功的商人。

middle.en: Islam first reached China about the middle of the 7th century.
middle.zh: 伊斯蘭教大約在七世纪中傳到中國。

million.en: Four hundred million people speak English as their first language.
million.zh: 四億人以英語作為他們的第一語言。

know.en: I think you should let Tom know you can't do that next week.
know.zh: 我認為你應該告訴湯姆你下週做不了。

biology.en: He's a professor of biology at Harvard.
biology.zh: 他是哈佛大学的生物学教授。

wheel.en: Tom fell asleep at the wheel.
wheel.zh: 湯姆趴在方向盤上睡著了。

hole.en: The runner jumped over the hole in the ground.
hole.zh: 那个赛跑运动员跃过了地面上的洞。

bay.en: We were granted the privilege of fishing in this bay.
bay.zh: 我们得到了在这个海湾内捕鱼的特权。

finally.en: After a long argument, I finally persuaded her to go camping.
finally.zh: 經過長久的爭論，我終於說服了她去露營。

electric.en: I should have tried out this electric shaver before buying it.
electric.zh: 我本该在买下这个电动剃须刀之前试一下的。

relax.en: Tom wanted to stay home and relax instead of hiking with his children.
relax.zh: 汤姆想待在家休息而不是和他的孩子们出去远足。

golf.en: They say that golf is very popular in Japan.
golf.zh: 他们说高尔夫在日本很流行。

want.en: If I were you, I'd want to know what Tom is doing right now.
want.zh: 如果我是你，我不会想去知道Tom现在正在做什么。

examination.en: The student handed the examination papers in to the teacher.
examination.zh: 該學生把考試卷交給了老師。

kindness.en: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
kindness.zh: 善良是聾子能聽盲人能看的語言。

heroine.en: The novel ends with the heroine's death.
heroine.zh: 小说以女主角的死告终。

cricket.en: A caged cricket eats just as much as a free cricket.
cricket.zh: 籠子裡的蟋蟀吃得跟野生的蟋蟀一樣多。

pond.en: When I was a child, I used to swim in that pond.
pond.zh: 当我还是个孩子的时候，我在这个泳池里游过泳。

shore.en: I found a beautiful shell on the shore.
shore.zh: 我在海滩上发现了一个漂亮的贝壳。

autumn.en: These green leaves turn red or yellow in autumn.
autumn.zh: 这些绿叶到秋天变成红色或黄色。

question.en: A true scientist would not approach the question this way.
question.zh: 真正的科学家不会这样去思考。

front.en: They wanted a wedding picture in front of the Eiffel Tower.
front.zh: 他們想在艾菲爾鐵塔前面拍張結婚照。

broadcast.en: That program is now being broadcast.
broadcast.zh: 那個節目現在正在播出。

remote.en: The TV remote control is under the couch.
remote.zh: 电视遥控器在沙发下面。

boat.en: A new team was formed in order to take part in the boat race.
boat.zh: 为了参加划船比赛，一支新的队伍组成了。

attractive.en: Mary has as attractive a personality as her sister.
attractive.zh: 玛丽性格很好，就像她姐姐一样。

not.en: I make it a rule not to watch television after nine o'clock.
not.zh: 我规定自己在九点之后不看电视。

maybe.en: Maybe I'll just give up soon and take a nap instead.
maybe.zh: 也许我会马上放弃然后去打盹。

protection.en: He did not think he needed their protection.
protection.zh: 他认为他不需要他们的保护。

connect.en: Do you feel like you can't connect with other people?
connect.zh: 您觉得您无法与他人交流吗？

salary.en: A trip to America was equivalent to a two-year salary for her.
salary.zh: 去美国旅行一次相当于她两年的工资。

temper.en: His quick temper will get him in trouble one day.
temper.zh: 他的急脾气迟早会惹祸上身。

result.en: Whether he comes or not, the result will be the same.
result.zh: 他来还是不来，结果是一样的。

sunset.en: Have you ever seen such a beautiful sunset?
sunset.zh: 你看過這麼美的夕陽嗎?

christ.en: We are here in the name of Jesus Christ and King Charles.
christ.zh: 我們這裡以耶穌基督和查理斯國王之名。

fantasy.en: He lives in a world of fantasy.
fantasy.zh: 他住在一個奇幻世界裡。

rope.en: I told her not to let go of the rope, but she did.
rope.zh: 我叫她不要松开绳子，但是她做了。

umbrella.en: You'd better take an umbrella with you in case it rains.
umbrella.zh: 以防下雨你最好带把伞。

halfway.en: We went halfway up the mountain.

considering.en: I'm considering studying in the United States next year.
considering.zh: 我在考虑明年去美国学习。

guy.en: If a guy's in love with you, he'll think about you all the time.
guy.zh: 如果一個男生愛你，他會時時刻刻想著你。

well-known.en: It's said that she's a well-known actress.
well-known.zh: 我聽說她是個有名的演員。

senator.en: The senator was censured by the congressional ethics committee.
senator.zh: 议员受到了议会道德委员会的谴责。

thirsty.en: I was quite thirsty and wanted to drink something cool.

obligation.en: It is our obligation to help.

victim.en: The victim died at a hospital in Boston.
victim.zh: 受害者在醫院裡死去了。

garlic.en: The food tasted slightly of garlic.
garlic.zh: 這個食物嚐起來有一點大蒜味。

supply.en: When his food supply ran short, he had to look for a new place to live.
supply.zh: 他的食物供给不足的的时候，他不得不去找新的地方居住。

sunrise.en: We woke up very early in order to see the sunrise.
sunrise.zh: 我们起得很早为了看到日出。

starve.en: Do you know how many people in the world starve to death every year?
starve.zh: 你知不知道全世界每年有多少人饿死呀？

quiz.en: We had a history quiz this morning.
quiz.zh: 我們今天早上有歷史小考。

charm.en: The old cottage has a certain charm about it.
charm.zh: 旧村屋有它自己一定的魅力。

given.en: The recent shortage of coffee has given rise to a lot of problems.
given.zh: 近来咖啡的短缺造成了许多问题。

pepper.en: I seasoned the fish with salt and pepper.
pepper.zh: 我在魚上灑鹽和胡椒作調味。

video.en: I got a video cassette recorder cheap at that shop.
video.zh: 我在那商店花低價買了臺錄像機。

weapon.en: Patience is sometimes the most effective weapon.
weapon.zh: 耐心有时候是最有效的武器。

stare.en: It isn't polite to stare at people.

center.en: The bus will take you to the center of the city.
center.zh: 巴士会把你们带到市中心。

whoever.en: She will give her picture to whoever wants it.
whoever.zh: 她会把她的照片给想要的人。

deputy.en: He will be my deputy while I am away.
deputy.zh: 我不在的时候，他将是我的代理人。

preventive.en: Preventive measures are much more effective than the actual treatment.
preventive.zh: 预防措施比真正的治疗更有效。

theme.en: What is the theme of his latest novel?
theme.zh: 他最后一本小说的主题是什么？

wealth.en: Because of his wealth, he was able to become a member of that club.
wealth.zh: 由於他的財富，他能夠成為這個俱樂部的成員。

unfortunately.en: Unfortunately, I have to get up early every morning.
unfortunately.zh: 不幸的是，我必须每天早起。

salesman.en: He makes a living as a salesman.

soda.en: Do you want a glass of soda?

whichever.en: Whichever route you take, you will get there in time.
whichever.zh: 不管你选哪条路，你都能按时到那里。

hearing.en: I look forward to hearing your thoughts on this matter.
hearing.zh: 我期待听到你在这件事上的想法 。

chip.en: Tom baked some chocolate chip cookies.
chip.zh: 汤姆烤了些巧克力脆饼。

title.en: What is the title of your new book?

spelling.en: You must be more careful about spelling and punctuation.
spelling.zh: 你得要更注意拼字和標點符號。

priest.en: My brother has become a priest.
priest.zh: 我的兄弟已经成为了牧师。

thick.en: The ice was thick enough for me to walk on.
thick.zh: 冰厚得足以让我在上面走路。

stadium.en: A stage has been set up in the stadium.
stadium.zh: 體育場內已搭建起舞台。

baseball.en: He is fond of watching baseball games on TV.
baseball.zh: 他喜歡看電視上的棒球比賽。

machinery.en: Something must be wrong with the machinery.
machinery.zh: 這個機器一定有什麼地方不對勁。

stream.en: A stream of people came out of the theater.

cigarette.en: He stopped for a quick cigarette.

subject.en: What subject do you think he is interested in?
subject.zh: 你觉得他会对什么主题感兴趣？

oxygen.en: We yawn when we are short of oxygen.
oxygen.zh: 我们缺氧时就会打哈欠。

trash.en: They fine you in Singapore if you throw trash in the streets.
trash.zh: 在新加坡的街道上扔垃圾会被罚款。

x-ray.en: The X-ray showed two broken fingers.
x-ray.zh: X光片显示两根手指断了。

writer.en: Every great writer seems to have been interested in English.
writer.zh: 每一個偉大的作家似乎已經對英語感興趣。

owing.en: Owing to its landmass, the Antarctic has an air temperature lower than that of the Arctic.
owing.zh: 南極因為有大陸，所以氣溫低於北極。

amateur.en: I was still an amateur at that time.

guitar.en: When I came home, my sister was playing the guitar.
guitar.zh: 当我回到家的时候，我妹妹正在弹吉他。

balcony.en: The family is eating breakfast on the balcony.
balcony.zh: 一家人在陽臺上吃早飯。

thumb.en: My grandmother has a green thumb.

writing.en: He devoted the last years of his life to writing his autobiography.

agenda.en: Let's proceed with the items on the agenda.
agenda.zh: 讓我們繼續進行議程上的項目。

according.en: According to the newspaper, there was a big fire last night.
according.zh: 根據報導，昨晚有一場很大的火災。

membership.en: I applied for membership in the association.

ambassador.en: The ambassador was recalled from Warsaw.

landscape.en: The landscape is unfamiliar to me.

understanding.en: Tom and Mary came to an understanding.
understanding.zh: 汤姆和玛丽达成了协议。

anniversary.en: Tom never forgets to give his wife flowers on their wedding anniversary.
anniversary.zh: 湯姆從沒忘記在婚禮周年紀念日送給他妻子花。

respect.en: Respect for law is fundamental to our society.
respect.zh: 尊重法律是我們社會的基礎。

shell.en: I picked up a pretty shell at the seaside.
shell.zh: 我在海边捡了个漂亮贝壳。

jeans.en: Jeans are now in fashion among girls.
jeans.zh: 现在女生穿牛仔裤很流行。

succeeding.en: He has no chance of succeeding.

crossing.en: Please be careful when crossing the street.

system.en: The nearest star to our solar system is Proxima Centauri.
system.zh: 離我們太陽系最近的恆星是比鄰星。

spot.en: The lake is deepest at this spot.

vacation.en: Tom intends to play tennis every day during his summer vacation.
vacation.zh: 汤姆打算暑假每天打网球。

slip.en: In the winter, many older people slip on ice and fall down.
slip.zh: 冬天有很多老人在冰上滑倒。

internship.en: I applied for a summer internship.
internship.zh: 我應徵了一個暑期實習。

rob.en: Tom and his friends planned to rob a bank.
rob.zh: 湯姆和好友打算搶銀行。

elderly.en: We moved our bags to make room for the elderly lady to sit down.
elderly.zh: 我們移走了行李騰出空間讓老太太可以坐下。

boring.en: My first day in the university was rather boring.
boring.zh: 我大学里的第一天相当没意思。

wealthy.en: If it had not been for civil war, they would be wealthy now.
wealthy.zh: 要不是当初有内战，他们现在应该挺富裕了。

whatever.en: Whatever you do, don't let Tom know you're going to do it.
whatever.zh: 做什麼事都不能讓湯姆知道。

boom.en: He amassed a fortune in stock trading during the last boom.
boom.zh: 他在上个景气时期炒股攒下了一笔钱。

ally.en: Germany was once an ally of Italy.
ally.zh: 德国曾是意大利的同盟国。

statement.en: I would like to retract my previous statement.
statement.zh: 我想撤回我之前的陈述。

gene.en: Some diseases are caused by a defective gene.
gene.zh: 一些疾病的产生原因是基因缺陷。

suicide.en: According to the newspaper, he committed suicide.

saving.en: His parents are saving for his college education.
saving.zh: 他的父母為他的大學教育存錢。

waist.en: Mary tied an apron around her waist and then took the turkey out of the oven.
waist.zh: Mary试图把围裙围在腰上，然后把烤鸡从炉子里拿出来。

whale.en: A wounded whale washed up on the beach.
whale.zh: 一条受伤的鲸鱼在海滩边搁浅了。

violin.en: You should practice playing the violin every day.
violin.zh: 你應該每天練習拉小提琴。

topic.en: I chose this topic because I think that it's interesting.
topic.zh: 我選這個主題是因為我覺得它很有意思。

cashier.en: Pay the cashier on the way out.
cashier.zh: 在出口處的收银台付款。

sheer.en: It is a sheer waste of time.

sauce.en: His shirt was stained with sauce.
sauce.zh: 他的衬衫被酱汁弄脏了。

competitive.en: The company's competitive edge will be eroded if system engineers continue to leave.
competitive.zh: 如果系统工程师继续离开，公司的竞争优势将会被削弱。

survivor.en: The accident's only survivor was a baby.
survivor.zh: 这场灾难的唯一幸存者是一个婴儿。

scare.en: I didn't mean to scare Tom.

scary.en: Scary movies will frighten the children.

sin.en: Is it always a sin to tell a lie?

thinking.en: I can't look at this painting without thinking of my mom.
thinking.zh: 我無法看著這幅畫而不想起我母親。

suggestion.en: Her suggestion seems to have been turned down.
suggestion.zh: 她的建议好像被拒绝了。

bacon.en: Would you like bacon or sausage?

sigh.en: She gave out a sigh of relief.

pants.en: I want to buy a pair of pants.

social.en: Germany adopted a social security system in the 1880's.
social.zh: 德国在1880年代采取了一种社会保障制度。

medication.en: I've been taking this medication for many years.
medication.zh: 这种药我吃了好多年了。

salad.en: Mary put some roasted pecans into her salad.
salad.zh: 瑪莉在沙拉裡放了一些烤山核桃。

evidently.en: Evidently, it's going to rain tomorrow.

scandal.en: That scandal cost him his reputation.
scandal.zh: 丑闻让他付出了失去声誉的代价。

horrible.en: I just wish we could leave this horrible place.
horrible.zh: 我只是希望我们能离开这个可怕的地方。

teenager.en: I feel like I'm a teenager again.

offensive.en: The speaker's comments were highly offensive.
offensive.zh: 发言人的评论极有攻击性。

single.en: Tom is single and has a three-year-old daughter.
single.zh: Tom單身，他有個三歲的女兒。

unusual.en: We were faced with an unusual situation because of the accident.
unusual.zh: 那场事故让我们陷入了不寻常的局势。

slight.en: Would you mind if I shut the window? I have a slight cold.
slight.zh: 你不介意我关窗吧？我有点着凉了。

technology.en: Modern technology has made our lives more comfortable.
technology.zh: 现代科学技术让我们的生活更加舒适。

advertise.en: We advertise our products on TV.
advertise.zh: 我们在电视上宣传我们的产品。

software.en: I'm having some problems compiling this software.
software.zh: 我编译这个程序有些困难。

surrounding.en: The surrounding area was very quiet.

ugly.en: An ugly man knocked on my door.
ugly.zh: 一个丑男人敲了我的门。

tax.en: He wanted to reduce the tax on imports.
tax.zh: 他想要减少进口品的税。

nightmare.en: I feel as if I've woken up from a nightmare.
nightmare.zh: 我覺得我好像從惡夢中驚醒。

embassy.en: He is a diplomat at the American Embassy.
embassy.zh: 他是美国大使馆的外交官。

research.en: Research on the causes of cancer is very expensive.
research.zh: 有關癌症成因的研究耗費頗巨。

suitable.en: These scissors are suitable for left and right-handed people.
suitable.zh: 這把剪刀左右撇子都適用。

amazing.zh: 我們所取得的成就令人驚嘆。

diet.en: We're going to eat a lot tonight so I hope you're not on a diet.
diet.zh: 我们今晚会吃很多，所以我希望你没有在节食。

safety.en: You may injure yourself if you don't follow safety procedures.
safety.zh: 如果你不按照安全手续来的话，你可能会受伤的。

service.en: We're looking for someone who has experience in customer service.
service.zh: 我們正在尋找具有客服工作經驗的人。

share.en: For the time being, I must share this room with my friend.
share.zh: 眼下我不得不和我朋友同住这间房间。

skill.en: Fluency in English is a very marketable skill today.
skill.zh: 流利的英語在今天是一種十分搶手的技能。
